properties.title: Utilizing Word Embeddings for Term Matching in Question Answering Systems
properties.summary: Software that compares vector representations of question terms and passage terms in question answering systems by performing the following steps: (i) receiving a question; (ii) generating a plurality of vectors including a first vector representation of a term in the question and a second vector representation of a term in a set of natural language text; (iii) generating a similarity score representing an amount of similarity between the first vector representation and the second vector representation; and (iv) determining whether the set of natural language text is relevant to the question based, at least in part, on the generated similarity score.

properties.title: INGESTING DOCUMENTS USING MULTIPLE INGESTION PIPELINES
properties.summary: A primary ingestion pipeline configured for use in natural language processing includes annotators configured for annotating documents. The annotators and documents to be annotated are evaluated. Based on the evaluations, an ingestion risk score is generated for each document. Each ingestion risk score represents a likelihood that an associated document will not successfully be annotated by the annotators. Each ingestion risk score is compared to a set of risk criteria. Based on the comparisons, a determination is made that each document of a first set of documents satisfies the set of risk criteria. A further determination is made, based on the comparisons, that each document of a second set of documents does not satisfy the set of risk criteria. In response to these determinations, the first set of documents is entered into the primary ingestion pipeline and the second set of documents is provided special handling.

properties.title: Trigger repeat order notifications
properties.summary: Methods, systems, and apparatus for receiving a particular set of user data; obtaining a predictive model that estimates a likelihood of a user to order a food item, wherein the predictive model is generated using observation data that includes historic user data and user data from other user devices; providing the particular set of user data to the predictive model; obtaining an indication of a likelihood of the user to order a food item; based on the indication of a likelihood of the user to order a food item, determining whether to output a notification on the user device inviting the user to order a food item; and in response to determining to output a notification on the user device inviting the user to order a food item, selectively outputting a notification on the user device inviting the user to order a food item.

properties.title: USER INTERFACE GENERATION FOR TRANSACTING GOODS
properties.summary: Methods, systems, and apparatus, including computer programs encoded on a computer storage medium, for user interface generation for transacting goods are disclosed. In one aspect, a method includes receiving order data, user data, and other data. The method further includes determining, for a particular user, an order confidence score that corresponds to a likelihood that the particular user ordered a particular good from a particular vendor on a particular day. The method further includes receiving vendor-type mapping data. The method further includes determining a good-type confidence score that corresponds to the likelihood that the particular good or the particular vendor is associated with a particular type of good. The method further includes determining a composite confidence score. The method further includes storing the composite confidence score, data identifying the particular user, data identifying the particular type of good, and data identifying the particular date.

properties.title: REAL-TIME ANOMALY MITIGATION IN A CLOUD-BASED VIDEO STREAMING SYSTEM
properties.summary: A method for detect and mitigate anomaly in video streaming platforms is disclosed. In one embodiment, performance data from a set of workers is received at a central telemetry system (CTS), where the performance data is indicative of operational status of the set of workers. The CTS processes the performance data, including generating task-specific monitoring data based on the performance data, and it identifies whether the performance data or the task-specific monitoring data contains any anomaly. Upon an anomaly being identified, the CTS mitigates the anomaly by interacting with the set of workers.

properties.title: Method and system for collecting metadata
properties.summary: The invention discloses a method and a system for collecting metadata. The method comprises the steps as follows: in a top-down manner, firstly obtaining layout structures of target data contents in a data source, wherein the data source comprises N target data contents with the same layout structure; establishing a metadata extraction rule based on the layout structure, wherein the rule could reflect a corresponding relation of each metadata attribute and placement position of corresponding metadata content in the target data content; then locating and extracting the needed metadata content based on the metadata extraction rule, thereby achieving metadata collection. Visibly, the method and the system of the invention achieve the precise location to the needed metadata by formulating the metadata extraction rule so as to extract the metadata with high accuracy, and provide support for high-standard service of a data sharing and transaction platform.

properties.title: Enabling end of transaction detection using speculative look ahead
properties.summary: A transaction within a computer program or computer application comprises program instructions performing multiple store operations that appear to run and complete as a single, atomic operation. The program instructions forming a current transaction comprise a transaction begin indicator, a plurality of instructions (e.g., store operations), and a transaction end indicator. A near-end of transaction indicator is triggered based on a speculative look ahead operation such that an interfering transaction requiring a halt operation may be delayed to allow the current transaction to end. A halt operation, also referred to as an abort operation, as used herein refers to an operation responsive to a condition where two transactions have been detected to interfere where at least one transaction must be aborted and the state of the processor is reset to the state at the beginning of the aborted transaction by performing a rollback.

properties.title: Method for detecting and identifying equipment failures in an electrical network
properties.summary: The present invention is intended to provide a method for the detection and identification of equipment failures in an electrical network, with which occurring disturbances or equipment failures can be corrected more efficiently and new, the post-fault situation corresponding operating points can be set with little computational effort. According to the invention, a precalculation of the characteristic measured variables in case of equipment failures on the basis of dynamic simulations takes place at a central level. The calculated data is transmitted to all AC / DC converter nodes and their control units at regular time intervals and stored locally there. At the local level of the control units, the identification of equipment failures is implemented on the basis of local measured values, so that an assignment or retrieval of the transmitted corrective measures becomes possible.

properties.title: VIRTUAL ASSISTANT FOR GENERATING AND RECORDING MEDICAL PRESCRIPTIONS
properties.summary: The invention relates to a novel system for accelerating the issuing of medical prescriptions in a standardised format that allows easy classification and automatic association with relevant information such as dosage of the medicament and mode of administration suggested according to the weight, stature and age of the patient, side effects and questions and information required for a precise medical diagnosis.

properties.title: METHOD FOR GENERATING, RECORDING AND ACCESSING A SINGLE MEDICAL RECORD
properties.summary: The invention relates to a system for generating, recording and accessing a single medical record with biometric authentication and storage on a physical identification card. The system allows the medical record of the patient to be displayed on smart phones, tablets or personal computers.

properties.title: Image processing method, image processing apparatus, and image processing program
properties.summary: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an image processing method, an image processing device and an image processing program that can find a time-space feature quantity of a moving image in which movements of a person and a subject are precisely represented.SOLUTION: An extraction part 20 extracts a plurality of pairs of frame images from a moving image, a person detection part 22 detects a person region from one frame image of each of the plurality of pairs of frame images, and a movement detection part 24 detects a movement region from frame images of each of the pairs of frame images. A subject detection part 28 detects a subject region from one frame image of each of the pairs of frame images, a generation part 30 generates, as a key region, a region where at least one of a person region and a movement region and a subject region overlap each other in one frame image of one of the pairs of frame images, and a calculation part 32 calculates a time space feature quantity from key regions generated for the respective pairs of frame images and outputs the time space feature quantity.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1 [JP2016218953A]

properties.title: IMAGE PROCESSING METHOD, IMAGE PROCESSING DEVICE AND IMAGE PROCESSING PROGRAM
properties.summary: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an image processing method, an image processing device and an image processing program that can find a time-space feature quantity of a moving image in which movements of a person and a subject are precisely represented.SOLUTION: An extraction part 20 extracts a plurality of pairs of frame images from a moving image, a person detection part 22 detects a person region from one frame image of each of the plurality of pairs of frame images, and a movement detection part 24 detects a movement region from frame images of each of the pairs of frame images. A subject detection part 28 detects a subject region from one frame image of each of the pairs of frame images, a generation part 30 generates, as a key region, a region where at least one of a person region and a movement region and a subject region overlap each other in one frame image of one of the pairs of frame images, and a calculation part 32 calculates a time space feature quantity from key regions generated for the respective pairs of frame images and outputs the time space feature quantity.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

properties.title: Established and optimization method and system based on the clinical path of data mining and graph-theory techniques
properties.summary: The present invention disclose it is a kind of based on the clinical path of data mining and graph-theory techniques establish and optimization method and system, the described method includes：S1, data are extracted for various disease respectively；S2, analyzes the data in the distributed data base, sets each diagnosis and treatment phase points of full course for the treatment of respectively for different syndromes；S3, the diagnosis and treatment phase points are stored based on graph-theory techniques, and the diagnosis and treatment phase points include at least the diagnosis and treatment stage, need the treatment information done between each diagnosis and treatment stage, possessed clinical pathology data of each diagnosis and treatment stage in itself；S4, with the related algorithm of graph theory, finds the typical path for the disease；S5, according to each diagnosis and treatment phase points, and the diagnosis and treatment activity of each diagnosis and treatment phase points, establishes clinical path and stores to clinical pathway database；S6, the application result of the record application clinical path and variation, if there is variation, re-optimization clinical path.

properties.title: Clinical path establishing and optimizing method and system based on data mining and graph theory technology
properties.summary: The invention discloses a clinical path establishing and optimizing method and system based on data mining and a graph theory technology. The method includes the steps that S1, data are extracted for different diseases; S2, data in a distributed database are analyzed, and all diagnosis and treatment stage points of a complete treatment course are set for different diseases respectively; S3, based on the graph theory technology, the diagnosis and treatment stage points are stored and at least include diagnosis and treatment stages, information of treatment needing to be performed between the diagnosis and treatment stages and clinical pathology data included in each diagnosis and treatment stage; S4, by the utilization of the related algorithm of the graph theory, a typical path for the disease is searched for; S5, according to each diagnosis and treatment stage pint and the diagnosis and treatment activity of each diagnosis and treatment stage point, a clinical path is established and stored in a clinical path database; S6, the result and variation of applying the clinical path are recorded, and if variation exists, the clinical path is optimized again.

properties.title: SENSOR FUSION USING INERTIAL AND IMAGE SENSORS
properties.summary: Systems, methods, and devices are provided for controlling a movable object using multiple sensors. In one aspect, a method for estimating state information for a movable object is provided. The method can comprise: receiving previous state information for the movable object; receiving inertial data from at least one inertial sensor carried by the movable object; receiving image data from at leasttwo image sensors carried by the movable object; and determining updated state information for the movable object based on the previous state information, the inertial data, and the image data usingan iterative optimization algorithm during the operation of the movable object.

properties.title: Metal coins recognition methods based on deep neural network and device
properties.summary: Embodiments of the present invention provide a kind of metal coins recognition methods based on deep neural network.This method includes：The first deep neural network model of characteristic Design based on metal coins, the first deep neural network model include random noise network layer and optical noise process layer；Housebroken first deep neural network model is removed into random noise network layer, obtains the second deep neural network model；Using the second deep neural network model, metal coins to be identified are identified.The method of above-described embodiment mode through the invention, it can obtain the deep neural network model of the influence of random noise and optical noise that one can effectively remove metal coins, metal coins identification is carried out by the model it is possible to prevente effectively from the problem of metal coins identification is easy error caused by metal coins abrasion or illumination effect, effectively increases the accuracy of metal coins identification.In addition, embodiments of the present invention provide a kind of metal coins identification device based on deep neural network.

properties.title: Metal coin identification method based on deep neural network and apparatus thereof
properties.summary: An embodiment of the invention provides a metal coin identification method based on a deep neural network. The method comprises the following steps that a first deep neural network model is designed based on a characteristic of a metal coin, and the first deep neural network model comprises a random noise network layer and a light noise processing layer; the random noise network layer is removed from the trained first deep neural network model so that a second deep neural network model is obtained; the second deep neural network model is used to identify the metal coin which is not identified. By using the method in the embodiment of the invention, the deep neural network model which can effectively remove influences of the random noise and the light noise of the metal coin can be obtained. The model is used to identify the metal coin so that an error-prone metal coin identification problem caused by metal coin abrasion or an illumination influence can be effectively avoided. Accuracy of the metal coin identification is effectively increased. Besides, the embodiment of the invention provides a metal coin identification apparatus based on the deep neural network.

properties.title: Image sparse various dimensions feature extracting method for image quality evaluation
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of image sparse various dimensions feature extracting method for image quality evaluation.Present invention specific implementation comprises the following steps：1. reference block and the search space of structural map picture.2. finding closely located block in spatial domain and transform domain respectively, and stack in groups.3. the group of heap poststack carries out 3D transformation of coefficient respectively, the sparse transform domain information of multidimensional is obtained.4. extract the histogram statistical features of transform domain information and the coefficient correlation of position linearity fitting.5. the characteristic vector that features described above is constituted, is trained and classified using SVMs, image quality evaluation fraction is obtained.The present invention takes full advantage of the block similarity information of image overall, realizes the removal of redundancy feature and the extraction of effective various dimensions sparse features, and the feature of extraction can be used for the objective evaluation of picture quality.

properties.title: Image sparse multi-dimension feature extraction method used for image quality evaluation
properties.summary: The invention discloses an image sparse multi-dimension feature extraction method used for image quality evaluation. The method comprises following steps of 1: constructing reference blocks and searching space of images; 2: searching blocks in the same distance in space domain and transformation domain and piling the blocks into groups; 3: performing 3D coefficient transformation for piled groups and obtaining multi-dimensional sparse transformation domain information; 4: extracting histogram statistical features of the transformation domain information and related coefficient of position linear fitting; and 5: training and classifying the above feature vectors formed by the above features by use of a support vector machine so as to obtain image quality evaluation scores. According to the invention, by taking full advantages of whole block similarity information of images, elimination of redundant features and extraction of effective multi-dimensional sparse features are achieved, and the extracted features can be used for objective evaluation of the image quality.

properties.title: Machine-learning-based legal risk quantitative evaluation system and method
properties.summary: The invention, which belongs to the artificial intelligence and data analysis field, relates to a legal risk quantitative evaluation system and method, wherein a machine learning technology in the artificial intelligence field is used for analyzing massive law data and legal risk evaluation is carried out based on an analysis result. According to the system and the method, massive law case data can be analyzed by using the machine learning technology and a risk evaluation function is also constructed, thereby carrying out quantitative evaluation on a law case risk. The computer artificial intelligence effect can be fully realized and the quantitative law risk evaluation can be provided. Therefore, the method and system have wide application prospects.

properties.title: The most U.S. path navigation algorithm of based on genetic algorithm
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of the most U.S. path navigation algorithm of based on genetic algorithm, it uses the form of SEQ.XFER, each sight spot is numbered, route represents with the numbering through sight spot, being easy to coding and decoding, and use linear polymerization priority method to process multi-objective genetic algorithm (MOGA), insertion, deletion and mutation operator that design is controlled by adaptive probability process Varible-length chromsome genetic algorithm (Clv GA), add sequence operator and reduce search volume, add rapid convergence.The present invention can reach original design requirement, obtains corresponding efficient solution, and good solves the problem obtaining U.S. path.And user may specify calculating parameter, it is selected from, in the concentration that solves obtained, the path that body is liked.

properties.title: Most beautiful path navigation algorithm based on genetic algorithm
properties.summary: The invention discloses a most beautiful path navigation algorithm based on a genetic algorithm, and the algorithm employs a mode of serial number coding for the setting of the serial number of each tourist attraction. A path is represented by the connection of serial numbers of tourist attractions, thereby facilitating the coding and decoding. The algorithm also employs a linear aggregation priority method to process a MOGA (multi-objective genetic algorithm). Insertion, deletion and mutation operators controlled by adaptive probability are designed for processing Clv GA (variable-length chromosomes genetic algorithm), and a sorting operator is added to reduce the size of a searching space, thereby speeding up convergence. The algorithm can meet the requirements of an original design, obtains a corresponding efficient solution, and well solves a problem of obtaining the most beautiful path. Moreover, a user can assign calculation parameters, and selects a favorite path in a process of obtaining a solution set.

properties.title: Method for searching for, analyzing and predicting price change trend of memory chip through big data
properties.summary: The invention discloses a method for searching for, analyzing and predicting the price change trend of a memory chip through big data, and relates to a big data analysis and extraction technology. Through change of the search frequency about key words of historical memory chip transactions on a search engine and the price change rule of the memory chip, mathematics modeling is carried out, a corresponding relation between the search frequency of the key words of the memory chip transactions and the price change trend of the memory chip is extracted, and a statistics prediction is made on the future price change of the memory chip. Through the method provided by the invention, the price change of a memory can be quite accurately predicted, and the production and purchasing cost can be greatly decreased for large-size electronic product producing enterprises.

properties.title: SYSTEM FOR ANALYZING SOCIAL MEDIA DATA AND METHOD FOR ANALYZING SOCIAL MEDIA DATA USING THE SAME
properties.summary: One aspect of the present invention provides a system for analyzing social media data and a method for analyzing social media data using the same; comprising: a seeding means which targets a social media by extracting the URL of the social media and giving a pattern to the extracted URL; a crawling means which collects the data included in the targeted social media; an indexing means including a firs indexing unit which classifies the collected data into first collection data and a second collection data based on the predetermined reference value, gives an index to the first collection data, and searches the target data based on the index, and a second indexing unit which gives an index to the second collection data and searches the target data based on the index; an analyzing means which analyzes the searched target data and derives a result value; and a visualization means which generates the image of the derived result value. The present invention is designed to provide a system for analyzing social media data and a method for analyzing social media data using the same capable of efficiently dispersing process loading of the data that have been accumulated geometrically as time passed, and maximizing the accessibility, commercialization and processing efficiency for the data that haven be collected in real time, for a shot time or a long time.

properties.title: TECHNIQUES FOR PREDICTING PERCEPTUAL VIDEO QUALITY
properties.summary: In one embodiment of the present invention, a quality trainer and quality calculator collaborate to establish a consistent perceptual quality metric via machine learning. In a training phase, the quality trainer leverages machine intelligence techniques to create a perceptual quality model that combines objective metrics to optimally track a subjective metric assigned during viewings of training videos. Subsequently, the quality calculator applies the perceptual quality model to values for the objective metrics for a target video, thereby generating a perceptual quality score for the target video. In this fashion, the perceptual quality model judiciously fuses the objective metrics for the target video based on the visual feedback processed during the training phase. Since the contribution of each objective metric to the perceptual quality score is determined based on empirical data, the perceptual quality score is a more accurate assessment of observed video quality than conventional objective metrics.

properties.title: OBJECT EXTRACTION CLASSIFICATION DEVICE AND PROGRAM THEREOF
properties.summary: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an object extraction classification device which extracts and classifies an object during video imaging.SOLUTION: An object extraction classification device 1 includes: color feature information generation means (luminance difference generation means 10, color phase difference generation means 11) for generating an image including color feature information showing the existence of an object from a difference for each frame of a video image; and space dividing means 13 for dividing an image including a color feature information into a partial space and convex hull information showing the feature of the convex hull from the convex hull of the partial space having continuity based on Gromov-Hausdorff distances; and classification means 17 for generating information peculiar to topology from the convex hull information, generating a probability model/probability distribution of the peculiar information, and extracting and classifying the object by the previously determined classification standard.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

properties.title: Semi-supervised learning of word embeddings
properties.summary: Software that trains an artificial neural network for generating vector representations for natural language text, by performing the following steps: (i) receiving, by one or more processors, a set of natural language text; (ii) generating, by one or more processors, a set of first metadata for the set of natural language text, where the first metadata is generated using supervised learning method(s); (iii) generating, by one or more processors, a set of second metadata for the set of natural language text, where the second metadata is generated using unsupervised learning method(s); and (iv) training, by one or more processors, an artificial neural network adapted to generate vector representations for natural language text, where the training is based, at least in part, on the received natural language text, the generated set of first metadata, and the generated set of second metadata.

properties.title: Distributed large population speaker recognition method based on fuzzy clustering decision tree
properties.summary: A distributed large population speaker recognition method based on a fuzzy clustering decision tree comprises the steps of firstly dividing the training data into several parts, then carrying out the decision tree classification based on the fuzzy clustering on the several parts; then deciding a leaf node of a tree of a tested speaker; and finally processing the selected leaf node by a Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficient and Gaussian mixture model method to identify the identity of the speaker. According to the present invention, a training data fuzzy clustering process mainly comprises the following steps of 1 extracting the characteristic data according to the corresponding layers; 2 calculating the mean value and the standard deviation of the characteristic data to obtain a trust spacing set D; 3 carrying out an Lloyd algorithm on the set D to obtain a separation vector; 4 carrying out the clustering grouping by taking the separation vector as the basis to obtain a node of the next layer. The distributed large population speaker recognition method based on the fuzzy clustering decision tree of the present invention enables the classification accuracy to be improved remarkably and the classification efficiency to be improved greatly, and has a higher accurate recognition rate, a lower calculation complexity, and a good anti-interference capability to the added noise.

properties.title: Generating distributed word embeddings using structured information
properties.summary: A computer program that uses structured information, such as syntactic and semantic information, as context for representing words and/or phrases as vectors, by performing the following steps: (i) receiving a first set of natural language text and a set of information pertaining to the first set of natural language text, where the information includes metadata and corresponding contextual information indicating a relationship between the metadata and the first set of natural language text; and (ii) generating a first vector representation for the first set of natural language text utilizing the metadata and its corresponding contextual information.

properties.title: Prediction method of motion path of vehicle in tunnel
properties.summary: The invention provides a prediction method of the motion path of a vehicle in a tunnel. The method comprises the steps that a number of cameras are arranged at user-specified interval in the tunnel; a number of photos are shot in user-specified period of time; a photo processing result and a photo library are matched to determine the sign information of the vehicle; thresholding, median filtering and a series of processing are carried out on the photos; a motion vector is combined to update a next position of the target vehicle in the tunnel; and vehicle tracking and dynamic prediction of are completed. According to the invention, information in the photos can be effectively acquired; the information is timely fed back to a driver; and a rich content base is provided for accurately analyzing the running condition of the vehicle in the tunnel.

properties.title: Resource allocation optimization for cloud-based video processing
properties.summary: A method executed by an electronic device to optimize resource utilization while processing media workflows by a video streaming platform is disclosed. In one embodiment, a request to initiate a set of training sessions is received, and for each training session, a set of training workflows to be processed is initiated and a task graph for each training workflow is created. Then a worker of the video streaming platform is assigned to each training session. The raw performance data from each assigned worker is then collected, and a platform performance profile is generated based on the raw performance data from the each assigned worker. The platform performance profile is used to predict resource requirements of media workflows to be processed by the video streaming platform. A system to perform the method and a storage medium storing instructions to perform the method are disclosed too.

properties.title: Selective object filtering and tracking
properties.summary: A computer-implemented method for tracking an object in a video including, in a first video frame: filtering the first video frame to delineate foreground from background and to select from the foreground an object to be tracked, said object identified at least by contour, center and color; constructing a first virtual bounding box minimally enclosing said object; using a tracking algorithm to establish a target location for the object in the second video frame based on similarity to the object identified in the first video frame; constructing a second virtual bounding box minimally enclosing the target shape at the target location; extending the second virtual bounding box; filtering the second video frame to delineate foreground from background using weighted values propagated from at least the first frame; scrutinizing the output of the second video frame by matching at least shape and color of the target shape at the target location.

properties.title: relational search engine.
properties.summary: An iterative process of learning a relational search engine where the desired results (c) are tuples of documents retrieved from a search space (a) linked by at least one relationship. The desired relationship is expressed by the user in natural language (b). Using a man-machine interface and an iterative learning algorithm (e), the system learns to better model the relationships sought or (c) and thus improves the relevance of the results displayed (d).

properties.title: Information processing method, device and system used for container cargo handling
properties.summary: The invention discloses an information processing method, device and system used for container cargo handling. The method comprises the following steps: in a process that a bridge crane system carries out cargo handling on a container, on the basis of the state information of the bridge crane system, determining the position of the container in the bridge crane system; when the position of the container reaches a preset position, controlling an acquisition device corresponding to the preset position to collect the cargo handling image of the container, wherein the cargo handling image at least comprises the image of at least one surface of the container; and identifying a container number in the image of at least one surface of the container to obtain cargo handling information that the bridge crane system carries out the cargo handling on the container. When the method is adopted, the cargo handling image of the container is collected to obtain the container number, so that the problem in the prior art that the cargo handling information of the container can not be automatically obtained is solved, and the automatic and efficient identification of the cargo handling information of the container is realized.

properties.title: Multi-functional wearable-implemented method to provide fetus's life advancement and enhancements for pregnant mothers
properties.summary: The invention works using various items such as a scalable controller board, Ai processing chip, Ai software, firmware, programming language, web spider bots, pCell wireless chip, health sensors, lateral belt support and a casing to house the items creating an extension of the human mind and body interconnecting the human physiology with artificial intelligence and Neuro-synaptic and cognitive computing furthering our health, education and advancement of our civilization.

properties.title: Intelligence is to Barebone and for the method for colored sensing device
properties.summary: Computer implemented intelligent alignment methods of the one kind for colored sensing device (12), colored sensing device initially obtain the original sensing value measured by colored sensing device and original sensing value are converted into three color values (S401).Known colored collection can be used and calibrate colored sensing device (S402).The original reading received from colored sensing device, which can be mapped to known three color values (S403) and mapped value, can be switched to standard basis light source color space (S404).A kind of client-server system can be provided, in the client-server system, colored sensing device and one or more servers jointly execute the operation according to the disclosure.

properties.title: INTELLIGENT ALIGNMENT SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR COLOR SENSING DEVICES
properties.summary: A computer-implemented intelligent alignment method for a color sensing device (12) which initially obtains a raw sense value measured by the color sensing device and converts the raw sense value to atristimulus value (S401). The color sensing device may be calibrated using a known set of colors (S402). Raw readings received from the color sensing device may be mapped to known tristimulus values(S403), and mapped values may be converted to a standard reference illuminant color space (S404). A client-server system may be provided in which a color sensing device and one or more servers collectively execute operations according to the present disclosure.

properties.title: Method and system for semantic segmentation in laparoscopic and endoscopic 2D/2.5D image data
properties.summary: A method and system for semantic segmentation laparoscopic and endoscopic 2D/2.5D image data are disclosed. Statistical image features that integrate a 2D image channel and a 2.5D depth channel of a 2D/2.5 laparoscopic or endoscopic image are extracted for each pixel in the image. Semantic segmentation of the laparoscopic or endoscopic image is then performed using a trained classifier to classifyeach pixel in the image with respect to a semantic object class of a target organ based on the extracted statistical image features. Segmented image masks resulting from the semantic segmentation ofmultiple frames of a laparoscopic or endoscopic image sequence can be used to guide organ specific 3D stitching of the frames to generate a 3D model of the target organ.

properties.title: Automated correction of natural language processing systems
properties.summary: Machine logic that automatically detects natural language processing (NLP) system annotation errors and correspondingly updates NLP annotators to prevent future erroneous annotations by performing the following steps: (i) determining that a first annotation error has occurred in an annotation of a corpus by the natural language processing system; (ii) generating a candidate set of annotation correction actions, where each annotation correction action of the set is adapted to prevent an occurrence of an error similar to the first annotation error by the natural language processing system; (iii) selecting an annotation correction action from the candidate set of annotation correction actions, based, at least in part, on a set of annotation correction confidence characteristics; and (iv) automatically applying the selected annotation correction action to the natural language processing system.

properties.title: Adding to a knowledge base using an ontological analysis of unstructured text
properties.summary: Techniques are described for adding knowledge to a knowledge base.

properties.title: Intelligent control ware is felt to three -dimensional immersive body
properties.summary: The utility model discloses an intelligent control ware is felt to three -dimensional immersive body, this system contains: stereoscopic display module and image gathering module to and the body feels the control terminal triplex, and the stereoscopic display module includes cell -phone, gyroscope attitude sensor, two convex lens lenses and helmet frame, the body is felt the control terminal system and is included gyroscope attitude sensor, singlechip and steering wheel constitution, image gathering module comprises two mesh cameras. The utility model discloses, a three -dimensional immersive agent of new face structure sense controller method is proposed, the video that utilizes two cameras that are certain angle each other to shoot simultaneously produces the 3D image to display device through virtual reality technology founds three -dimensional immersive environment, control system is felt to the body that utilizes gyroscope gesture sensing equipment, singlechip and steering wheel to constitute, realizes feeling control to the immersive body of camera. The utility model discloses simple structure, with low costs, the popularization that can improve virtual reality technology at to a great extent.

properties.title: Artificial intelligence controlled entertainment performance
properties.summary: A process and computer program product to record performance related data for a plurality of entertainment performances having a plurality of audiences. Further, the process and computer program product determine external data that is associated with the plurality of audiences and/or environmental factors corresponding to locations of the plurality of entertainment performances. In addition, the process and computer program product annotate the performance related data with the external data to generate annotated performance related data. The process and computer program product also train an artificial intelligence system based upon the annotated performance related data. The process and computer program product generate, at the artificial intelligence performance instructions to provide a performance. Further, the process and computer program product provide, from the artificial intelligence system to a performance device, the performance instructions to provide a performance.

properties.title: A kind of characteristic point Optimum Matching method towards still image Object identifying
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of characteristic point Optimum Matching method towards still image Object identifying, the data of Expressive Features point are extracted from still image by SIFT algorithms, propose image characteristic point logic structure of data, characteristic point to, quality of match matrix, characteristic point to concepts such as preferred and criticalities, devise a kind of new feature matching method.Feature matching method in the present invention includes：Design feature point data logical construction；Construct characteristic point pair；Preferred feature point pair；Calculating benchmark image characteristic point criticality；Match target image subject., can be with high probability and lower complexity by feature matching method of the present invention, correctly identification includes the still image for specifying object, is provided to build the object recognition system based on still image with reference to realization.

properties.title: Feature point optimization matching method for static image object recognition
properties.summary: The invention discloses a feature point optimization matching method for static image object recognition. The data of description feature points is extracted from static images through a SIFT algorithm, concepts such as image feature point data logic structures, feature point pairs, matching quality matrix, feature point pair optimization and criticality, and a new feature matching method is design. The method includes: designing the feature point data logic structures; constructing the feature point pairs; optimizing the feature point pairs; calculating standard image feature point criticality; matching target image objects. By the method, the static images containing appointed objects can be recognized with high probability and low complexity, and reference is provided to the object recognition system based on the static images.

properties.title: Future order throttling
properties.summary: Methods, systems, and apparatus, including computer programs encoded on a computer storage medium, for managing orders. The methods include actions of tracking performance of a fulfillment center in fulfilling orders for items at the fulfillment center, storing historical preparation information that describes historical performance of the fulfillment center, and receiving an order for an item to be fulfilled by the fulfillment center for a fulfillment time. Additional actions include obtaining a portion of the stored historical preparation information that is relevant to fulfillment of the item by the fulfillment time, obtaining current order information that describes other orders to be fulfilled at the fulfillment center, determining whether the fulfillment center can fulfill the order by the fulfillment time based at least on the portion of the stored historical preparation information and the current order information, and providing an indication to a user device that the order cannot be fulfilled.

properties.title: Throttle-Triggered Suggestions
properties.summary: Methods, systems, and apparatus, including computer programs encoded on a computer storage medium, for managing orders. The methods include actions of receiving an order for an item to be fulfilled by the fulfillment center for a fulfillment time, obtaining a portion of stored historical preparation information that is relevant to fulfillment of the item by the fulfillment time, obtaining current order information that describes other orders to be fulfilled at the fulfillment center, determining to provide an alternate suggestion, identifying at least one of an alternate item, an alternate fulfillment center, or an alternate time to include in the alternate suggestion, generating the alternate suggestion based on the identification of at least one of the alternate item, the alternate fulfillment center, or the alternate time to include in the alternate suggestion, and providing the alternate suggestion to the user device.

properties.title: Information physical emerging system data classification method based on genetic planning decision tree
properties.summary: Information physical emerging system data classification method of the invention based on genetic planning decision tree is as follows：Data Collection is carried out first by physical location；Then again by the data transfer being collected into information unit；Finally it is further analyzed and handles in information unit.Include following steps in the operation of information unit：One is that information unit sets up multiple decision trees, and the classification number of record data by the way of putting back to；Two be that the decision tree of foundation is tested, and records classification accuracy rate and the cost loss of every decision tree；Three be to optimize processing to all decision trees in information unit using genetic planning, finally leaves the decision tree number equal with data category number；Four be, using the decision tree left, training data classification to be modified on the basis of cost loss is reduced, decision tree is generated with amended training data.It is effective to reduce the time-consuming of final decision tree structure while certain classification accuracy and relatively low cost loss is ensured.

properties.title: Information cyber-physic system data classification method on basis of genetic program decision-making trees
properties.summary: The invention relates to an information cyber-physic system data classification method on the basis of genetic program decision-making trees, which comprises the following steps: firstly, carrying out data collection by using a physical unit; then transmitting the collected data to an information unit; finally, carrying out further analysis and processing in the information unit. The operation of the information unit comprises the following steps that 1, the information unit adopts a mode with replacement to establish a plurality of decision-making trees and records a category number of the data; 2, the established decision-making trees are tested and classification accuracy and cost loss of each decision-making tree; 3, a genetic program is adopted to carry out optimization processing on all the decision-making trees in the information unit and finally, a number of decision-making trees, which is equal to the category number of the data, are kept back; 4, the left decision-making trees are utilized to modify training data categories on the basis of reducing cost loss and a final decision-making tree is generated by the modified training data. When a certain classification accuracy and low cost loss are ensured, time consumption of constructing the final decision-making tree is effectively reduced.

properties.title: A kind of image classification method
properties.summary: The present invention provides a kind of image classification method, SPM frameworks are remained, on the basis of SIFT feature extractive technique, with reference to covariance matrix Feature Extraction Technology and LLC technologies, covariance matrix Fusion Features various features, these features are insensitive to yardstick, rotation and illumination variation.LLC coding rate is fast, efficiency high, is provided the foundation for linear classification.The use of linear classifier shortens the training time.While nicety of grading improves, the robustness of system is enhanced again.

properties.title: Image classification method
properties.summary: The invention provides an image classification method. An SPM framework is reserved, a covariance matrix feature extraction technology and an LLC (locality-constrained linear coding) technology are combined on the basis of an SIFT (scale invariant feature transform) feature extraction technology, and multiple covariance matrix features are fused and are not sensitive to the scale, rotation and illumination change. LLC is high in coding speed and high in efficiency and lays a foundation for linear classification. The training time is shortened due to usage of a linear classifier, and the system robustness is enhanced while the classification accuracy is increased.

properties.title: Giving method and system in a kind of information system authority set interacted based on intelligent body
properties.summary: The present invention discloses giving method and system in a kind of information system authority set interacted based on intelligent body, including application layer, core layer and user session layer；The application layer includes system Agent, system module knowledge base, authority Agent and System Privileges knowledge base；The core layer includes management Agent；The dialogue layer includes two kinds of roles of user and keeper.Intelligent body interaction technique introducing information system authority is authorized field by the present invention, it is successfully realized the centralization that information system authority is authorized, using managing Agent, authority Agent, the class Agent of system Agent tri- and system module knowledge base, the big knowledge base of System Privileges knowledge base two, set up and framework is authorized in the information system authority set interacted based on intelligent body, solve because information system is various, technology is numerous and diverse, the chaotic problem of the authority of work dispersion train.

properties.title: Information system permission centralized awarding method and system based on intelligent agent interaction
properties.summary: The invention discloses an information system permission centralized awarding method and an information system permission centralized awarding system based on intelligent agent interaction. The information system permission centralized awarding system comprises an application layer, a core layer and a user interaction layer; the application layer comprises a system Agent, a system module knowledge base, a permission Agent and a system permission knowledge base; the core layer comprises a management Agent; the interaction layer comprises a user character and a manager character. The intelligent agent interaction technology is introduced to the field of information system permission awarding, the centralization of the information system permission awarding can be successfully realized, the management Agent, the permission Agent and the system Agent as well as the system module knowledge base and the system permission knowledge base are utilized to establish an information system permission centralized awarding architecture based on the intelligent agent interaction, so that the problem of permission chaos caused by multiple information systems, complexity in technology and scattering in work can be solved.

properties.title: Mapping learning method, information compression method, apparatus, and program
properties.summary: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To learn mapping for converting featured values for each media type of content into low dimensional featured values under the consideration of various types of media content, and to convert the featured values of each media type of the content into the low dimensional featured values under the consideration of various types of media content.SOLUTION: A feature extraction part includes a step of extracting featured values corresponding to media types from content for each media type of the content. A mapping learning part includes steps of: calculating a relative geometrical relation between the featured values of each media type of the content and featured values corresponding to the media types of the other content existing in the vicinity of the featured values corresponding to the media types in a featured value space as a space in which the featured values corresponding to the media types exist for each media type on the basis of the featured values; and learning mapping for converting the featured values of each media type of the content into low dimensional featured values on the basis of the featured values, the relative geometrical relation calculated about each of the content of media types for each media type of the content and the group identifier of each content.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1 [JP2016197375A]

properties.title: MAPPING LEARNING METHOD, INFORMATION COMPRESSION METHOD, DEVICE, AND PROGRAM
properties.summary: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To learn mapping for converting featured values for each media type of content into low dimensional featured values under the consideration of various types of media content, and to convert the featured values of each media type of the content into the low dimensional featured values under the consideration of various types of media content.SOLUTION: A feature extraction part includes a step of extracting featured values corresponding to media types from content for each media type of the content. A mapping learning part includes steps of: calculating a relative geometrical relation between the featured values of each media type of the content and featured values corresponding to the media types of the other content existing in the vicinity of the featured values corresponding to the media types in a featured value space as a space in which the featured values corresponding to the media types exist for each media type on the basis of the featured values; and learning mapping for converting the featured values of each media type of the content into low dimensional featured values on the basis of the featured values, the relative geometrical relation calculated about each of the content of media types for each media type of the content and the group identifier of each content.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

properties.title: Translation evaluation method and device
properties.summary: The embodiment of the invention provides a translation evaluation method. The method includes the steps that feature libraries and translation evaluation models corresponding to application scenarios are acquired; an original text and the translation to be analyzed are processed based on the acquired feature libraries so as to acquire corresponding feature vectors; the translation evaluation models are used for calculating the acquired feature vectors, so that the evaluation result of the translation to be analyzed is obtained. According to the method, the adaptive feature libraries and the translation evaluation models can be selected to be used for evaluating the translation to be analyzed according to different application scenarios, so that the evaluation result is more accurate, the manual labor is reduced, the language types of the original text and the translation are not limited, and the method is suitable for various application scenarios. In addition, the embodiment of the invention provides a translation evaluation device.

properties.title: A kind of translation evaluation method and device
properties.summary: Embodiments of the present invention provide a kind of translation evaluation method.This method comprises: obtaining feature database corresponding with application scenarios and translation evaluation model；Based on feature database obtained, original text and translation to be analyzed are handled to obtain corresponding feature vector；Operation is carried out to feature vector obtained using the translation evaluation model, to obtain the evaluation result of the translation to be analyzed.The method of embodiment according to the present invention, translation to be analyzed can be evaluated for the feature database and translation evaluation model that the selection of different application scene adapts to, so that evaluation result is more accurate, and reduce hand labor, the category of language of original text and translation is not limited, is suitable for plurality of application scenes.In addition, embodiments of the present invention provide a kind of translation evaluation device.

properties.title: Disambiguation in speech recognition
properties.summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) processing including a feedback configuration to allow for improved disambiguation between ASR hypotheses. After ASR processing of an incoming utterance where the ASR outputs an N-best list including multiple hypotheses, the multiple hypotheses are passed downstream for further processing. The downstream further processing may include natural language understanding (NLU) or other processing to determine a command result for each hypothesis. The command results are compared to determine if any hypotheses of the N-best list would yield similar command results. If so, the hypothesis(es) with similar results are removed from the N-best list so that only one hypothesis of the similar results remains in the N-best list. The remaining non-similar hypotheses are sent for disambiguation, or, if only one hypothesis remains, it is sent for execution.

properties.title: Pre-wakeword speech processing
properties.summary: A system for capturing and processing portions of a spoken utterance command that may occur before a wakeword. The system buffers incoming audio and indicates locations in the audio where the utterance changes, for example when a long pause is detected. When the system detects a wakeword within a particular utterance, the system determines the most recent utterance change location prior to the wakeword and sends the audio from that location to the end of the command utterance to a server for further speech processing.

properties.title: Question answering system-based generation of distractors using machine learning
properties.summary: Generating distractors for text-based MCT items. An MCT item stem is received. The stem is transmitted to a QA system and a plurality of candidate answers related to the stem is received from the QA system. Incorrect answers in the plurality of candidate answers are identified. Textual features are extracted from the stem. A set of semantic criteria associated with the extracted textual features is generated. Based on the generated semantic criteria, a subset of the incorrect candidate answers is selected.

properties.title: Choosing optimal images with preference distributions
properties.summary: Abstract A method (100) of generating (160) an enhanced image, the method comprising: determining (200) a visible difference map (260) dependent upon low-level properties of at least one of the 5 images, the visible difference map showing differences between the images that are visible to an observer; determining (600) a salience map (670) from at least one of the images, the salience map showing regions of the images that are of most interest to the observer; determining (400) from the visible difference map (260) and the salience map (670) terms (180) of a cost function reflecting a difference between an observer preference distribution (170) for 10 the modified image and an ideal observer preference distribution (142); and adjusting at least one low-level property of the modified image to change a selected term of the cost function to thereby improve a value of the cost function, thereby generating the enhanced image (120'). D1q20061 / 0256(IYK I

properties.title: DETERMINING ANSWERS TO QUESTIONS USING A HIERARCHY OF QUESTION AND ANSWER PAIRS
properties.summary: Software that answers questions asked of question answering systems, by performing the following steps: (i) identifying a hierarchy of question and answer pairs, where a first answer paired to a first question in the hierarchy of question and answer pairs includes at least a second answer paired to a second question in the hierarchy of question and answer pairs; (ii) receiving, by a question answering system, an input question from a first user; (iii) identifying first user contextual information pertaining to the first user; and (iv) answering the input question, by the question answering system, based, at least in part, on the hierarchy of question and answer pairs and the first user contextual information.

properties.title: Automatically optimizing analytics database server
properties.summary: A system and method for automatically optimized statistical analysis by computer is disclosed. Given a programmatic definition of the data model, the system generates, manages, and interfaces optimized computer code for use by higher level client applications. The method by which the computer generated code is transparently compiled and linked for remote access by clients provides near peak numerical efficiency without any human optimization in the client space. The configuration of model subsystems is designed to allow flexible general purpose analytics as well as specialized machine learning through optimizing feedback mechanisms.

properties.title: COMMUNITY POLICING VIA MULTI-PLATFORM INTEGRATION
properties.summary: Aspects of the present invention disclose a method for event discovery based on semantic patterns. The method includes one or more processors receiving data from one or more devices. The method further includes one or more processors generating one or more semantic patterns from the data. The method further includes one or more processors comparing the one or more new semantic patterns to one or more existing semantic patterns. The method further includes one or more processors determining whether the one or more new semantic patterns are substantially unique based on the comparison.

properties.title: Multi-label unbalanced virtual asset data classification method based on integrated learning
properties.summary: The invention discloses a multi-label unbalanced virtual asset data classification method based on integrated learning. The method includes the following steps that under a distributed storage framework of virtual assets, firstly, random sampling with replacement is carried out on virtual asset data, then, multi-label data is learned through a feedforward neural network, and the relevance between labels is implied in a trained neural network connection weight; meanwhile, the SMOTE is selected and used for sampling according to the distribution of the labels in sampled data; finally, for improving the generalization performance of a classifier, the integrated learning method is adopted, and the neural network serves a weak classifier in each turn of learning. Compared with the prior art, the classical algorithm Bagging in integrated learning serves as the framework, the feedforward neural network and the SMOTE are integrated in the integrated learning framework according to the characteristics of the unbalanced virtual asset data, and the classification precision can be effectively improved.

properties.title: SCHEMA GENERATION USING NATURAL LANGUAGE PROCESSING
properties.summary: In a method for generating a schema for a corpus of data, a first corpus of data is received, wherein the first corpus of data includes unstructured text. A processor identifies a set of one or more entity relationships within the first corpus of data, wherein an entity relationship comprises a first entity, a second entity, and a specified relationship between the entities. A processor compares the set of one or more entity relationships to a second corpus of data, wherein the second corpus of data includes text of a subject matter different than the corpus of data. A processor determines a score for each entity relationship based on the comparison to the second corpus of data. A processor generates a schema for the first corpus of data based on the score for each entity relationship of the set of one or more entity relationships.

properties.title: A kind of classifier construction method and object detection method for target detection
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of classifier construction methods and object detection method for target detection, wherein, classifier construction method includes: negative sample generation step, is handled the scene original image collection got, the background collection not comprising target is obtained, negative sample is generated according to the background collection；Positive sample generation step handles the positive sample original image collection comprising target got, obtains positive sample collection, and the positive sample collection includes multiple positive samples；Classifier determines step, obtains the sub-classifier corresponding to each positive sample, and then obtain required classifier according to the set of each classifier in conjunction with negative sample and misrecognition sample for each positive sample.Compared to existing method, this method has higher verification and measurement ratio and capture rate.

properties.title: 6 -degree of freedom joint type industrial robot
properties.summary: The utility model provides a 6 -degree of freedom joint type industrial robot, includes a fixed disk, and the fixed disk is fixed by the screw and the basement of coiling on week, and the above -mentioned centre of a circle department of fixed disk has linked firmly the connecting axle, and the carousel is connected to the connecting axle, the first swing arm of the above -mentioned balanced both sides axle connected with in the centre of a circle of carousel, the first swing arm and the 2nd swing arm shaft link, and a rotation festival is fixed on second swing arm top, and gripper arm and the rotation nodal axisn link, and the gripper arm tip is connected with the grappling fixture that the object was held to the clamp by a rotation festival. The utility model discloses 6 -degree of freedom joint type industrial robot working range is big, flexible movements, compact structure, and the design is exquisite, makes popularization on a large scale.

properties.title: DETERMINING OFF-TOPIC QUESTIONS IN A QUESTION ANSWERING SYSTEM USING PROBABILISTIC LANGUAGE MODELS
properties.summary: A question answering system that determines whether a question is off-topic by performing the following steps: (i) receiving, by a question answering system, a set of documents; (ii) identifying topical subset(s) for each document of the set of documents using named entity recognition, where each topical subset relates to a corresponding topic; (iii) assigning a set of topic score(s) for each topical subset using natural language processing, where each topic score relates to a corresponding probability associated with the respective topical subset under a probabilistic language model; and (iv) determining, based, at least in part, on the topic score(s) corresponding to the topical subset(s), whether a question input into the question answering system is off-topic.

properties.title: MODEL VECTOR GENERATION FOR MACHINE LEARNING ALGORITHMS
properties.summary: Techniques are described for forming a machine learning model vector, or just model vector, that represents a weighted combination of machine learning models, each associated with a corresponding feature set and parameterized by corresponding model parameters. A model vector generator generates such a model vector for executing automated machine learning with respect to historical data, including generating the model vector through an iterative selection of values for a feature vector, a weighted model vector, and a parameter vector that comprise the model vector. Accordingly, the various benefits of known and future machine learning algorithms are provided in a fast, effective, and efficient manner, which is highly adaptable to many different types of use cases.

properties.title: Relevance score assignment for artificial neural networks
properties.summary: The task of assigning a relevance score to a set of items to which an artificial neural network is applied is to propagate the initial relevance score derived from the network output by backpropagating the initial relevance score through the artificial neural network. Obtain the relevance score for each item obtained by redistributing into sets. In particular, this back-propagation is performed for each neuron according to a broader series of artificial neural networks and / or distribution functions so as to calculate a pre-redistributed relevance score for each neuron's set of downstream neighboring neurons. The neuron is distributed to a set of upstream neighboring neurons. [Selection] Figure 4

properties.title: METHOD FOR CORRECTION OF EYE IMAGE USING MACHINE LEARNING AND METHOD OF MACHINE LEARNING
properties.summary: FIELD: medical equipment.SUBSTANCE: group of inventions relates to medical equipment, in particular, to means of processing images and video image of eye interlocutors during video chat, video conferencing. Method of machine training a precursor to correct orientation of sight on an image comprises obtaining a plurality of pairs of images, containing inside each pair of image of same person, determining position of eyes on each pair of images, training predictor, generating a correcting displacement vector, so that for each pair of images with replacement of colour components of each pixel of first image from pair with colour components of another pixel of first image from pair, offset according to prediction of predictor, an image is obtained, maximally similar to second image of pair and storing predictor. Method for correction of image of eyes is characterised by that it comprises loading a predictor, obtaining at least one frame of person's face, determining position of person's eye on image and forming two rectangular areas, closely described around eyes, replacing colour components of each pixel in area of eyes with colour components of pixel offset according to prediction of predictor of machine training.EFFECT: technical result of invention is improvement of accuracy of correction of eye image while reducing resource consumption of video processing process.13 cl, 4 dwg

properties.title: RELEVANCE SCORE ASSIGNMENT FOR ARTIFICIAL NEURAL NETWORK
properties.summary: The task of relevance score assignment to a set of items onto which an artificial neural network is applied is obtained by redistributing an initial relevance score derived from the network output, onto the set of items by reversely propagating the initial relevance score through the artificial neural network so as to obtain a relevance score for each item. In particular, this reverse propagation is applicable to a broader set of artificial neural networks and/or at lower computational efforts by performing same in a manner so that for each neuron, preliminarily redistributed relevance scores of a set of downstream neighbor neurons of the respective neuron are distributed on a set of upstream neighbor neurons of the respective neuron according to a distribution function.

properties.title: RELEVANCY ASSESSMENT FOR ARTIFICIAL NEURAL NETWORKS
properties.summary: FIELD: physics.SUBSTANCE: group of inventions relates to computer engineering and can be used in artificial neural networks. Device is configured to redistribute the initial relevance score obtained from the network output to the set of elements by back propagation of the initial relevance score through the artificial neural network in order to obtain a relevance score for each element, wherein the device is configured to perform reverse propagation such that for each neuron, pre-redistributed estimates of relevance of a set of descending neighbouring neurons of the corresponding neuron are distributed over a set of upstream neighbouring neurons of the corresponding neuron using a distribution function.EFFECT: technical result is to ensure relevance assessment for artificial neural networks.35 cl, 21 dwg

properties.title: Relevance Score Assignment to Artificial Neural Networks
properties.summary: The task of relevance score assignment for a set of items to which an artificial neural network is applied is to determine the initial relevance derived from the mesh output by propagating the initial relevance score back through the artificial neural network to obtain a relevance score for each item By redistributing the score into a set of items. In particular, this backward propagation can be achieved in such a way that, for each neuron, the previously redistributed relevance scores of the set of neighbors downstream of each neuron are distributed on a set of upstream neurons of each neuron according to a distribution function Is applicable to a wider set of artificial neural networks by performing its reverse propagation and / or is applicable with lower computational effort.

properties.title: Computer artificial intelligence system adopting iris imaging technology
properties.summary: The utility model discloses a computer artificial intelligence system adopting an iris imaging technology. The computer artificial intelligence system comprises an iris camera, an image preprocessing circuit, a main controller, a sensor system, an ultrasonic emitter, an emitted signal preprocessing circuit, a driving circuit, a driving motor A, a working mode selection circuit and a mechanical system. The sensor system is connected with the main controller, the iris camera is connected with the image preprocessing circuit, the image preprocessing circuit is connected with the main controller, the main controller is connected with the emitted signal preprocessing circuit, the ultrasonic emitter is connected with the emitted signal preprocessing circuit, the working mode selection circuit is connected with the main controller, the main controller is connected with the driving circuit, the driving motor A is connected with the driving circuit, and the mechanical system is connected with the main controller. The iris recognition technology is effectively utilized for performing security management on the whole system, the microcontroller is adopted for performing center main control, and the whole system has the advantages of being scientific and reasonable in design, safe, stable, high in intelligent degree and the like.

properties.title: The method and apparatus of automatic-answering back device
properties.summary: The present invention provides a kind of method and apparatus of automatic-answering back device, helps to make more to ask questions and can be answered automatically, and has higher response precision.The present invention automatic-answering back device method in, collect original language material, language material is clustered, is cleaned, convert after category preservation.After natural language processing and classification being carried out to customer problem, on the basis of priority match businessman self-defined question and answer, the answer that the pre-set condition dynamic generation such as different problems classification and item property, user information is final in scene is seeked advice from according to user, wherein, it determines the condition for asking questions affiliated classification and being met, the original language material of the condition is chosen corresponding to the category and met from the original language material of preservation；Seeked advice from merchandise news is asked questions described in acquisition is subsequently filled the reserved location in the original language material of selection to form answer text.

properties.title: MULTI-MULTIDIMENSIONAL COMPUTER ARCHITECTURE FOR BIG DATA APPLICATIONS
properties.summary: According to some embodiments of the invention there is provided a data processing apparatus comprising a front-end interface electronically coupled to a main processor. The front-end interface is adapted to receive data stored in a repository, in particular an external storage and/or a network. The front-end interface is adapted to determine whether the data is a single-access data or a multiple-access data by analyzing an access parameter designating the data. The front-end interface is adapted to route the multiple-access data for processing by the main processor. The front-end interface is adapted to route the single-access data for pre-processing by the front-end interface and routing results of the pre-processing to the main processor.

properties.title: Multi-Dimensional Computer Architecture for Big Data Applications
properties.summary: The data processing apparatus provided in accordance with some embodiments of the present invention includes a front-end interface electrically connected to the main processor. This front-end interface receives data stored in the repository, specifically an external storage device and / or network, and analyzes the access parameters that specify the data to determine if the data is single-access data or multi-access data. The front-end interface is configured to route the multi-access data for processing by the main processor, route the single-access data for preprocessing by the front-end interface, and route the result of the preprocessing to the main processor .

properties.title: Multi- and multi-dimensional computer architecture for big data applications
properties.summary: According to some embodiments of the invention there is provided a data processing apparatus comprising a front-end interface electronically coupled to a main processor. The front-end interface is adapted to receive data stored in a repository, in particular an external storage and/or a network. The front-end interface is adapted to determine whether the data is a single-access data or a multiple-access data by analyzing an access parameter designating the data. The front-end interface is adapted to route the multiple-access data for processing by the main processor.
