The front-end interface is adapted to route the single-access data for pre-processing by the front-end interface and routing results of the pre-processing to the main processor. [WO2016146166A1]

properties.title: DATA PROCESSING APPARATUS, METHOD FOR PROCESSING LARGE DATA PROCESSES
properties.summary: Data processing apparatus, method for processing large volumes of data according to some embodiments of the invention there is provided a data processing apparatus comprising a front interface electronically coupled to a main processor. The front interface is adapted to receive data stored in a repository, particularly in external storage and / or a network. the front interface is adapted to determine whether the data is single access data or multiple access data by analyzing an access parameter designating the data. The front interface is adapted to route the multi access data for processing by the main processor. The front interface is adapted to route single access data for preprocessing through the front interface and to route preprocessing results to the main processor.

properties.title: data processing appliance, method and computer program product for large data applications
properties.summary: According to some embodiments of the invention there is provided a data processing apparatus comprising a front-end interface electronically coupled to a main processor. The front-end interface is adapted to receive data stored in a repository, in particular an external storage and/or a network. The front-end interface is adapted to determine whether the data is a single-access data or a multiple-access data by analyzing an access parameter designating the data. The front-end interface is adapted to route the multiple-access data for processing by the main processor. The front-end interface is adapted to route the single-access data for pre-processing by the front-end interface and routing results of the pre-processing to the main processor.

properties.title: Early fault diagnosis method for complex equipment
properties.summary: The invention discloses an early fault diagnosis method for complex equipment. The early fault diagnosis method for the complex equipment comprises the specific steps: extracting collection signals through a sensor; carrying out wavelet transform on the extracted collection signals for de-noising; and establishing a fault diagnosis model based on a BP (Back Propagation) neural network and a fault diagnosis model based on an SVM (Support Vector Machine) according to mechanical features and circuit features, and carrying out fault diagnosis. A kernel function in the fault diagnosis model based on the SVM is a polynomial kernel function, a radial basis function (RBF) or a Sigmoid kernel function. According to the early fault diagnosis method, the fault diagnosis of the complex equipment is divided into a fault diagnosis with the mechanical features and a fault diagnosis with the circuit features, and the fault diagnosis models are established respectively according to the mechanical features and the circuit features, so that mechanical tests are easy, many samples can be obtained, quick convergence can be realized by using the BP neural network, and accuracy is higher; furthermore, the circuit sample data is less. With the adoption of the advantages of small samples of the SVM, the fault diagnosis of the complex system, such as the complex equipment, can be realized.

properties.title: CROWDSOURCING OF MEETINGS
properties.summary: The method includes receiving a first set of data from a first client device. The method further includes determining a first topic from the first set of data. The method further includes generating a first productivity value for the first topic. The method further includes receiving a second set of date data from a second client device. The method further includes determining a second topic from by the second set of data. The method further includes generating a second productivity value for second set of data. The method further includes comparing the first topic to the second topic. The method further includes in response to comparing the first topic and the second topic and determining the difference between the first productivity value and the second productivity value is above a threshold value, triggering an action.

properties.title: First Artificial Intelligence Methods and Systems for Asset Trendspotting (PNN), Cyber Security (DeepCyber), and Portable Big Data Cloud (MCPS)
properties.summary: New methods, systems, and apparatus, including computer programs called PNN (predictive neural network) artificial intelligence (AI) machines are disclosed for financial and cyber-security predictions. The PNN AI machines use unique neural network algorithms to optimize and select the best method with the highest back-test accuracy for the predictions. The PNN machines predict multiple relevant entities (e.g., stocks) to cross validate the future trends, and help respond to future financial and cyber-security crises like weather forecast to severe weather conditions. The PNN AI machines are applied in two fields: PNN Financial for investment and trading, and DeepCyber for cyber security. Extended from the PNN artificial neural networks (intelligence) machines, a group of DeepCyber methods based on the Mobile Cloud Pangu Servers (MCPS) cloud platform are disclosed to defend networks and computer applications for cyber security.

properties.title: DENSE SUBGRAPH IDENTIFICATION
properties.summary: Embodiments are directed to a computer implemented method of analyzing a graph having a plurality of vertices and edges to identify a subgraph of the graph, wherein the subgraph includes an exact subset. The method includes applying, by a first processor, a heuristic analysis to the graph to determine an initial subset of the graph. The method further includes applying, by either the first processor or a second processor, an exact analysis to the initial subset to determine an exact subset of the initial subset.

properties.title: ESTIMATION DEVICE USING SENSOR DATA, ESTIMATION METHOD USING SENSOR DATA, AND ESTIMATION PROGRAM USING SENSOR DATA
properties.summary: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To improve estimation accuracy on an inner state such as emotions using sensor data in an environment in which a body motion is involved.SOLUTION: A sensor data acquisition part 330 of a prior learning part 301 acquires acceleration data. The acceleration data is recorded in a history accumulation database 350 with a label of emotions acquired by an emotion acquisition part 310. Storage information in the database 350 is mechanically learned at an estimator generation part 360, and an estimator that estimates emotions from heartbeat data is generated. Meanwhile, a filtering part 390 of an estimation part 302 determines the magnitude of a body motion of a user based on the acceleration data acquired by a sensor data acquisition part 380, and replaces the heartbeat data of a part where the body motion is large with the heartbeat data at the time when the body motion is small. An emotion determination part 395 estimates emotions of the user from the heartbeat data after the replacement using the estimator, and an emotion visualization part 396 presents an estimation result to the user.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

properties.title: Estimation device using sensor data, estimation method using sensor data, estimation program using sensor data
properties.summary: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To improve estimation accuracy on an inner state such as emotions using sensor data in an environment in which a body motion is involved.SOLUTION: A sensor data acquisition part 330 of a prior learning part 301 acquires acceleration data. The acceleration data is recorded in a history accumulation database 350 with a label of emotions acquired by an emotion acquisition part 310. Storage information in the database 350 is mechanically learned at an estimator generation part 360, and an estimator that estimates emotions from heartbeat data is generated. Meanwhile, a filtering part 390 of an estimation part 302 determines the magnitude of a body motion of a user based on the acceleration data acquired by a sensor data acquisition part 380, and replaces the heartbeat data of a part where the body motion is large with the heartbeat data at the time when the body motion is small. An emotion determination part 395 estimates emotions of the user from the heartbeat data after the replacement using the estimator, and an emotion visualization part 396 presents an estimation result to the user.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1 [JP2016165373A]

properties.title: Hyper aware logic to create an agent of consciousness and intent for devices and machines
properties.summary: The embodiment of the assembly of neural logic units is referred to as Hyper Aware Logic.

properties.title: Method and apparatus for remote identity proofing service issuing trusted identities
properties.summary: Illustrative methods, processes, and software are disclosed herein that remotely prove the identity of individuals fully compliant with identity proofing standards and policies. The embodiments may utilize photo identification and government identities using networked capabilities and capabilities within a process for end-to-end fully remote identity proofing followed by the automated provisioning and issuance of a trusted identity and optional credentials. In alternative manifestations the embodiments use automated government identity lookups including but not limited to digital imagery equipment with artificial intelligence and pattern recognition to detect fraudulent physical identification articles remotely, electronic scans of magnetic stripes and other electronic markers on government-issued identification media including but not limited to drivers licenses, government employee identities, passports, or other government-issued identities combined with real-time lookup in trusted databases. In alternative manifestations the embodiments use multiple biometric form factors for proofing, registration, recognition, and authentication.

properties.title: A sorting method and device for video search for series
properties.summary: The invention relates to a sorting method and device for video search for series. The method comprises the steps of obtaining search terms containing a video name; judging whether the search terms contain a serial number of seasons and/or a serial number of episodes; if yes, acquiring search results matching the serial number of seasons and/or the serial number of episodes and performing clustering processing on non-first search results, sorting the same series in the non-first search results according to the serial numbers of seasons and sorting the episodes in the same season, and combining the first result and the sorted non-first search results; if no, acquiring search results matching the search terms, performing clustering processing on the search results, and sorting the same series in the search results according to the serial numbers of seasons and sorting the episodes in the same season; adjusting the order for the sorted search results; outputting search results after order adjustment. Through sorting and order adjustment of search results, output search results are optimized, users can find desired results conveniently and rapidly and the search efficiency is increased.

properties.title: A kind of highway fee evasion vehicles behavioral data analysis method
properties.summary: The present invention relates to a kind of highway fee evasion vehicles behavioral data analysis method, including：Step 1, charge data is gathered, data set S, and corresponding road section bayonet socket and service area bayonet socket data is designated as, is designated as data set K；Step 2, preprocessed data collection S, retains satisfactory record data；Step 3, the Levenshitein distances between the car plate record of vehicle discrepancy charge station in the record data retained are calculated, and are appended to every record end as new data set S1；Step 4, to S1Frequency analysis, obtains channel zapping histogram；Step 5, segmentation threshold T during maximum between-cluster variance is obtained according to channel zapping histogram；Step 6, by S1The record data that middle Levenshtein distances are more than T saves as data set S2；Step 7, in S2Middle lookup is doubtful to change card record pair, as a result saves as data set S3；Step 8, search whether exist and S in K3In the corresponding record of record data.

properties.title: Expressway vehicle fee evasion behavior data analysis method
properties.summary: The invention relates to an expressway vehicle fee evasion behavior data analysis method. The method includes the steps of firstly, collecting charge data marked as a data set S, and collecting data of a corresponding road section access and a service area access, wherein the data are marked as a data set K; secondly, preprocessing the data set S, and reserving the recorded data meeting the requirements; thirdly, calculating the Levenshitein distances between plate number records kept in the recorded data when vehicles leave a toll station and plate number records kept when the vehicles enter the toll station, and adding the Levenshitein distances to the tails of the records to serve as new data sets S1; fourthly, conducting frequentness analysis on S1 to obtain a frequentness distribution histogram; fifthly, obtaining the segmentation threshold value T according to the frequentness distribution histogram when the maximum between-cluster variance happens; sixthly, saving the recorded data, with the Levenshitein distances larger than T, in S1 as a data set S2; seventhly, finding suspected card charge record pairs in S2, and saving the result as a data set S3; eighthly, searching K to find out whether the records corresponding to the recorded data in S3 exist or not.

properties.title: Protection Method and Computer System
properties.summary: The invention relates to a protection method and a computer system. The protection method, which releases an attack of a malware to a network interface controller (NIC) system, includes processing a microbatching operation in a plurality of session channels at at least an operational period according to at least one input information, to generate a plurality of session-specific NIC patterns of the plurality of session channels; and merging the plurality of session-specific NIC patterns to generate an application-specific NIC pattern at an application layer, so as to dispose a script information corresponding to the application-specific NIC pattern in the NICs for releasing the attack of the malware, wherein the microbatching operation is processed to generate a plurality of independent subset-specific NIC pattern in each session channel, so as to generate the session-specific NIC pattern corresponding to each session channel. The protection method and computer system can effectively prevent the malware and protect the network.

properties.title: Filtering video for video telephony and video conferencing
properties.summary: In an approach to video filtering, a computer receives a first video frame of a presenter from a video feed that includes an audio feed. The computer extracts a face of the presenter and a background from the first video frame. The computer receives a second video frame. The computer determines whether a difference between the first video frame and the second video frame exceeds a pre-defined threshold. The computer converts the audio feed from speech to text. The computer determines whether the difference between the first video frame and the second video frame is expected, based, at least in part, on the converted audio feeds. The computer discards video data associated with the difference between the first video frame and the second video frame. The computer creates a third video frame, based, at least in part, on non-discarded video data.

properties.title: CLASSIFICATION OF CELLULAR IMAGES AND VIDEOS
properties.summary: A method for performing cellular classification includes extracting a plurality of local feature descriptors (220) from a set of input images (210) and applying a coding process to convert each of the plurality of local feature descriptors into a multi-dimensional code (225). A feature pooling operation (230) is applied on each of the plurality of local feature descriptors to yield a plurality of image representations and each image representation is classified as one of a plurality of cell types (240).

properties.title: Artificial action potential generator, converter and encoder for pulsed neural networks
properties.summary: Artificial action potential generator, converter and encoder for pulsed neural networks describes an electronic system that generates artificial action potentials (spikes) from configurable parameters that can be changed continuously and in real time, converts digital data into spikes. , generating firing frequencies in artificially simulated neurons,   encodes   spikes generated in three distinct pulse train forms: by the average firing of neurons, known in neuroscience as   rate coding  ; the delay time or order of arrival of the spikes relative to a reference, called   temporal coding  ; or by the number of neurons active over a period of time, known as population coding, and describes an electronic system that interfaces between an input data set (the physical world, digital systems, computers, etc.) and networks. pulsed neural networks (artificial or natural), and converts physical quantities and / or information to a format suitable for handling by the pulsed artificial neural networks and communicates with other devices in serial or parallel form, both in and out .

properties.title: PORTABLE FLUID SENSORY DEVICE WITH LEARNING CAPABILITIES
properties.summary: The invention discloses a device for identifying fluids or measuring their concentration. The device is configured to capture fluid sensing signals and sent to processing capabilities to be annotated, pre-processed and fed to databases of datasets and models which have learning capabilities. The device has a stick or stylus form factor which is makes it fit to be used by health care professionals or by the general public. Advantageously, the stick can be used to capture data from gas and liquid, being possibly phases of the same analyte. The device can be a package containing all processing capabilities being configured to be autonomous. It can operate in conjunction with an intermediary device of a smart phone, a PC or a POCT type. The system comprising autonomous fluid sensory devices, intermediary devices and database servers can operate in a learning mode or in a use mode. Measurements can be filtered, and normalized to statistically eliminate the differences in measurements due to bad operational conditions, differences of device configurations or differences of local parameters (temperature, hygrometry, flow rate, etc...)

properties.title: SPEECH PROCESSING DEVICE AND PROGRAM
properties.summary: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To easily and precisely perform a style conversion on a speech.SOLUTION: A speech processing device acquires a first acoustic feature quantity generation value as an acoustic feature quantity of each of frames of a time series based upon a language feature quantity of a document and a statistical model associated with an acoustic feature quantity generated as to a first style, and obtains a second acoustic feature quantity generation value as an acoustic feature quantity of each of frames of the time series based upon the language feature quantity of the document and a statistical model associated with an acoustic feature quantity generated as to a second style. The speech processing device makes frames of the first acoustic feature quantity generation value and the second acoustic feature quantity generation value correspond to each other, and generates processing information with the difference between the first acoustic feature quantity generation value and the second acoustic feature quantity generation value for each of the frames which are made to correspond. The speech processing device makes an acoustic feature quantity of speech data generated by reading the document aloud and frames of the first acoustic feature quantity generation value correspond to each other, and processes acoustic feature quantities of the respective frames of the speech data based upon processing information generated from the first acoustic feature quantity generation value of a corresponding frame.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

properties.title: Electronic meeting question management
properties.summary: Multimedia content is presented to a user. Questions presented by the user are monitored. A core concept of the question can be identified. The multimedia content can be analyzed to determine whether the multimedia content contains a possible answer to the question. If the multimedia content contains a possible answer to the question, but the possible answer is covered in a plurality of segments of the multimedia content, a confidence score can be assigned to each of the plurality of segments that cover the possible answer. The confidence score can indicate a probability that the respective segment answers the question. Based on the confidence score assigned to each of the segments, a segment for which there is a high level of confidence that the segment answers the question can be selected. Based on the selected segment, an answer to the question can be automatically generated and presented to the user.

properties.title: Vehicle route optimization method
properties.summary: The invention discloses a vehicle route optimization method. The vehicle route optimization method includes that defining a vehicle route problem into a graph model, solving an inter-cluster cost route from a global view to acquire a feasible solution space, and optimizing the feasible solution space through a Monte Carlo method, genetic manipulation, a quantum rotating gate adaptive strategy and the like. The vehicle route optimization method is capable of solving the vehicle route problem in the global connection, optimizing the time and space complexity in the problem solving process, and avoiding premature convergence. The vehicle route problem refers to that a certain number of customers have different numbers of goods demands, a distribution center provides goods for the customers, one motorcade is responsible for distributing goods, and proper driving routes are organized to meet the demands of the customers and achieve the aims of shortest journey, lowest cost, shortest time consumption and the like under a certain constraints.

properties.title: MINING SANDBOXES
properties.summary: We present sandbox mining, a technique to confine an computer program to computing resources accessed during automatic testing. Sandbox mining first explores software behavior by means of automatic test generation, and extracts the set of resources accessed during these tests. This set is then used as a sandbox, blocking access to resources not used during testing. The mined sandbox thus protects against behavior changes such as the activation of latent malware, infections, targeted attacks, or malicious updates. The use of test generation makes sandbox mining a fully automatic process that can be run by vendors and end users alike.[WO2016131830A1]

properties.title: A kind of vehicle routing optimization method
properties.summary: The present invention provides a kind of vehicle routing optimization method, Vehicle Routing Problems are defined as graph model by this method, solution space is obtained from cost path between global angle solution cluster, passes through Monte Carlo method, genetic manipulation and Quantum rotating gate adaptive strategy etc. and optimizes solution space.The present invention can solve to seek Vehicle Routing Problems in global connection, the solution process of problem can be made to be optimized in Time ＆ Space Complexity, and can avoid Premature Convergence.The invention solves Vehicle Routing Problems refer to a certain number of customers, the cargo demand of each own different number, home-delivery center provides cargo to customer, it is responsible for sending cargo by a fleet, organize appropriate planning driving path, target is so that the demand of customer is met, and can reach the purpose of most short such as distance, cost minimization, minimum consuming time under certain constraint.

properties.title: Smart aquarium [TW201630530A]
properties.summary: A smart aquarium is disclosed, which can automatically regulate factors of water quality environment, such as water temperature, illumination, pH value and dissolved oxygen, provide a simulated artificial feeding ecological environment, realize the automatic cleaning and refreshing of water environment in the aquarium, and actually achieve the goal of no need for changing water for a long period of time. The smart aquarium of the present invention further provides an automatic feeding, health and body color brightness monitoring and analysis system, so as to keep the bred creatures in healthy and gorgeous condition and enhance the feeder's pleasure. The core value of the smart aquarium is to set up several digital smart control system compositions in the fish breeding facility, which may provide with the features of smart environment controllability, ecological and healthy cultivation (creature safety), automatic regulation and energy saving, and may become an important milestone for modern technology cultivation. [TW201630530A]

properties.title: EA (Evolutionary Algorithm)-based English text clustering method
properties.summary: The invention provides an EA (Evolutionary Algorithm)-based English text clustering method. The EA-based English text clustering method comprises the steps of firstly preprocessing English texts into vector space models, and then proceeding a clustering process, wherein the clustering process comprises the steps of step one, randomly selecting n clustering centers, carrying out clustering division on the clustering centers by utilizing Euclidean distance, enabling texts in the same type to be classified in the same cluster, and thus completing and obtaining local optimum clustering division; step two, carrying out EA processing, selecting clustering centers of a new generation by using an alliance thought and a gene crossover mutation process, carrying out the clustering division through an inter-text closet distance principle, and thus achieving global optimum. According to the EA-based English text clustering method provided by the invention, the English text can be effectively clustered, unnecessary clustering results can be removed, and thus a clustering process can be more quickly converged.

properties.title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR RECOGNIZING UNLOGGED WORD IN INTELLIGENT INTERACTION SYSTEM
properties.summary: A method for recognizing an unlogged word in an intelligent interaction system. The method comprises: by gradually recognizing whether a length of a word input by a user is equal to 1 or greater than 4, whether the word input by the user is a word existing in a pre-set word segmentation dictionary or a user dictionary and whether the word input by the user is contained in a word of the word segmentation dictionary or the user dictionary level by level, screening a possible unlogged word, adding same to a user input word dictionary, making a temporary record, and when the word input by the user is further recognized as a word in a network entry, adding the word input by the user to the user dictionary, and simultaneously deleting same from the user input word dictionary. A possible unlogged dictionary is added to a user dictionary by gradually recognizing the word input by the user level by level, so that the user dictionary is enriched; when the a sentence input by the user is segmented on the basis of the user dictionary, the word segmentation effect can be improved, and the intelligence level of the intelligent interaction system can be improved.

properties.title: Method and device for identifying unregistered word in intelligent interaction system
properties.summary: The invention discloses a method for identifying an unregistered word in an intelligent interaction system. The method comprises the steps that whether the length of a word input by a user is equal to 1 or equal to 4, whether the word input by the user is a word existing in a preset word segmentation dictionary or a user dictionary and whether the word input by the user is contained in a word in the word segmentation dictionary or the user dictionary are identified step by step, so that a possible unregistered word is found through screening and added to a user input dictionary to be used as a temporary record; when the word input by the user is identified as a word in a network entry, the word input by the user is added to the user dictionary, and the word is deleted from the user input dictionary. By the adoption of the method for identifying an unregistered word in the intelligent interaction system, by identifying the word input by the user step by step, the possible unregistered word is added into the user dictionary, the user dictionary is enriched, when it is needed that word segmentation is conducted on sentences input by the user based on the user dictionary, the word segmentation effect can be improved, and therefore the intelligent level of the intelligent interaction system is improved.

properties.title: AUTOMATED BUILDING ROUTE OF INFERENCE IN MIVAR'S KNOWLEDGE BASE
properties.summary: FIELD: computer engineering.SUBSTANCE: invention relates to control and computer equipment. Said result is achieved due to a knowledge base containing a domain model representation in the form of objects and connections organized as a oriented bipartite graph, herewith the objects contain parameters, while connections contain rules and each rule has an input variable and an output variable, and each associated with a rule parameter is its input or output variable. Set of known parameters is formed and unknown parameters are entered. Started simultaneously are several started rules, in which a known parameter is the input variable, for which all the other input variables are known, herewith the rule start is simulated by assigning the value   known   to the variables entered in this rule. If found are all the unknown parameters, the said processing is stopped and the task is considered to be solved, otherwise further search for a route of inference is performed. Built is a sequence of started rules in the order of their starting, herewith the built sequence of rules is the route of inference.EFFECT: technical result is reduction of time for building a route of inference.36 cl, 15 tbl, 9 dwg

properties.title: Entanglement in a pair of subjects whose contextualization of a proposition is tracked in a quantum representation
properties.summary: The present invention concerns methods and apparatus for determining the effects of a mutual interdependence or entanglement in pairs of subjects that jointly contextualize a proposition and are considered in a quantum representation. The subject pairs are selected based on contextualizations and measurable indications they exhibit modulo the proposition. Once selected, they are jointly exposed or confronted by the proposition such that both are aware that they are facing the proposition together and in accordance with certain additional rules that lead to the formation of joint subject states that are entangled. Quantum representation of entanglement between both F-D anti-consensus subjects and B-E consensus type subjects is achieved in accordance with the four canonical equations and consequent violation of the Bell inequality is encoded in subject interdependence thus established.

properties.title: Generating usage report in a question answering system based on question categorization
properties.summary: A mechanism is provided in a question answering system for generating a usage report based on question categorization. The mechanism clusters documents from a corpus of documents to form a nested structure of clusters of documents. The mechanism record questions answered by question answering system in a database in association with answers returned and answer confidence values. The mechanism maps the questions to the nested structure of clusters of documents to form a nested structure of clusters of questions. The mechanism generates a usage report based on the nested structure of clusters of questions and presenting the usage report responsive to a requesting user.

properties.title: METHOD FOR ORGANIZING SOCIAL MEDIA CONTENTS USING NLP/SEMANTIC  TECHNOLOGIES BASED ON USER PREFERENCE
properties.summary: ABSTRAC The present invention allows a social media user to block specific posts from a known user on a social media platform by  automatically classifying the specific posts using semantic/NLP technologies. The automatic classification is based on the post itself  even if it does not contain any explicit classification information like hashtag. The classification is mainly based on a continuously  evolving taxonomy and the user will be able to dynamically change their settings at a topic level or user level or a combination of  both.

properties.title: Categorizing Questions in a Question Answering System
properties.summary: A mechanism is provided in a question answering system for categorizing questions. The mechanism clusters documents from a corpus of documents to form a nested structure of clusters of documents. The mechanism records questions answered by question answering system in a database in association with answers returned and answer confidence values. The mechanism maps the questions to the nested structure of clusters of documents to form a nested structure of clusters of questions. The mechanism presents recommended questions based on the nested structure of clusters of questions in a user interface of the question answering system.

properties.title: Extracting and recommending business processes from evidence in natural language systems
properties.summary: A natural language question and answer system analyzes a question to determine key characteristics (such as focus and lexical answer type), and matches those characteristics to business processes from business process repositories. The matching business processes are ranked and at least one is presented as a recommended answer to the user. The system can offer the user a trigger to invoke the particular business process. The analysis includes examining a user profile to determine an attribute relevant to the question, and further includes named entity searching and fuzzy string matching against the business process repositories. Each business process in a repository is designated as either idempotent, non-binding or retrieve-only. The matching can include performing a factorial LDA algorithm on both extracted named entities and latent factors of the business processes in the repositories.

properties.title: DIGITAL-DATA MIXING APPARATUS AND DIGITAL-DATA PROCESSING SYSTEM
properties.summary: The invention is related to a digital-data mixing apparatus (2), a data processing system (1) and an associated method for mixing digital-data. The digital-data mixing apparatus comprises, integrated in a housing (7), input means (8) for receiving a plurality of bits (I1...In) of input digital data (4), electromagnetic emission means (9) for generating a modulated electromagnetic beam (15) wherein said input digital data (4) are converted in simultaneous modulations of the modulated electromagnetic beam (15), electromagnetic scattering means (10) for scattering the modulated electromagnetic beam (15) in a scattered electromagnetic beam (19), receiving means (11) for converting the scattered electromagnetic beam (19) in bits (O1...Om) of output digital data (5), and output means (12) for providing said output digital data (5).

properties.title: Wall Paneling Construction Smart Apparatus and System
properties.summary: The apparatus and system presented is a self contained Wall Paneling Construction Smart Apparatus that utilizes and requires a plurality of apparatus's to effectively perform the functions of transferring electricity, data and further providing a point where low energy electrical devices can plug into for charging, and use. The apparatus's presented as part of the system, are all together required to carry out the functions needed in the functioning of the presented system. The system principles carried out in the apparatus and system are for the purpose of making it easier to install directly in a safe way to alternative energy devices. The wall apparatus also provides microphones, cameras, and speakers and other components for other useful purposes with the apparatus in the system, such as identification of humans and objects, utilizing measurements and entertainment.

properties.title: Modifying a tokenizer based on pseudo data for natural language processing
properties.summary: Techniques for training a tokenizer (or word segmenter) are provided. In one technique, a tokenizer tokenizes a token string to identify individual tokens or words. A language model is generated based on the identified tokens or words. A vocabulary about an entity, such as a person or company, is identified. The vocabulary may be online data that refers to the entity, such as a news article or a profile page of a member of a social network. Some of the tokens in the vocabulary may be weighted higher than others. The language model accepts the weighted vocabulary as input and generates pseudo sentences. Alternatively, regular expressions are used to generate the pseudo sentences. The pseudo sentences are used to train the tokenizer.

properties.title: DISCOVERING AND USING INFORMATIVE LOOPING SIGNALS IN A PULSED NEURAL NETWORK HAVING TEMPORAL ENCODERS
properties.summary: Embodiments are directed to a computer network having pathways. The network includes a plurality of units configured to communicate through the pathways. The network is configured to identify informative looping signals in loops formed from a plurality of network pathways that connect a first one of the plurality of units to a second one of the plurality of units. The network is further configured to apply spike-timing dependent plasticity (STDP) dependent inhibitory gating to the plurality of network pathways. The network is further configured to phase shift open gates and close gates in the loop by applying STDP functions to open gate outputs and closed gates outputs. The network is further configured to make a rate and a direction of the phase shift dependent on a modulatory signal, wherein the modulatory signal is based at least in part on a change in the STDP inhibitory gating.

properties.title: Network risk assessment method and device
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of network risk assessment method and devices.Wherein the network risk assessment method includes: to receive specified starting attack node and terminate attack node；According to network attack map, obtain from the starting attack node to each attack path terminated attack node；According to the attack path, the crucial fragility in the attack path is obtained.Using method provided by the present application, pass through traverses network attack graph, it obtains specified starting attack node and terminates attack path of the attack node in network attack map, and analytical attack path, to extract crucial fragility, so that after network security personnel get crucial fragility, it only needs to solve these crucial fragility, it is just cut off from starting attack node to each attack path terminated attack node, to achieve the effect that mitigating network management personnel checks network risks workload.

properties.title: Network risk assessment method and network risk assessment device
properties.summary: The invention discloses a network risk assessment method and a network risk assessment device. The network risk assessment method comprises the steps of receiving a start attack node and an end attack node which are specified, getting the attack paths from the start attack node to the end attack node according to a network attack graph, and getting the key vulnerabilities of the attack paths according to the attack paths. According to the method of the invention, the network attack graph is traversed to get the attack paths from the specified start attack node to the specified end attack node in the network attack graph, the attack paths are analyzed to extract the key vulnerabilities, the attack paths from the start attack node to the end attack node can be all cut off as long as network security personnel gets and solves the key vulnerabilities, and therefore, the network risk inspection workload of network managers is reduced.

properties.title: METHODS AND SYSTEMS FOR EVALUATING USER
properties.summary: According to embodiments illustrated herein, there is provided a method and a mobile device for evaluating a user on a question. The method includes monitoring one or more inputs of the user, pertaining to at least one step performed for solving the question, by one or more sensors in a mobile device. While the user attempts the question, the one or more sensors also monitor one or more facial expressions of the user, which are analyzed using one or more image processing techniques. Thereafter, one or more processors in the mobile device determine if the at least one step is in accordance with a predefined set of rules deterministic of one or more correct steps involved in solving the question. Further, the one or more processors evaluate the user on the question based on the determination and the analysis of the one or more facial expressions.

properties.title: NET PROMOTER SCORE DETERMINATION
properties.summary: According to an example, NPS determination may include: receiving data from an internal data source and/or an external data source; determining a sentiment orientation of comments; scoring the sentiment orientation of the comments; classifying the comments that are above and below predetermined thresholds based on the scoring respectively as promoters and detractors for a training data set; utilizing hyper planes generated from the training data set to classify comments in another set of the data as promoters and detractors; and utilizing the classified comments from the training data set and the another set of the data to determine the NPS.

properties.title: Seamless across the Media open teaching experiment room of experience type digitlization multi-screen
properties.summary: Seamless across the Media open teaching experiment room of experience type digitlization multi-screen, integrates test, studies, analyzes；Tested in real teaching environment and data analysis；Under the support of multi-screen interactive technology, Laboratory Function subregion, operation support system, datamation system, experiment information acquisition system, audio frequency and video input-output equipment；Realize and get rid of screen function between a variety of mobile terminals；Datamation system includes server, database, educational resource cloud, ubiquitous tutoring system, study analysis assessment system, mobile device, across screen management module, recording and broadcasting system and internet；The studying space of across media multi-screen seamless interactions is provided, the technologies such as hologram, multi-screen interactive, study analysis is incorporated, realizes that physical space merges with the seamless of Virtual Space.Realize from Formal Learning to Informal Learning, a variety of modes of learning, cross-terminal across the seamless fusion of the support technologies such as media, good learning experience is provided for learner.

properties.title: UNIQUE ITEM COUNT FROM MONOCULAR VIDEOS
properties.summary: Systems, methods, and devices relating to computer vision-based counting of individuals in a crowd. A first video frame is used to define a region of interest. The number of people in the region of interest is estimated. A second or subsequent video frame is then Used to adjust the boundaries of the region of interest. This is done by tracking the pixels of the boundary of the region of interest. The number of people entering and leaving the region of interest between the first and second video frames can then be determined by estimating the number of people within either a union or an intersection of the original region of interest and the adjusted region of interest.

properties.title: System And Method For Real-Time Analysis And Guidance Of Learning
properties.summary: The present disclosure features systems and methods for analyzing student learning and calibrating the difficulty of questions on a test or examination. In one embodiment, a method for analyzing the learning of a student includes administering, by an assessment agent, a task to a student, the task comprising a question having an associated difficulty. The assessment agent receives a response to the question from the student and evaluates the response to generate an observable, the observable comprising information related to the response. A posterior determination of the student's ability is then calculated by incorporating the observable into an ability model associated with the student, and the posterior determination of ability may be compared with the difficulty of the question, a skill acquisition probability, or other measure. The student's response, or a plurality of responses from students within a cohort, may be used to determine the difficulty of each question.

properties.title: Method and vectoring controller for controlling joint signal processing
properties.summary: A method for controlling joint signal processing of signals to be transmitted respectively from transmitters to receivers via a group of vectoring lines subject to pre-determined transmitted signal power requirements; comprising: obtaining estimated expected crosstalk over said group of vectoring lines; determining an initial precoding matrix P0 for adapting said signals to pre-compensate said estimated expected crosstalk; obtaining re-estimated expected crosstalk over said group of vectoring lines after a disturbance event; determining a new precoding matrix P1 for pre-compensating said re-estimated expected crosstalk; determining at least one intermediate precoding matrix P' for gradually replacing P0 with P1, each intermediate precoding matrix P' based on at least a part of P0 and at least a part of P1; and determining at least one gain scaling matrix S for gain scaling said signals, based on said at least one precoding matrix P', in compliance with said pre-determined transmitted signal power requirements. A corresponding apparatus and a computer program are also disclosed. [EP3048742A1]

properties.title: A kind of models for resources and environment base construction method
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of models for resources and environment base construction methods, pass through establishing model principle, the algorithm that designs a model, Definition Model interface, compiling model component, the executable call unit of compiling model, the parameter library for establishing model, model storage, solves the problems such as data sharing, model solution of models for resources and environment, model base management system follows two basic principles of modularization and standardization.The present invention expresses models for resources and environment using object-oriented method, realizes the encapsulation and reuse of model class；Using the mathematic(al) representation of models for resources and environment library engine analytic modell analytical model example, model definition may be implemented and detached with model solution, reduce the redundancy of model class；Model instance is handled using models for resources and environment library engine, the fully-integrated of models for resources and environment and GIS is realized, improves model instance treatment effeciency；Using data base administration model class and model application data, model metadata object is established, the Web for being conducive to the application of model class is shared.

properties.title: Construction method of resource environment model base
properties.summary: The invention discloses a construction method of a resource environment model base, solving the problems of the resource environment model base such as data sharing, model solution and so on through establishing a model principle, designing a model algorithm, defining a model interface, composing a model module, composing the executable invoking unit of a model, building the parameter base of the model and storing the model in a base. A model base managing system complies with two basic principles of modularization and standardization. The invention uses object-oriented method to express the resource environment model so as to realize package and reusing of the model class, uses a resource environment model engine to analyze the mathematical expression of a model example so as to realize separation of model definition and model solution and reduce the redundancy of the model class, uses the resource environment model engine to process the model example so as to realize complete integration of the resource environment model and GIS (generalized information system) and improve the processing efficiency of the model example, and uses a database managing model class and model application data to build a model metadata object so as to be beneficial for Web sharing of the model class application.

properties.title: Regional resource environmental data sharing and comprehensive service platform
properties.summary: The invention discloses a regional resource environmental data sharing and comprehensive service platform. A data resource layer, a business logic layer, a Web service layer and a Web layer are arranged. The problems that applicability conditions cannot meet requirements of modern social resource environment administrative decisions to resource environmental mathematic models and structures are complex gradually are solved; the sharing and comprehensive service platform has compatibility of isomerous integration, realizes deployment and operation of a trans-department and cross-operating system, and ensures sharing and application of a plurality of metadata standards under a platform, so as to meet requirements of intersection of multidisciplinary data resources; besides, the sharing and comprehensive service platform is simple in structure, and convenient to operate, and injects novel vitality into development of resource environmental system modeling.

properties.title: Method for discovering treatment relation between single medicine and disease based on term vector
properties.summary: The invention discloses a method for discovering a treatment relation between single medicine and disease based on the term vector. The method includes first selecting a training set. 8980 medicines in the book Chinese Materia Medica are utilized as the main body of the treatment relation, the major functions of the medicines are described to extract the concept of the diseases as the object of the treatment relation, and a three-element group of 'medicine, treatment and disease' is formed. The Word2Vec tool published by Google is adopted as the term vector training tool, the resources from the encyclopedia of Baidu are utilized as the training corpus, and finally the term vector obtained by training is utilized to train the required model through SVM training. The model can judge whether the medicine and the disease has the treatment relation by inputting the single medicine and the disease.

properties.title: The method of large-scale text categorization
properties.summary: The method of large-scale text categorization is related to computer realm, and the extensive study of precision is taken into account, it is necessary to be realized by building multiple graders with maximum difference and realizing the efficient Integrated Decisions of multiple graders to realize.The method of the large-scale text categorization includes：Text data is converted into vector data, segmentation large scale text data integrates as subset；The method calculated in a distributed manner uses trained sub-classifier；Selection sort device；Classify to sample to be tested, realize multi-categorizer Shared Decision Making.Integrated study frame application in existing sorting technique on large-scale text categorization, can be made to be suitable for large-scale text categorization, is improved classification effectiveness by the present invention.

properties.title: Large-scale text classifying method
properties.summary: The invention discloses a large-scale text classifying method and relates to the field of computers. In order to implement large-scale learning with attention to accuracy, a plurality of classifiers with maximum difference and the efficient integration decision of the classifiers are needed to be built. The large-scale text classifying method comprises the following steps of converting text data into vector data and dividing a large-scale text dataset into subsets; training sub-classifiers by using the subsets through a distributed computation method; selecting classifiers; classifying to-be-tested samples and implementing co-decision of the plurality of classifiers. According to the large-scale text classifying method, an integrated learning framework is applied to the large-scale text classification, so that the existing classification method is applicable to the large-scale text classification; the classification efficiency is improved.

properties.title: High-dimensional data feature selecting method
properties.summary: The invention relates to a high-dimensional data feature selecting method. The method comprises the steps that a question optimizing model is established; continuous conversion is carried out on the question optimizing model, and a high-dimensional feature selection model is obtained; a question optimal integral solution is obtained through a cooperative type collaboration particle cluster evolving method, and the high-dimensional data feature selection of the high-dimensional feature selection model is achieved according to the question optimal integral solution. According to the technical scheme, the high-dimensional feature selection question is converted into a plurality of low-dimensional sub-optimization questions through the variable segmentation concept, a plurality of sub-particle clusters are applied to carry out collaboration optimization at the same time, the diversity of the particle cluster is improved, the algorithm search speed is obviously improved, and an effective solving idea is provided for the high-dimensional feature selection question. With the development of the computer scientific technology, the technical scheme can be applied to the audio data field, video data field and other fields where mass high-dimensional data of various types can be touched frequently.

properties.title: STANDARDIZING ATTRIBUTES AND ENTITIES IN A SOCIAL NETWORKING SYSTEM
properties.summary: A system extracts data from profiles on a social networking system. The system writes the data to a database when the data exceeds a first threshold. The system then determines a degree of similarity between the data and other similar data, and writes the data and a first portion of the other similar data to the database when the degree of similarity between the data and the first portion of the other similar data exceeds a second threshold. The system then receives into the computer processor input from a plurality of users. The input relates to an agreement or disagreement regarding the degree of similarity between the data and the first portion of the other similar data. The system writes the data and a second portion of the other similar data to the database as a function of the agreement or disagreement of the plurality of users.

properties.title: Meosk/Weosk-Based Private and Social Media Management And Communication System Network
properties.summary: An Internet-based private and social media management and communication system network supporting the creation and deployment of activity-specific meosk structures, and activity-specific weosk structures deployed on the system network, supported on the display screens of client systems, and linked to the specific activities of system users, allowing users pursuit their interests and activities, while brand marketers are invited to provide their support to such consumer interests, activities and pursuits.

properties.title: Method for Recommending Content to Ingest as Corpora Based on Interaction History in Natural Language Question and Answering Systems
properties.summary: An approach is provided for generating actionable content ingestion recommendations based on an interaction history that is mined to extract interaction context parameters from questions and answer results that meet specified answer deficiency criteria by searching one or more content sources using the extracted interaction context parameters to identify new content that is relevant to improving the first answer, and then presenting the new content in an actionable content ingestion recommendation list for display and review by a domain expert, where the actionable content ingestion recommendation fist recommends the new content for ingestion in a knowledge base corpus.

properties.title: Corpus augmentation system
properties.summary: An approach is provided for automatically ingesting additional corpus based on an interaction history that is mined to identify a question that meets specified answer deficiency criteria, and then generate a second question which is correlated to the first question by requesting additional answer information for answering the first question, where the second question is posted to a forum using a selected persona so that forum responses can be monitored and ingested as additional content in the knowledge base.

properties.title: Box, container, container, trunk, drawer, automated logistics terminal, procurement, storage, distribution and delivery of storage, with climate control systems, refrigerator, freezer, climate control and protective measures, security and telematics (Machine-translation by Google Translate, not legally binding)
properties.summary: Box, container, container, trunk, drawer, automated logistics terminal, procurement, storage, distribution and delivery of storage, with climate control systems, refrigerator, freezer, climate control and protective measures, security and telematics, characterized because it presents: - a structure with a special nanotechnological fabric with physical protection properties with at least one non-woven layer comprising short para-aramid fibers, nano-textiles, polymers. - a main body endowed with a modular furniture of several sections of storage, warehouses of goods, purchases, acquisitions, returns, parcel returns, courier, postcards, type mailboxes, boxes. - a housing with control system for opening, closing, storage, control of use of the storage area, protection, location, deposit of goods, parcel service. With sensors, analyzers, controllers. - some sections, zones, capsules, sectors, divisions, with temperature controller, positive and negative, refrigerated, freezers, document identifiers, cashier, with security controls. - an operating system equipped with computer software systems and high security algorithmic encryption means, telematic means, communication, operation, broadcast, reception, retransmission, verification, validation and control. - own and/or alternative frequencies, via satellite, via analog, digital, gps, gms. - some microprocessors for the control and operation of the opening and closing system. - communication systems by cables, analogue, digital, wifi, gms, gps, satellite systems integrated into operating systems encrypted codes for operability. - a protective screen for packet slogans, intended to be placed in front of the front of a visual/sound/touch screen, cashier covering the entire screen of it. (Machine-translation by Google Translate, not legally binding)

properties.title: Automatic pipe penetration method and device
properties.summary: The invention discloses an automatic pipe penetration method. The automatic pipe penetration method is characterized by including following steps: (1) arranging a work portion; (2) arranging an automatic pipe installation and fetching device based on machine vision positioning; (3) arranging an automatic line transportation device; (4) arranging an automatic control device; (5) using the automatic control device to control a transmission device to send a hose clamp out, wherein the automatic pipe installation and fetching device places a hose in a hose groove of the hose clamp, and after the fact that the hose is completely placed in the hose groove is detected, the transmission device sends the hose clamp to an initial position, and aligns an opening of the hose to the position of a line outlet of the automatic line transportation device, and furthermore after alignment work is completed, the automatic line transportation device is triggered to work, a line is transported out, and passes through the hose placed in the hose clamp, and the automatic pipe installation and fetching device does not move. The invention further discloses an automatic pipe penetration device which implements the automatic pipe penetration method.

properties.title: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR SPONSORED SEARCH AD MATCHING
properties.summary: Systems and methods for building a search index for query recommendation and ad matching are disclosed. The system accesses a query-URL graph and extracts a subgraph related to an ad campaign. The subgraph is annotated according to desired criteria. The sub graph is reversed and the reversed annotated subgraph is ranked to find nodes of importance. The nodes of importance are then used to build a preference vector which is used to find a stationary distribution of the sub graph. A plurality of random walks of the sub graph is performed to build a corpus of words. The corpus of words are input into a language model to learn associations, from which the top query terms associated with an ad campaign are found and indexed. The index is then inverted for recommending ads for received query terms.

properties.title: Spoken language pronunciation evaluating method based on deep neural network posterior probability algorithm
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of spoken language pronunciation evaluating method based on deep neural network posterior probability algorithm, including：Step one：Voice is extracted as audio feature vector sequence by frame；Step 2：Audio frequency characteristics are inputted into the good model and oral evaluation text, respective word Pronounceable dictionary of precondition, the time boundary of phoneme state is determined, the model is DNN+HMM models；Step 3：It is determined that after time boundary, all frames in extraction time border, average by the frame length of speech frame, are used as the posterior probability of the phoneme state, and obtain being based on the posterior word posteriority score of phoneme state, the posteriority score of word is then the average value of the phoneme state posteriority score contained by it.

properties.title: METHOD FOR LEARNING TASK SKILL AND ROBOT USING THEREOF
properties.summary: Disclosed are a method for learning a task skill by determining important action of robot action and a robot using the same. The disclosed method for learning a task sill comprises the following steps of: receiving learning data having robot action with respect to a task; generating an important value of the robot action in accordance with time flow by using movement of a robot in accordance with the learning data; separating the robot action to at least one unit action by using the important value; and determining important unit action of the unit action by comparing an important value with respect to each of the unit action with a threshold value.

properties.title: USE OF STATISTICAL FLOW DATA FOR MACHINE TRANSLATIONS BETWEEN DIFFERENT LANGUAGES
properties.summary: In a flow of computer actions, a computer system (110) receives a request involving a machine translation. In performing the translation (160, 238), or in using the translation in subsequent computer operations (242, 1110), the computer system takes into account known statistical relationships (310), obtained from previously accumulated click-through data (180), between a machine translation performed in a flow, the flow's portions preceding the translation, and success indicators pertaining to the flow's portion following the translation. The statistical relationships are derived by data mining of the click-through data. Further, normal actions can be suspended to use a random option to accumulate the click-through data and/or perform statistical AB testing. Other features are also provided.

properties.title: The extracting method and device of Webpage information
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of extracting method and device of Webpage information.Wherein, the extracting method of Webpage information includes：Obtain the HTML HTML code of multiple Webpages to be extracted；Multiple Webpages to be extracted are clustered according to HTML code, obtain multiple belonging kinds；The object block element in each belonging kinds is extracted, wherein, object block element is the shared block element of the different Webpages to be extracted in same belonging kinds；The text in object block element is extracted, obtains the text collection of object block element；The desired value of text collection is calculated, wherein, desired value is used for the difference degree for representing the text in text collection；The text that desired value is more than in the text collection of the first predetermined threshold value is extracted, obtains Webpage information.By the present invention, solve the low problem of the info web extraction degree of accuracy in the prior art, and then improve the effect of info web extraction accuracy.

properties.title: Method for safety evaluation of monitoring information of in-service bridge
properties.summary: The invention discloses a method for safety evaluation of monitoring information of an in-service bridge. The method comprises the following steps: analyzing the internal linkage between a structural response signal and state evolution of a bridge structure, excavating essential connotation of the monitoring information of the bridge, and constructing the time sequence of the monitoring information of the bridge; establishing an echo state network bridge monitoring information characteristic model as a bridge structure state characteristic system; constructing damage sensitive indexes of the bridge structure and obtaining critical parameters of damage evolution; constructing a bridge state evolution mode; performing safety evaluation on the bridge. According to the method disclosed by the invention, by integrating information science, data mining, mode identification and other disciplinary knowledge, intersection and integration of multiple disciplines are realized, beneficial explosion and technical support are provided for further improving the application quality of a bridge health monitoring system and widening the research direction of state evaluation of the bridge.

properties.title: SYSTEMS, COMPUTER MEDIA, AND METHODS FOR USING ELECTROMAGNETIC FREQUENCY (EMF) IDENTIFICATION (ID) DEVICES FOR MONITORING, COLLECTION, ANALYSIS, USE AND TRACKING OF PERSONAL, MEDICAL, TRANSACTION, AND LOCATION DATA FOR ONE OR MORE INDIVIDUALS
properties.summary: Methods, apparatus, non-transitory computer readable storage medium, computer systems, networks, and/or systems using a wireless device for detection and tracking of user's data that uses electromagnetic frequency (EMF) identification (EMFID) technologies to provide data transfer and communications for EMFID sensors for automatic identification data collection of personal data for one or more individuals or end user, multiple EMFID tag interactions, remotely storing, monitoring and retrieving data and location data, physical, emotional and mental state data, integration of biometric data, healthcare, physical health conditions, medical conditions, diseases and conditions for disease control and prevention, pharmaceutical data and other data to develop a profile for one or more individuals, using radio and other frequency tags and relaying data from EMFID tag interactions to a database that can be accessed by members of a network, wherein predictive analytics are used for one or more individuals analysis, marketing. monitoring, behavior, diagnosis and promotions, of interest, of medical care, drugs, products, illegal activity, or other services, of interest, of past, present or future customers, users, targets and/or target markets.

properties.title: Virtual machine scheduling method based on combination optimization
properties.summary: The invention discloses a virtual machine scheduling method based on combination optimization. The method can be used for real-time virtual machine scheduling decisions in a virtual cluster, the starting positions of virtual machines can be decided in real time according to the current resource utilization conditions of the virtual cluster so that the number of occupied physical hosts can be minimum; in this way, the resource utilization rate can be increased, and meanwhile energy consumption can be lowered. According to the virtual machine scheduling method, simple mathematical calculation is adopted, a scheduling result can be obtained within limited comparison frequency, and the comparison frequency is related to the type of the virtual machines and the type of the physical hosts. Compared with an artificial intelligence algorithm adopted in the process of traditionally solving a combination optimization problem, the virtual machine scheduling method has high real-time performance and can decide the positions where the virtual machines are placed in real time and meet the requirement for high real-time performance of a virtual machine scheduling system.

properties.title: A method of providing a learning-based diagnostic support model for at least one diagnostic system
properties.summary: The invention relates to a method for providing a learning-based diagnostic support model (DM) for at least one diagnostic system (D) and an associated cloud system (C). The method comprises the following method steps: a) providing person-specific diagnostic and / or imaging parameters to the at least one diagnostic system and b) checking whether a correction of the same is necessary, c) providing feedback data (F) which is such a correction Represent diagnostic and / or imaging parameters, if such a correction is necessary, d) and store them in a network accessible central cloud system (C), e) specify training data from the feedback data, f) generate a new and / or fit g) providing the generated and / or adapted diagnostic support model for the at least one diagnostic system.

properties.title: Fuzzy recognizer
properties.summary: The utility model provides a fuzzy recognizer which comprises a template matching array, a matching degree ranking unit and an address encoder, wherein the template matching array comprises N-row characteristic matching units for storing N templates, and N is a positive integer. Each characteristic matching unit comprises a memory cell and a matching unit, and the matching degree ranking unit is connected to the address encoder through N signal lines and sequentially outputs characteristic level signals to corresponding signal lines according to the voltage magnitude of matching lines in template matching array in a matching period. The address encoder outputs the corresponding storage address of the signal line, when the signal line outputs the characteristic level signal. The fuzzy recognizer combines memory, matching, summing and result ranking of integral membership level, and optimizes operation time and operation area of fuzzy identification.

properties.title: Fuzzy recognizer and method for similarity intelligent Matching
properties.summary: The invention provides a kind of fuzzy recognizer and method for similarity intelligent Matching, the fuzzy recognizer includes comprehensive membership function generator array, matching degree sequencing unit and address scrambler, wherein：Comprehensive membership function generator array includes the N row membership function generator units for being used to store N number of template, and N is positive integer；Each membership function generator unit includes memory cell and matching unit；Matching degree sequencing unit is connected to address scrambler by N root signal wires, and for matching the size of line voltage successively to corresponding signal wire output characteristic level signal according in comprehensive membership function generator array within the matching cycle；The address scrambler is used to export the corresponding storage address of the signal wire when signal wire exports the feature level signal.The storage of Comprehensis pertaining, matching, summation and sort result are combined together by the present invention, so as to optimize operating time and the operations area of fuzzy diagnosis.

properties.title: Providing customer service agents with customer-personalized result of spoken language intent
properties.summary: A system in which a customer service agent (CSA) is able to assist a customer with obtaining a desired response from a speech-controlled appliance while protecting customer data. The customer service agent submits queries to a natural language understanding (NLU) processor that performs entity resolution using personalized library information stored in an entity library based on the customer identity information and/or an device identifier. The CSA is shielded from the entity library itself, as well as data stored on the speech-controlled appliance. The CSA can instruct the NLU processor to deliver results to multiple endpoints, including both the customer's appliance and the CSA agent's console.

properties.title: Parallelizing semantically split documents for processing
properties.summary: In an approach for parallelizing document processing in an information handling system, a processor receives a document, wherein the document includes text content. A processor extracts information from the text content, utilizing natural language processing and semantic analysis, to form tokenized semantic partitions, comprising a plurality of sub-documents. A processor schedules a plurality of concurrently executing threads to process the plurality of sub-documents.

properties.title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR THE INDEXING AND RETRIEVAL OF SEMANTICALLY ANNOTATED DATA USING AN ONTOLOGY-BASED INFORMATION RETRIEVAL MODEL
properties.summary: System and method for the indexing and retrieval of semantically annotated information units from a collection of semantically annotated indexed information units in response to a query using an ontology-based IR model. The retrieval method comprises: receiving a semantically annotated query with semantic annotations to individuals or classes within a determined populated base ontology; embedding, as a set of weighted-mentions to individuals or classes within the populated base ontology, the semantically annotated query in a semantic representation space of an ontology-based metric space IR model; obtaining the representation in the semantic representation space for every indexed information unit; computing the Hausdorff distance between the space representation of the query and the space representation of all the indexed information units of the collection; retrieving and ranking, the relevant information units based on the computed Hausdorff distance.

properties.title: Diagnosing autism spectrum disorder using natural language processing
properties.summary: Embodiments herein include a natural language computing system that provides a diagnosis for a participant in the conversation which indicates the likelihood that the participant exhibited a symptom of autism. To provide the diagnosis, the computing system includes a diagnosis system that performs a training process to generate a machine learning model which is then used to evaluate a textual representation of the conversation. For example, the diagnosis system may receive one or more examples of baseline conversations that exhibit symptoms of autisms and those that do not. The diagnosis system may annotate and the baseline conversations and identify features that are used to identify the symptoms of autism. The system generates a machine learning model that weights the features according to whether the identified features are, or are not, an indicator of autism.

properties.title: Coaching a participant in a conversation
properties.summary: Embodiments herein include a NLP application used to coach a participant who violates a social norm during a conversation. For example, the NLP application can evaluate the textual representation of the conversation to determine if the participant is exhibiting a characteristic of autism or other medical disorder which violates a social norm, and if so, inform the participant. Once a characteristic of autism is identified, a coaching application may output text that informs the participant what particular characteristic he is exhibiting—e.g., the participant is ignoring an attempt by another participant to change the topic of the conversation. In addition to providing notice, in one embodiment, the coaching application suggests a corrective action to the participant. For example, if the participant fails to provide an appropriate response to an emotional statement, the coaching action may suggest a sympathetic statement.

properties.title: SEMAFORGICAL CONTROL DEVICE USING DIFFERENT LOGIC EMBARKED
properties.summary: None

properties.title: Managing a task
properties.summary: It is provided a computer-implemented method for managing a task having a start datum and an end datum. The method comprises the step of providing (S10) specifications of the task, the specifications including a start range indicative of possible values for the start datum, an end range indicative of possible values for the end datum, and a schedule of the task, the schedule of the task including a scheduled start value for the start datum that belongs to the start range and a scheduled end value for the end datum that belongs to the end range. The method also comprises the step of displaying, (S20) on a timeline, bar charts representative of specifications of the task, including at least a bar chart representative of the schedule of the task.  Such a method improves the management of a task.

properties.title: The illegal electricity consumption behavior distributed detection system of intelligent grid
