properties.summary: Software that extracts contextually relevant terms from a text sample (or corpus) by performing the following steps: (i) identifying a first term from a corpus, based, at least in part, on a set of initial contextual characteristic(s), where each initial contextual characteristic of the set of initial contextual characteristic(s) relates to the contextual use of at least one category related term of a set of category related term(s) in the corpus; (ii) adding the first term to the set of category related term(s), thereby creating a revised set of category related term(s) and a set of first term contextual characteristic(s), where each first term contextual characteristic of the set of first term contextual characteristic(s) relates to the contextual use of the first term in the corpus; and (iii) identifying a second term from the corpus, based, at least in part, on the set of first term contextual characteristic(s).

properties.title: Membership function generator unit, membership function generator array and fuzzy recognizer
properties.summary: The utility model relates to a membership function generator unit, a membership function generator array and a fuzzy recognizer. The membership function generator unit comprises a storage unit and a matching unit. The storage unit is connected with a write control line and a bit line pair. The matching unit comprises a comparison unit and a voltage control switch. The comparison unit is connected to the storage unit and connected with a search line pair, and compares data stored by the storage unit and data input by the search line pair. The voltage control switch is connected to the comparison unit and connected with a matching line, and makes the matching line discharge or cut off according to a comparison result of the comparison unit. The storage, matching and summation of the comprehensive membership degree are combined, so that the operation time and operation area of fuzzy recognition are optimized, application in pattern recognition and artificial intelligence is facilitated, the time required for matching is less, and real-time processing and application are convenient.

properties.title: Comprehensive membership function generator array and fuzzy recognizer
properties.summary: The present invention is about a kind of membership function generator unit, array and fuzzy recognizer.The membership function generator unit includes storage unit and matching unit.Storage unit stores a Q-character of a fuzzy characteristics of mode standard, matching unit includes comparing unit and voltage controlled switch, which is compared this feature position that storage unit stores with by a Q-character of the scounting line to the mode to be identified of input；The voltage controlled switch does not form discharge channel when comparison result is matching, keeps the original levels of matched line；Discharge channel is formed when comparison result is to mismatch, matched line is made to discharge.After obtaining the comparison result of all Q-characters of mode and mode standard to be identified, it can sum and ask big operation to obtain the storage address with the fuzzy characteristics of the highest mode standard of matching degree of the characteristic value of mode to be identified by Comprehensis pertaining, to realize fuzzy diagnosis.The present invention has the advantages that optimize operating time and operations area.

properties.title: Cloud based video detection and tracking system
properties.summary: A method for detecting and tracking multiple moving targets from airborne video within the framework of a cloud computing infrastructure. The invention simultaneously utilizes information from an optical flow generator and an active-learning histogram matcher in a complimentary manner so as to rule out erroneous data that may otherwise, separately, yield false target information. The invention utilizes user-based voice-to-text color feature description for track matching with hue features from image pixels.

properties.title: Distributing reduction algorithm of object incremental target information system
properties.summary: The invention discloses a distributing reduction algorithm of an object incremental target information system. When a data set is increased in reduction obtained by virtue of a matrix, some matrix elements related to newly-added data in the matrix are dynamically updated, so that a thought of obtaining a new reduction result is obtained, and a maximum distributing reduction algorithm of an incremental inconsistent information system is designed based on the maximum distributing reduction algorithm through researching with division in a domain of discourse as a bridge and constructing relationship between the newly-added data and the division as well as influence of a division change on a maximum distributed coordination set. The distributing reduction algorithm has the beneficial effect that the distributed coordination set can be quickly updated, so that the distributing reduction is derived.

properties.title: Small-sized mammalian（Muroid）Intelligent identifying system
properties.summary: The present invention relates to a kind of small-sized mammalians（Muroid）Intelligent identifying system, including image automated collection systems, digital image recognition system and real-time data transmission system, after the image of acquisition is stored in memory module by described image automated collection systems by style of shooting, again by the communication module of described image automated collection systems by network transmission system real-time Transmission to computer server terminal, then matching is identified to acquired image by described image intelligent identifying system, automatically capture small-sized mammalian (muroid) is classified, exports result.The system of the present invention provides real-time, dynamic precision data for bandicoot monitoring and plague of rats prevention and control system, and it fundamentally changes small-sized mammalian field Ecological Investigation Direct Acquisition, manually recognize, the traditional approach of differential counting, and then save and put into huge human and material resources, financial resources, more improve the accuracy of survey data.

properties.title: Intelligent recognition system for small mammals (rats)
properties.summary: The invention relates to an intelligent recognition system for small mammals (rats). The system comprises an automatic image acquisition system, an intelligent image recognition system and a real-time data transmission system, wherein after the automatic image acquisition system stores acquired images in a shooting mode in a storage module, the images are transmitted in real time to a computer server terminal via a network transmission system by a communication module of the automatic image acquisition system, the acquired images are recognized and matched via the intelligent image recognition system, captured small mammals (rats) are automatically sorted, and results are outputted. The system of the invention provides real-time and dynamic accurate data for a rat monitoring and rat harm prevention and control system, the traditional mode of direct capturing, manual recognition and classification and counting for a field ecological survey on the small mammals can be basically changed, invested huge manpower, material resources, and financial resources are further saved, and accuracy of survey data is further improved.

properties.title: Interesting learning-assisted method technology for ball games
properties.summary: An interesting learning-assisted method technology for ball games is that sport entertainment interest is used for motivating knowledge learning, people are made to learn knowledge in the interests, the interest of knowledge learning is established, the phenomenon that people are weary of learning in the knowledge learning process is avoided, and people can learn knowledge actively.

properties.title: Method for preserving conceptual distance within unstructured documents
properties.summary: A method, system and computer-usable medium are disclosed for preserving conceptual distance within unstructured documents by characterizing conceptual relationships. Natural language processing is applied to content in a plurality of documents to identify topics and subjects. Analytic analysis is then applied to the identified topics and subjects to identify concepts. The content in each of the plurality of documents is partitioned into a first structured hierarchy, preserving at least one structure in each document inherent in the each document. Access is then provided to the content through a first index based upon utilizing the first structured hierarchy and through a second index utilizing a second structured hierarchy. The conceptual relationship criteria are based upon a directed graph with weights based upon a similarity and a distance based upon concepts.

properties.title: Preserving conceptual distance within unstructured documents
properties.summary: A method, system and computer-usable medium are disclosed for preserving conceptual distance within unstructured documents by characterizing conceptual relationships. Natural language processing is applied to content in a plurality of documents to identify topics and subjects. Analytic analysis is then applied to the identified topics and subjects to identify concepts. The content in each of the plurality of documents is partitioned into a first structured hierarchy, preserving at least one structure in each document inherent in the each document. Access is then provided to the content through a first index based upon utilizing the first structured hierarchy and through a second index utilizing a second structured hierarchy. The conceptual relationship criteria are based upon a directed graph with weights based upon a similarity and a distance based upon concepts.

properties.title: ENERGY EFFICIENT UNICODE READER DESIGN ON FPGA
properties.summary: In the present invention, the inventors have integrated the expertise of electronics researcher and natural language processing  researcher in order to develop faster, low cost, low power and secure hardware based Unicode reader design for 22 languages of  eighth schedule of constitution of India. In order to make the processing faster, core electronics techniques like clock dedicated route,  directed routing, area group compression, mapping, finite state machine, controlling skew, jitter and delay for high performance  Unicode reader design are used. In order to make them energy efficient, core electronics techniques like clock gating, capacitance  scaling, voltage scaling, thermal scaling, IO standard, impedance matching, mobile DDR I/O standard, HSTL I/O Standard, DCI,  SSTL and LVCMOS for energy efficient Unicode reader design are being used.

properties.title: Natural language processing utilizing transaction based knowledge representation
properties.summary: Mechanisms are provided for processing logical relationships in natural language content. A logical parse of a first parse of the natural language content is generated by identifying latent logical terms within the first parse indicative of logical relationships between elements of the natural language content. The logical parse comprises nodes and edges linking nodes. At least one knowledge value is associated with each node in the logical parse. The at least one knowledge value associated with at least a subset of the nodes in the logical parse is propagated to one or more other nodes in the logical parse based on propagation rules. The propagating of the at least one knowledge value generates transaction records in a transaction knowledgebase data structure. A reasoning operation is executed based on the transaction knowledgebase data structure.

properties.title: Natural language processing utilizing logical tree structures
properties.summary: Mechanisms are provided for processing logical relationships in natural language content. Natural language content is received, upon which a reasoning operation is to be performed. A first parse representation of the natural language content is generated, by a parser, by performing natural language processing on the natural language content. A logical parse of the first parse is generated by identifying latent logical operators within the first parse indicative of logical relationships between elements of the natural language content. A reasoning operation on the logical parse is executed to generate a knowledge output indicative of knowledge associated with one or more of the logical relationships between elements of the natural language content.

properties.title: Natural language processing utilizing propagation of knowledge through logical parse tree structures
properties.summary: Mechanisms are provided for processing logical relationships in natural language content. A logical parse of a first parse of a natural language content is generated by identifying latent logical operators within the first parse indicative of logical relationships between elements of the natural language content. The logical parse comprises nodes and edges linking nodes. At least one knowledge value is associated with each node in the logical parse. The at least one knowledge value of at least a subset of the nodes in the logical parse is propagated to one or more other nodes in the logical parse based on propagation rules. A reasoning operation is performed on the logical parse to generate a knowledge output indicative of knowledge associated with one or more of the logical relationships between elements of the natural language content.

properties.title: Information handling system and computer program product for dynamically assigning question priority based on question extraction and domain dictionary
properties.summary: An approach is provided dynamically prioritizing question requests based on extracted question data. In the approach, performed by an information handling system, a number of question requests to a question and answering (QA) system are received from a computer network, and a plurality of question priority parameters are identified, including one or more question topics and a plurality question context parameters, by performing natural language processing (NLP) analysis of each question request. The approach determines a target priority value for each question request based on the plurality of question priority parameters identified for said question request. By evaluating the target priority values for the plurality of question requests, processing of the question requests is prioritized by applying an artificial intelligence (AI) learned models and rule-based logic at the information handling system to evaluate the target priority values for the plurality of question requests.

properties.title: INFORMATION HANDLING SYSTEM AND COMPUTER PROGRAM PRODUCT FOR DYNAMCALLY ASSIGNING QUESTION PRIORITY BASED ON QUESTION EXTRACTION AND DOMAIN DICTIONARY
properties.summary: An approach is provided dynamically prioritizing question requests based on extracted question data. In the approach, performed by an information handling system, a number of question requests to a question and answering (QA) system are received from a computer network, and a plurality of question priority parameters are identified, including one or more question topics and a plurality question context parameters, by performing natural language processing (NLP) analysis of each question request. The approach determines a target priority value for each question request based on the plurality of question priority parameters identified for said question request. By evaluating the target priority values for the plurality of question requests, processing of the question requests is prioritized, such as by applying an artificial intelligence (AI) learned models and rule-based logic at the information handling system to evaluate the target priority values for the plurality of question requests.

properties.title: Method for Dynamically Assigning Question Priority Based on Question Extraction and Domain Dictionary
properties.summary: An approach is provided dynamically prioritizing question requests based on extracted question data. In the approach, performed by an information handling system, a number of question requests to a question and answering (QA) system are received from a computer network, and a plurality of question priority parameters are identified, including one or more question topics and a plurality question context parameters, by performing natural language processing (NLP) analysis of each question request. The approach determines a target priority value for each question request based on the plurality of question priority parameters identified for said question request. By evaluating the target priority values for the plurality of question requests, processing of the question requests is prioritized, such as by applying an artificial intelligence (AI) learned models and rule-based logic at the information handling system to evaluate the target priority values for the plurality of question requests.

properties.title: LEVELING IO
properties.summary: A method, system, and computer program product for IO leveling comprising receiving an IO, determining if there is a delay for processing IO because of pending IO, based on a positive determination there is a delay for processing IO, determining a priority for the IO, and based on the priority of IO determining whether to process the IO.

properties.title: AUTONOMOUS MOBILE ROBOT AND VITAL SIGN MONITORING METHOD
properties.summary: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an autonomous mobile robot for enabling an autonomous mobile type non-contact vital sign monitoring system, and a vital sign monitoring method.SOLUTION: An autonomous mobile robot includes: an image data acquisition device; a vital sign data acquisition device; a mapping data acquisition device; an information processing device connected to the image data acquisition device, the vital sign data acquisition device, and the mapping data acquisition device to process image data acquired by the image data acquisition device, vital sign data acquired by the vital sign data acquisition device, and mapping data acquired by the mapping data acquisition device; a support member for supporting the image data acquisition device, the vital sign data acquisition device, and the mapping data acquisition device; and a moving device for moving the support member, the image data acquisition device, the vital sign data acquisition device, and the mapping data acquisition device.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 2

properties.title: Low-dimensional information discovery and presentation system, apparatus and method
properties.summary: A search system configured to predict further search intents of a user and to perform exploratory further searches and produce a number of search features and associated relevances and divergence quantifiers for displaying by user equipment at least two-dimensional so as to allow the user to identify relationship of various diverging search terms and to rapidly direct the searching towards information the existence of which may have been previously unknown to the user. Some of the search features can be concealed and shown to the user only if the user magnifies the corresponding area on a display showing the search features returned by the search engine. Files matching to varying degree with the present and predicted further searches are shown to the user with respective lists of search features.

properties.title: Behavioral modeling of a data center utilizing human knowledge to enhance a machine learning algorithm
properties.summary: A method generates a behavioral model of a data center when a machine learning algorithm is applied. A team of human modelers that partition the data center into a plurality of connected nodes is analyzed by a behavioral model. The behavioral model of the data center detects an anomaly in a system behavior center by recursively applying the behavioral model to each node and simple component. A compressed metric vector for the node is generated by reducing a dimension of an input metric vector. A root cause of a failure caused is determined by the anomaly and an action is automatically recommended to an operator to resolve a problem caused by the failure. The proactively actions are taken to keep the data center in a normal state based on the behavioral model using the machine learning algorithm.

properties.title: Depth information obtaining method based on combination of features and region matching
properties.summary: The invention discloses a depth information obtaining method based on the combination of features and region matching. The depth information obtaining method includes the steps that firstly, feature points are obtained with the scale invariant feature transform (SIFT) feature extraction method, and matching is carried out through space position information, gradient information and direction information of the feature points; matching is carried out on non-feature points with a region matching method, the feature matched result serves as the constraint, the parallax gradient principle is adopted, a search range is narrowed, and the operation time is shortened. The depth information obtaining method is simple, practical, high in operation speed and high in matching accuracy rate, depth information can be obtained without special instruments under the laboratory condition, and the high practical value is achieved.

properties.title: Method for deducing entity relationships across corpora using cluster based dictionary vocabulary lexicon
properties.summary: An approach is provided for identifying entity relationships based on word classifications extracted from business documents stored in a plurality of corpora. In the approach, performed by an information handling system, a plurality of cluster classifications are identified for the business documents so that entity information from the business documents can be classified or assigned to the cluster classifications, such as by performing natural language processing (NLP) analysis of the business documents. The approach applies semantic analysis to identify and score entity relationships between the entity information classified in the cluster classifications, and based on the scored entity relationships, cluster relationships between the cluster classifications are identified.

properties.title: Information handling system and computer program product for deducing entity relationships across corpora using cluster based dictionary vocabulary lexicon
properties.summary: An approach is provided for identifying entity relationships based on word classifications extracted from business documents stored in a plurality of corpora. In the approach, performed by an information handling system, a plurality of cluster classifications are identified for the business documents so that entity information from the business documents can be classified or assigned to the cluster classifications, such as by performing natural language processing (NLP) analysis of the business documents. The approach applies semantic analysis to identify and score entity relationships between the entity information classified in the cluster classifications, and based on the scored entity relationships, cluster relationships between the cluster classifications are identified.

properties.title: The detection method and device of a kind of substrate
properties.summary: The invention discloses the detection method and device of a kind of substrate, the detection method of the substrate, including：Gather the testing image for detection of substrate to be detected；The detected value of at least one identification parameter related to optical characteristics of substrate to be detected is obtained according to the testing image；The detected value correspondence of at least one identification parameter is input to the input node of the good identification module based on neutral net of training in advance；Exported after obtaining the first recognition result of the substrate to be detected that the identification module is identified obtaining according to the input data of the input node；The neutral net is trained using the training image from substrate collection known to recognition result and obtained.The present invention reduces the testing result deviation that artificial subjective factor brings, personnel amount is reduced while accuracy in detection is improved, reduce cost.

properties.title: Detection method and device of substrate
properties.summary: The invention discloses a detection method and device of a substrate. The detection method includes collecting a to-be-detected image of the substrate to be detected; based on the to-be-detected image, acquiring the detecting value of at least one recognition parameter, relative to the optical property, of the substrate to be detected; correspondingly inputting the detecting value of the recognition parameter into a pre-trained input node of a neural network-based recognition module; acquiring and outputting a first recognition result, recognized by the recognition module according to the input data of the input node, of the substrate to be detected; based on a training image collected from the substrate to be detected with recognition result known, performing training to acquire the neural network. According to the arrangement, detection outcome bias caused by artificial subjective factors is reduced, while the detection accuracy is increased, workers are fewer, and cost is lowered.

properties.title: Information handling system and computer program product for identifying verifiable statements in text
properties.summary: A method, system and computer-usable medium are disclosed for identifying verifiable statements in a corpus of text. A training corpus of text containing manually annotated instances of verifiable and non-verifiable statements is processed to parse the text into segmented statements, which are in turn processed to extract features. The extracted features and the annotated statements are then processed with a machine learning algorithm to generate a verifiable statement classification model. In turn, the verifiable statement classification model is referenced by a verifiable statement classification system to distinguish verifiable and non-verifiable statements contained within an input corpus of text.

properties.title: Method for Identifying Verifiable Statements in Text
properties.summary: A method, system and computer-usable medium are disclosed for identifying verifiable statements in a corpus of text. A training corpus of text containing manually annotated instances of verifiable and non-verifiable statements is processed to parse the text into segmented statements, which are in turn processed to extract features. The extracted features and the annotated statements are then processed with a machine learning algorithm to generate a verifiable statement classification model. In turn, the verifiable statement classification model is referenced by a verifiable statement classification system to distinguish verifiable and non-verifiable statements contained within an input corpus of text.

properties.title: Automatic data interpretation and answering analytical questions with tables and charts
properties.summary: A method providing an answer to at least one analytical question containing at least one table or at least one chart is provided. The method may include receiving an input question. The method may also include extracting a plurality of information from the input question based on a natural language analysis. The method may further include forming a well-defined sentence. The method may include extracting at least one table or at least one chart associated with the input question. The method may include forming at least one mathematical equation. The method may also include solving the at least one mathematical equation. The method may include determining the answer to the input question in natural language based on the solved at least one mathematical equation. The method may further include narrating the determined answer to the input question in natural language.

properties.title: VISUALIZED RE-PHYSICALIZATION OF CAPTURED PHYSICAL SIGNALS AND/OR PHYSICAL STATES
properties.summary: Briefly, embodiments disclosed herein may relate to re-physicalization of captured physical signals and/or sensor measurements and to generation of user-perceivable output content from a computing device based at least in part on the re-physicalization.

properties.title: The rule-based remote sensing of Water-Body Information on a large scale automatic extracting system and method
properties.summary: The present invention relates to the rule-based remote sensing of the Water-Body Information on a large scale automatic extracting system of one kind and method, the system includes：Data load-on module, pretreatment module, image segmentation module, rule search module, information extraction modules.Methods described includes：Loading remotely-sensed data；Remotely-sensed data after the loading is pre-processed；Multi-scale division is carried out to data after the pretreatment；Extract the rule in Water-Body Information rule set；The automated information retrieval to data after the multi-scale division is completed according to water body information rule.The present invention considers spectral signature, the textural characteristics of water body during Objects recognition, and the correlated characteristic between water body and periphery atural object, more meets thoughtcast during people's identification atural object, information extraction high precision.The optimal rules of suitable current image data water body information are matched according to the principle of Water-Body Information Rules Filtering, for the accurate extraction of the Water-Body Information on a large scale under different time, different geography geological conditions.

properties.title: Rule-based remote-sensing automatic extraction system and method of wide-range water body information
properties.summary: The invention relates to a rule-based remote-sensing automatic extraction system and method of wide-range water body information. The system comprises a data loading module, a preprocessing module, an image segmentation module, a rule retrieval module and an information extraction module. The method comprises the following steps: loading remote-sensing data; preprocessing the loaded remote-sensing data; carrying out multi-scale segmentation to the preprocessed data; extracting a rule in a water body information rule set; and according to a water body information extraction rule, finishing the automatic information extraction of data subjected to the multi-scale segmentation. The invention comprehensively considers the spectral features and the texture features of the water body as well as relevant features between the water body and surrounding surface features in a surface feature recognition process, and more conforms to the thinking model of people during surface feature recognition, and information extraction precision is high. According to a water body information rule screening principle, an optimal rule suitable for current image data water body information extraction is matched, and the wide-range water body information under different time and geographic and geological conditions can be accurately extracted.

properties.title: SYSTEM FOR DOMAIN ADAPTATION WITH A DOMAIN-SPECIFIC CLASS MEANS CLASSIFIER
properties.summary: A classification system includes memory which stores, for each of a set of classes, a classifier model for assigning a class probability to a test sample from a target domain. The classifier model has been learned with training samples from the target domain and from at least one source domain. Each classifier model models the respective class as a mixture of components, the component mixture including a component for each source domain and a component for the target domain. Each component is a function of a distance between the test sample and a domain-specific class representation which is derived from the training samples of the respective domain that are labeled with the class, each of the components in the mixture being weighted by a respective mixture weight. Instructions, implemented by a processor, are provided for labeling the test sample based on the class probabilities assigned by the classifier models.

properties.title: Multilevel Uigur lexical analysis method for Uigur-Chinese translation systems
properties.summary: The invention discloses a multilevel Uigur lexical analysis method for Uigur-Chinese translation systems. The multilevel Uigur lexical analysis method comprises the following steps that Uigur works are received; the words are searched in an original-form word library: if the words are found, the internal structures of the words are generated, otherwise the method continues; the words are searched in an irregularly morphologically changed word library: if the words are found, original-form words and additional morphological feature attributes are taken out and the internal structures of the words are generated, otherwise the method continues; related affix rules are reverted and judged one by one in a non-verbally inflected affix rule library: if successfully reverted affix rules exist, the additional morphological feature attributes are taken out and the internal structures of the words are generated, otherwise the method continues; verbal category composition rules are reverted and judged sequentially: when successfully reverted verbal category composition rules are found, each additional morphological feature attribute related to successful reversion is recorded and the internal structures of the words are generated; if successfully reverted verbal category composition rules do not exist, an error is reported, and the method finishes. The multilevel Uigur lexical analysis method can identify various affix changes of Uigur words and correctly and comprehensively carry out lexical analysis.

properties.title: Domain adaptation for image classification with class priors
properties.summary: In camera-based object labeling, boost classifier ƒT(x)=Σr=1Mβrhr(x) is trained to classify an image represented by feature vector x using a target domain training set DT of labeled feature vectors representing images acquired by the same camera and a plurality of source domain training sets DS1, . . . , DSN acquired by other cameras. The training applies an adaptive boosting (AdaBoost) algorithm to generate base classifiers hr(x) and weights βr. The rth iteration of the AdaBoost algorithm trains candidate base classifiers hrk(x) each trained on a training set DT∪DSk, and selects hr(x) from previously trained candidate base classifiers. The target domain training set DT may be expanded based on a prior estimate of the labels distribution for the target domain. The object labeling system may be a vehicle identification system, a machine vision article inspection system, or so forth.

properties.title: Machine Learning Model for Level-Based Categorization of Natural Language Parameters
properties.summary: A mechanism is provided in a data processing system for categorizing a user providing a text input. The mechanism receives an input text written by a user and determines a set of features associated with the input text. The mechanism processes the input text and the set of features by a detection model. The detection model comprises a plurality of detectors corresponding to a plurality of categories. Each of the plurality of detectors determines whether the user fits a respective category based on the input text and the set of features. The mechanism categorizes the user into one or more of the plurality of categories based on a result of processing the input text and the set of features by the detection model.

properties.title: Pipeline layered LDPC decoding with preconfigured memory arbitration
properties.summary: Layered LDPC decoding with pipelining of the write operation of a current layer and the read operation of the next layer. In order to reduce the occurence of wating time occuring when the read operation of a next layer attempts to read a variable node which was not updated in the current layer, the rows of the macro matrix are re-arranged. Remaining memory access collisions are resolved by an arbitrer which receives and grants memory access requests, and which was preconfigured by a compiler with a table indicating a number of memory accesses without stalling for each variable node, or indicating a read/write pointer which must be attained before granting memory access.

properties.title: For the behavioral abnormal automatic detection method and detecting system of computer system
properties.summary: The present invention relates to a kind of behavioral abnormal automatic detection method and detecting system for computer system, the historical performance achievement data and real-time factor data of examined machine are gathered in the form of time series by monitoring system, data sectional is carried out by time series Preprocessing Algorithm, denoising, spike point is extracted and time series reconstruction step, the behavioral similarity that passage time sequence dynamic alignment algorithm is carried out between each section of time series calculate building Time Series Similarity matrix, the last behavior abnormal index for calculating each period among similarity matrix by Markov random walk sort algorithm.The present invention is directed to the abnormal behavior test problems in computer system, the machine behavioural characteristic in a period of time is considered comprehensively, pass through the similitude of day part behavior each other, comprehensively sequence and abnormal scoring are carried out using Markov random walk sequence, high automation high detection rate is obtained, the intelligent abnormal behavior without training is detected.

properties.title: Behavioral abnormality automatic detection method and behavioral abnormality automatic detection system aiming at computer system
properties.summary: The invention relates to a behavioral abnormality automatic detection method and a behavioral abnormality automatic detection system aiming at a computer system. The method comprises the following steps that: the system is monitored; historical performance index data and real-time performance index data of a detected machine are collected in a time sequence form; a time sequence pretreatment algorithm is used for performing steps of data segmentation, denoising, peak point extraction and time sequence rebuilding; the behavior similarity among all segments of time sequences is calculated through a time sequence dynamic alignment algorithm, so that a time sequence similarity matrix is built; and finally, a behavioral abnormality index in each time segment is calculated by a Markovian random walking sequencing algorithm from the similarity matrix. The method and the system provided by the invention aim at the behavioral abnormality detection problem in the computer system; the machine behavior features in a segment of time are comprehensively considered; through the similarity among behaviors in all time segments, the Markovian random walking sequencing is used for performing comprehensive sequencing and abnormality marking; and the intelligent behavioral abnormality detection with a high automation degree, a high detection rate and no training need is realized.

properties.title: High-speed moving target tracking algorithm for multi-feature extraction and step-wise refinement
properties.summary: The invention discloses a high-speed moving target tracking algorithm for multi-feature extraction and step-wise refinement. The high-speed moving target tracking algorithm mainly includes an adaptive multi-feature fusion stage, a based multi-feature kernel tracking stage and an adaptive update stage of a target model. Compared with the prior art, the high-speed moving target tracking algorithm has obvious advantages. Real-time tracking can be achieved, and tracking precision of the high-speed moving target tracking algorithm is obviously superior to that of most tracking algorithms. Besides, the problem of template drift is avoided by the aid of an adaptive template update mechanism.

properties.title: Method and apparatus for classification
properties.summary: The present invention provides a method and apparatus for classification. In the embodiments of the present invention, data to be predicted is input into M target classifiers respectively, so as to obtain the predicted result output by each target classifier of the M target classifiers, where M is an integer greater than or equal to 2, and each of the target classifiers is independent of another, so that a classification result of the data can be obtained according to the predicted result output by each of the target classifiers and a prediction weight of each of the target classifiers; and since each target classifier of the M target classifiers is independent of another, the classification result of the data can be obtained by making full use of the classification capability of each target classifier, thus improving the accuracy of the classification result. [EP2991003A2]

properties.title: Expert system for remote sensing image processing
properties.summary: The invention provides an expert system for remote sensing image processing. The expert system for remote sensing image processing comprises a user interface, a system interface, an inference machine, knowledge bases, a management system of the knowledge bases, a database, a database management system, a knowledge obtaining mechanism and an interpretation mechanism. The expert system earnestly and scientifically conclude and summarize and establish the knowledge bases by simulating visual interpretation experiences of a human expert, then quotes the knowledge bases to classify remote sensing data, utilizes a mode recognition method to obtain multiple characteristics of ground feature, provides evidence for remote sensing image interpretation, meanwhile applies an artificial intelligence technology, applies experiences and methods of the remote sensing image interpretation expert, simulates specific thinking process of remote sensing image visual interpretation, and performs remote sensing image interpretation to enable the computer interpretation level to reach the expert level.

properties.title: System and Method for Automatically Classifying Text using Discourse Analysis
properties.summary: The present invention is a textual discourse analysis with the purpose of analyzing and visualizing of complex text. The invention operates and functions based on conceptual relations, both logical and axiological, among grammatical components of a sentence and across sentences of a given text. Thus, three basic grammatical units, namely Agent/s, Topic/s and Object/s, have been utilized, in order to build a tripartite structure. Discursive analysis of text based on this invention provides a novel approach for automatically classifying positions of Agent/s within particular textual databases vis-a-vis to Topic/s and Object/s, and vice versa. Therefore, as illustrated above, a computer program method of the present invention starts by creating a conceptual map of a given text, classifying semantic macro-areas, positions of Agents, Topics and objects and then correlates such positions with other components in the database. In the next step of the invention, the computer assigns a reference system, provided for analyzing denotative content of discourse. The system is based upon a database of terms of words and phrases and their associated denotative as well as connotative meanings followed by generation of a database, axiologically categorizing subject-matters.

properties.title: METHOD AND SYSTEM OF A SMART-MICROWAVE OVEN
properties.summary: In one exemplary aspect, a smart-oven system includes a recipe module accessing a remote recipe database that comprises one or more recipe instructions, and downloading a downloaded recipe instruction to a local memory of the smart oven. A user-input module receives a user-specified cooking instruction. A cooking module manages one or more oven heating mechanisms in the smart oven according to the downloaded recipe instruction and the user-specified cooking instruction. A personalization module obtains a personalized recipe from a user of the smart oven and uploading the personalized recipe to a remote recipe database. A crowd sourcing module records user entered recipe instructions and automatically calculates cooking time and constitutes both into a complete recipe to be uploaded in the recipe store.

properties.title: A kind of method and apparatus of computer based natural language syntactic structure parsing
properties.summary: Disclose a kind of method and apparatus of computer based natural language syntactic structure parsing.The present invention is according to the mathematical principle of subject and corresponding computer technologies such as Abstract Algebra, set theory, Combinational Mathematics, computability theory and computational linguistics, with the mathematical thought of compound function, natural language syntactic structure parsing is carried out by setting up matrix model and linear model, construction recursive function；Meanwhile, the method such as integrated use mathematical induction is proved important conclusion.The present invention establishes a set of brand-new mathematical modeling for the sentence of natural language, compared with conventional conventional method, there is fundamental difference in thinking.The present invention creatively proposes unilateral order-preserving in the same direction and the one side overall plug hole method of two kinds of not order-preserving in the same direction, and creatively with the method for generating processing syntactic constituent arranged side by side of set race.The present invention takes full advantage of mathematics and Computer Subject rule, and methods described accuracy is higher, and operand is very big, there is certain technical difficulty.

properties.title: Computer-based method and device for analyzing natural language syntactic structures
properties.summary: The invention discloses a computer-based method and device for analyzing natural language syntactic structures. According to the method and device, the natural language syntactic structures are analyzed by building a matrix model and a linear model and constructing a recursive function through the mathematical thought of a composite function according to mathematical principles of subjects including the abstract algebra, the set theory, the combinatorial mathematics, the computability theory, the computational linguistics and the like and corresponding computer technologies; meanwhile, methods such as the mathematical induction are comprehensively applied to proving important conclusions. By means of the method and device, one set of brand new mathematic models are built for sentences of the natural language, and the thought is basically different from that of a conventional traditional method; the two overall plug-in methods including the single-side same-direction order preserving method and the single-side same-direction non-order-preserving method are creatively provided, and a parallel syntactic constituent generating and processing method of a set family is creatively applied; the rules of the mathematic subjects and the computer subjects are sufficiently used, and the method is high in accuracy and large in operation amount, and has certain technological difficulty.

properties.title: Game engine shortest path search method and game engine system
properties.summary: The invention discloses a game engine shortest path search method and a game engine system. The shortest path search method includes the following steps that first, an initial node is added to an Open list; second, the Open list is inspected, wherein if the Open list is empty, path finding fails; a node with the minimum f value in the Open list is found and serves as the current node, the node is transferred into a Closed list, and the third step is executed; if the current node is the finial node, path finding is successful, and the fourth step is executed; third, corresponding operations are performed on all the adjacent nodes in the eight directions; fourth, a path is saved, wherein according to information provided by the Closed list and a parent node list, backtrack is performed according to a parent pointer of a target node from the target node, and thus a path from a source node to the target node is obtained. Through the game engine shortest path search method, search efficiency and search accuracy can be improved. By adding one parent node list, detours are prevented from being taken, and it is guaranteed that the optimum path is extracted.

properties.title: Tailoring Question Answering System Output Based on User Expertise
properties.summary: A mechanism is provided in a data processing system for tailoring question answering system output based on user expertise. The mechanism receives an input question from a questioning user and determines a set of features associated with text of the input question. The mechanism determines an expertise level of the questioning user based on the set of features associated with the text of the input question using a trained expertise model. The mechanism generates one or more candidate answers for the input question and tailors output of the one or more candidate answers based on the expertise level of the questioning user.

properties.title: Method of calibrating spatial position relationship of camera and projector based on trapezoidal patterns
properties.summary: The present invention discloses a method of calibrating a spatial position relationship of a camera and a projector based on trapezoidal patterns. The method comprises the steps of a) using the camera to shoot images, and using a chessboard calibrating plate to calibrate the camera; b) projecting three trapezoidal projection patterns having 120 degrees of phase difference to a designated area, establishing a relationship between the camera coordinates and the projector coordinates on a spatial digitizer; c) calibrating the projector on the spatial digitizer by utilizing the relationship between the camera coordinates, after carrying out the projection transformation on the images used for calibrating the camera, and by a method same as the camera calibration, to obtain the spatial relative position relationship between the camera and the projector. The method of calibrating the spatial position relationship of the camera and the projector based on the trapezoidal patterns of the present invention calibrates based on the advantages that the trapezoidal patterns are easy to program, and are high in resolution, is high in calibration precision and stability, and enables the performances of the spatial digitizer to be improved effectively by establishing the corresponding coordinate relationship between the camera and the projector on the spatial digitizer.

properties.title: Grid automation Intelligent partition method
properties.summary: A kind of grid automation Intelligent partition method, first electric network model is built, electrical network is abstracted into the data structure being made up of vertex set and limit collection, then partition boundaries information is defined according to topological structure of electric, after judging that power network topology connection changes again, electric network model being carried out topology search, it is thus achieved that partition information, STATUS Displays partition information on the display device.The present invention is the partition information of each equipment in can quickly recognizing electrical network, promptly finds merging and the off-the-line situation of subregion, in the case of ensureing real-time, reduces the number of times that topology calculates.

properties.title: Automatic intelligent power grid partitioning method
properties.summary: An automatic intelligent power grid partitioning method includes establishing a power grid model; abstracting the power grid into a data structure composed of vertex sets and edge sets; defining partition boundary information according to a topological structure of the power grid; after judging that the changes occur to the topological connection of the power grid, performing the topological search to the power grid model to acquire the partition information; displaying the partition information on display equipment. According to the arrangement, the partition information of equipment in the power grid is rapidly identified, partition combination and splitting is instantly founded, and topological computations are fewer at the premise that instantaneity is guaranteed.

properties.title: Text semantic meaning extraction method based on thin division MapReduce
properties.summary: The present invention relates to a kind of text semantic meaning extraction method based on thin division MapReduce.Methods described includes：Pending text set is subjected to dual division according to document dimension and word list dimension, each division is the partial content of part text；Apply for a number of Mapper, each division of text set is respectively trained using LDA topic model SparseLDA algorithms, obtains local parameter, and different marks is given to different parameters, record the Reducer corresponding to it；Apply for that a number of Reducer, different types of Reducer merge the local parameter of not isolabeling, obtain global parameter, be output to file；This Mapper and Reducer process is repeated until reaching the condition of convergence, obtains final training pattern, semantic interpretation and expression for new text.

properties.title: Test semantic extraction method based on fine division of MapReduce
properties.summary: The invention relates to a test semantic extraction method based on fine division of the MapReduce. The method comprises the steps that a text set to be processed is doubly divided according to the dimensionality of a file and the dimensionality of a word list, and each part is part of content of part of texts; Mappers of a certain number are applied for, each part of the text set is trained through an LDA topic model SparseLDA algorithm, local parameters are obtained, different marks are given to the different parameters, and Reducers corresponding to the marks are recorded; the Reducers of a certain number are applied for, the Reducers of different kinds are fused with the local parameters of the different marks, and a global parameter is obtained and is output to the file; the process of the Mappers and the Reducers is repeated until a convergence condition is met, and the final training model is obtained, and is used for semantic explanation and expression of a new text.

properties.title: Portable electronic coin device
properties.summary: Portable electronic currency device for carrying out monetary transactions between a user (P) and a seller (V), which comprises a coin element (1) provided with a coin selector (2) for making the selection of currency or coins from of a request from the seller (V), records of function tickets (4) (3) intended to be selected based on the selection of currency or currencies, a function (3) for calculating a currency that from the Input register values (4) provide a function output, a function output reconstruction records (5) (3), a coin reconstructor (6) that from the function output and reconstruction records of Function output (5) (3) can reconstruct an original currency value, in which function (3) is a non-clone physical function erasable from a single reading, so that the same currency cannot be used twice. The invention also relates to a method that employs this device.

properties.title: Method and system for ensuring reliability of unicast video streaming at a video streaming platform
properties.summary: A method implemented in an electronic device serving as a stream distributor distributing unicast video and audio streams of a streaming platform system is disclosed. The stream distributor receives a unicast data flow containing data of a video and audio stream from a load balancer, the unicast data flow being transmitted in user datagram protocol (UDP) packets. The method includes the electronic device detecting initiation of a maintenance activity on a virtual machine or its host associated with the stream distributor. The method includes the electronic device indicating a failure mode of the stream distributor, where the failure mode indication is to cause the load balancer to switch the unicast data flow to an alternate stream distributor. The method also includes the electronic device detecting a completion of the load balancer switching the unicast data flow to the alternate stream distributor, and halting the distribution of the unicast data flow.

properties.title: Method and system for coordinating stream processing at a video streaming platform
properties.summary: A method implemented in an electronic device serving as a worker processing video and audio streams of a streaming platform system is disclosed. The method includes the electronic device requesting a task group from an orchestrator of the streaming platform system, where the orchestrator manages video and audio stream processing of the streaming platform system. The method also includes the electronic device receiving the task group allocated for the worker from the orchestrator, where the task group is allocated based at least partially on characteristics of the worker. The method also includes the electronic device initiating one or more task running processes to execute the allocated task group, and where each task running process performs at least one of processing one or more inputs corresponding to an incoming edge to the node, and producing one or more outputs corresponding to one or more outgoing edges from the node.

properties.title: Method and system for a graph based video streaming platform
properties.summary: A method implemented in an electronic device serving as an orchestrator managing video and audio stream processing of a streaming platform system is disclosed. The method includes the electronic device receiving a request to process a video source and creating a task graph based on the request, where the task graph is a directed acyclic graph of tasks for processing the video source, where each node of the task graph represents a processing task, and where each edge of the task graph represents a data flow across two processing tasks and corresponding input and output of each processing task. The method also includes the electronic device estimating resource requirements of each processing tasks, and splitting the task graph into a plurality of subsets, wherein each subset corresponds to a task group to be executed by one or more workers of a plurality of processing units of the streaming platform system.

properties.title: Corpus quality analysis
properties.summary: A mechanism is provided in a data processing system for corpus quality analysis. The mechanism applies at least one filter to a candidate corpus to determine a degree to which the candidate corpus supplements existing corpora for performing a natural language processing (NLP) operation. Responsive to a determination to add the candidate corpus to the existing corpora based on a result of applying the at least one filter, the mechanism adds the candidate corpus to the existing corpora to form modified corpora. The mechanism performs the NLP operation using the modified corpora.

properties.title: NETWORK BASED STRATIFICATION OF TUMOR MUTATIONS
properties.summary: The embodiments provide a method of for stratification of cancer into one or more informative subtypes of a subject in need thereof. The embodiments, further provide assigning a subject in need into one or more informative subtypes, including assigning a subject in need into an informative subtype wherein the subtype is an ovarian cancer subtype.

properties.title: Vision-based system for dynamic weather detection
properties.summary: A method of detecting a dynamic weather event includes the steps of: (a) receiving video images of a scene from a camera; (b) dividing each of the video images into multiple regions, in which a region is defined by a range of distances from the camera to objects in the scene; (c) selecting a region; and (d) segmenting the selected region into a plurality of three-dimensional (3D) image patches, in which each 3D image patch includes a time-sequence of T patches, with each patch comprised of N×M pixels, wherein N, M and T are integer numbers. The method also includes the following steps: measuring an image intensity level in each of the 3D image patches; masking 3D image patches containing image intensity levels that are above a first threshold level, or below a second threshold level; and extracting features in each 3D image patch that is not discarded by the masking step. Based on the extracted features, the method makes a binary decision on detecting a dynamic weather event.

author.name: Archambeau Cedric Philippe Charles Jean Ghislain

properties.title: Overlapping trace norms for multi-view learning
properties.summary: In multi-view learning, optimized prediction matrices are determined for V≧2 views of n objects, and a prediction of a view of an object is generated based on the optimized prediction matrix for that view. An objective is optimized, wherein is a set of parameters including at least the V prediction matrices and a concatenated matrix comprising a concatenation of the prediction matrices, and comprises a sum including at least a loss function for each view, a trace norm of the prediction matrix for each view, and a trace norm of the concatenated matrix. may further include a sparse matrix for each view, with further including an element-wise norm of the sparse matrix for each view. may further include regularization parameters scaling the trace norms of the prediction matrices and the trace norm of the concatenated matrix.

properties.title: Method for tracking keypoints in a scene
properties.summary: The present invention relates to a method for tracking a position of at least one keypoint in an image of an object moving relative to an optical sensor, wherein light reflected from the object (12) is detected so as to generate an image of the object, and wherein a position of at least one keypoint (K j ) in said image is detected and updated using temporal contrast events ( Ev ) of the optical sensor. The invention also relates to a corresponding computer program and device.

properties.title: Shared weak classifier combination based hand classifier and training and detection method
properties.summary: The invention discloses a shared weak classifier combination based hand classifier and a detection method thereof. Multi-pose hands can be detected from the cluttered background. A group of shared characteristics are selected in every round of the boosting in the classifier training process and a corresponding shared weak classifier combination is built through every group of shared characteristics. Meanwhile a corresponding multi-threshold shared weak classifier combination is built through a shared characteristic combination and the classification capability of the classifier is improved.

properties.title: Human hand grader and training and detection method based on the combination of shared Weak Classifier
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of human hand graders and its detection method based on the combination of shared Weak Classifier, and multi-pose hand can be detected from mixed and disorderly background.The each round of boosting during classifier training all chooses one group of sharing feature, and building a corresponding shared Weak Classifier using this group of sharing feature combines.Meanwhile build corresponding multi-threshold using sharing feature combination and share Weak Classifier combination, improve the classification capacity of grader.

properties.title: Space robot electric integration test technology demonstration verification system
properties.summary: The invention is suitable for the field of aviation and provides a space robot electric integration test technology demonstration verification system. The system comprises an on-satellite device system and a ground device system, wherein the on-satellite device system comprises a digital tube computer, an attitude orbit dynamics computer, a signal processing computer, an objective measuring system electric simulator, a micro target satellite-borne electric simulator, a GPS electric simulator, a flywheel electric simulator and an acceleration electric simulator; and the ground device system comprises a testing host, a dispatching computer, a database server, a data display computer, a test and control terminal simulator and a real-time animation demonstration computer. The space robot electric integration test technology demonstration verification system can achieve simulation testing of a space robot, and compared with the prior art, the system is low in implementation cost.

properties.title: Simulator and method for neural network
properties.summary: The present invention relates to a simulator and a simulation method for simulating the cerebral neural network in the neurobiology. According to the present invention, by researching and analyzing detail features of the working process of cerebral neurons and synapses and simulating and implementing the detail features through an electronic circuit, so that the working process of the neurons and the synapses can be more reasonably and more accurately simulated and the neural network with more excellent performance can be structured.

properties.title: Fast human face recognition algorithm used for video monitoring and based on CUDA parallel computing and sparse representing
properties.summary: The invention discloses a fast human face recognition algorithm used for video monitoring and based on CUDA parallel computing and sparse representing. For overcoming the defects that in the sparse representing dictionary training process, the computing complexity is large and the speed is low, the CUDA parallel computing technology is adopted in the method, and a GPU is used for performing computing to obtain a dictionary; the sparse representing method is adopted, a to-be-detected sample is re-established by solving the sparse coefficient vector, and classification recognition is carried out according to the residual error between a tested sample and the re-established sample. According to the method, computing resources of existing computer hardware are fully excavated, optimizing is carried out according to the algorithm features, the computing speed in the dictionary training process is increased, the algorithm executing time is greatly shortened, and the efficiency of the method is improved.

properties.title: COMMUNICATION APPARATUS AND TRANSMISSION BAND ESTIMATION METHOD
properties.summary: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a communication apparatus capable of improving utilization efficiency of bandwidth.SOLUTION: The communication apparatus which transmits a data by estimating an available transmission band in a network in which available bandwidth varies, includes: a reception packet amount read-out message processing section 11 that acquires a reception result of the transmitted data from an opposite device as a transmission target of the data; a transmission band estimation section 12 that calculates packet loss amount based on a reception result which is acquired by the reception packet amount read-out message processing section 11 and a data transmission result at own side; and calculates an estimation value of an available transmission band according to a procedure according to a comparison result between the calculated packet loss amount and two different threshold values.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

properties.title: DATA ACCESS AND PROCESSING SYSTEM
properties.summary: This invention provides a distributed data analysis system for use in analysing Limit Order Book (LOB) data. The system include a virtual machine interface module for creating at least one virtual machine. Each virtual machine is configured to create at least one compute unit for processing the LOB data. Each compute unit and the LOB data is collocated. The system includes an update module for updating the LOB data from at least one electronic trading venue. A monitoring module for tracking the activity of at least one user on the system is also provided. A software library module having at least one algorithm for processing and/or analysing the LOB data, is also provided. The system is implemented in a cloud computing environment.

properties.title: Method for determining a three-dimensional model data set of a blood vessel system comprising at least one vessel segment
properties.summary: Method for determining a three-dimensional model data set of a blood vessel system of a patient comprising at least one vascular segment from a plurality of projection images of the blood vessel system, which were recorded at different imaging angles, comprising the steps of: a) dividing the projection images into image areas comprising at least one pixel each, b) determining a feature vector, for each of the image regions, c) determining a classification information that defines a membership of the respective image region to a according to anatomical default data, in particular according to an anatomical atlas defined at least the image data of at least the image area associated with the feature vector and / or in accordance with this image data Vascular segment of the blood vessel system or a non-affiliation to the blood vessel system describes, for each of the image areas by applying a classification function ion on the feature vector associated with the image area, the classification function being trained by training data records annotated on at least one person different from the patient, d) segmenting the blood vessel system in the projection images by grouping image areas with the same classification information, e) calculating the three-dimensional Model data set depending on the segmented projection images and the classification information.

properties.title: A kind of sign language converting speech system
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of sign language converting speech system, including 3D scanning devices, data storage processing system, voice synthetic module three parts, the sign language converting speech system scans skeleton by 3D scanning devices, obtains the scan data of the bone action in a period of time；Data storage processing system is contrasted the data storage that scan data acts with the bone to be prestored in database, when scan data and data storage are coincide, the implication corresponding to the data storage to be prestored in database is sent and generates voice to voice synthetic module and plays.Sign language gesture can be automatically converted to voice output by the system, facilitate exchanging between disabled person and normal person；Meaning conversion and expression accuracy rate are higher, speed, and have tone analog functuion.

properties.title: Sign language conversion voice system
properties.summary: The invention discloses a sign language conversion voice system which comprises a 3D scanning device, a data storage processing system and a voice synthesis module. The sign language conversion voice system scans human skeletons through the 3D scanning device to obtain scanning data of skeleton motions within a certain time. The data storage processing system compares the scanning data with skeleton motion storage data prestored in a database, and when the scanning data are matched with the storage data, the meaning corresponding to the storage data prestored in the database is sent to the voice synthesis module to generate a voice and play the voice. According to the sign language conversion voice system, sign language gestures can be automatically converted into voice to be output, communication between the disabled and abled persons is facilitated, the meaning conversion and expression accuracy is higher, speed is higher, and the sign language conversion voice system has the tone simulation function.

properties.title: The parallel reduction method of rough set based on MapReduce, apparatus and system
properties.summary: The invention provides a kind of parallel reduction method of the rough set based on MapReduce, apparatus and system, methods described is by reading after yojan decision table, then described decision table is simplified, again Attribute Significance parallel computation process is carried out to the decision table after described simplification, finally carrying out the parallel yojan of Attribute Significance again obtains final yojan result, methods described can calculate the importance degree of all properties by a MapReduce, and delete the redundancy of simplified decision table after obtaining a yojan result again, simplified decision table is more simplified, therefore can further improve calculating speed.In addition, the parallel yojan apparatus and system of the rough set based on MapReduce that the present invention provides, it solves the problems, such as in prior art that knowledge Reduction has certain restrictive condition and can not efficiently carry out parallelization yojan and so that storage area is further optimized as methods described well.

properties.title: Rough set parallel reduction method, device and system based on MapReduce
properties.summary: The invention provides a rough set parallel reduction method, device and system based on MapReduce. The method comprises the steps that after a decision table to be reduced is read, the decision table is reduced, attribute importance degree parallel calculation processing is conducted on the reduced decision table, and lastly attribute importance degree parallel reduction is conducted to obtain a final reduction result. By means of the method, the importance degrees of all attributes can be worked out through one-time MapReduce, redundant information of the reduction decision table is deleted again after the reduction result is obtained, the reduction decision table is more simplified, and thus the calculation speed can be further improved. In addition, same as the method, the rough set parallel reduction device and system can well solve the problems that certain limiting conditions exist in a knowledge reduction method and parallel reduction cannot be conducted efficiently, and further optimize the storage space.

properties.title: METHODS AND SYSTEMS OF A GIFT-GIVING SERVICE
properties.summary: In one exemplary aspect, a method of an online gift-giving service includes the step of obtaining a set of social relationships between a giver and a set of receivers. A step includes determining a relationship category for each relationship in the set of social relationships. A step includes generating a profile for each receiver in the set of receivers. A step includes determining a set of gift giving dates for each receiver in the set of receivers based on the attributes of each receiver. A step includes determining a set of gift giving ideas for each gift giving date. Optionally, a step include communicating the set of gift giving dates for each receiver and the set of gift giving ideas for each gift giving date to the giver.

properties.title: OPSM mining method of gene chip expression data based on common sub-sequences
properties.summary: The invention discloses an OPSM mining method of gene chip expression data based on common sub-sequences. The method comprises the steps that (1) the gene chip data are input, and are preprocessed; (2) the common sub-sequence between any two rows in the gene chip data is obtained; (3) a candidate set tree with the length of 2 is generated; (4) pruning operation is carried on the candidate set tree with the length of 2, and 2-frequent trees are obtained; (5) the 2-frequent trees are spliced to form a 3-candidate set tree, and 3-frequent trees are obtained though the pruning operation; (6) k-frequent trees are spliced to form a k+1-candidate set tree, k+1-frequent trees are obtained through the pruning operation until no frequent tree is generated, and finally an OPSM which has all the lines of mode lengths and meets the row threshold valve is obtained. According to the method, time and space complexity is reduced in the prefix tree storage and traversal operation; all the OPSMs meeting the supporting degree threshold value on the gene chip data can be precisely found without greatly increasing operation time.

properties.title: Correlating cognitive biometrics for continuous identify verification
properties.summary: A technique is provided for continuous user authentication through real-time fusion and correlation of multiple factors. Monitored data is continuously obtained from a computer. The monitored data is related to user actions on the computer of a user. A server analyzes the monitored data of the computer to execute a windowing system event sequences modality, a network footprint modality, an application specific user actions modality, and/or a forensic linguistic analysis modality for the user. The user is authenticated on the computer based on a combination of the windowing system event sequences modality, the network footprint modality, the application specific user actions modality, and/or the forensic linguistic analysis modality.

properties.title: Dynamic character substitution for web conferencing based on sentiment
properties.summary: In an approach to determine a pre-recorded video for use in place of a video feed of a user in a video conference, a computer receives one or more pre-recorded videos of a user in which the pre-recorded videos include at least one visual representation of an emotional state. The computer determines a meeting tone of at least one meeting discussion in the video conference and determines a first video of the one or more pre-recorded videos of the user that corresponds to the meeting tone. The computer substitutes the first video into the video conference in place of a video feed in the video conference.

properties.title: Natural-language processing based on DNA computing
properties.summary: A method and associated systems for using methods of DNA computing to implement an operation of a natural-language processing (NLP) system. A processor translates components of a slot grammar of the NLP system and an input filler vocabulary into listings of sequences of nucleotides. These sequences are encoded into a set of nucleotide chains, which are then allowed to chemically interact with each other such that the chains automatically bond in ways that are analogous to the way that a traditional computerized NLP system would use inferences and contextual information to fill slots of the slot grammar with tokens of the filler vocabulary.
