According to the feature selecting method, sample classify information is not required to provide beforehand, the problem that feature selection is lack of separation measurement in a unsupervised mode is solved effectively, good dimension reduction performances are realized in UCI data set and fault diagnosis experiments, and the feature selecting method is highly practical.

properties.title: A kind of feature selection approach for pattern classification
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of feature selection approach for pattern classification, by using fuzzy Fisher criterion to be on the basis of object function is tried to achieve without supervision best discriminant technique vector, each feature importance weight is tried to achieve according to value the most one-dimensional in this vector, feature ordering is carried out according to this weights size, by given threshold value, selected characteristic subset, and then achieve Feature Dimension Reduction.The enforcement of the method for the present invention is not only without being provided in advance sample class information, and efficiently solve the problem lacking separation property tolerance without feature selection under enforcement mechanisms, in UCI data set and fault diagnosis are tested, embody good dimensionality reduction performance, there is the highest practical value.

properties.title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR GENERATING CONSTELLATION-BASED INFORMATION CODING USING PHYSICAL NOISY PSEUDO-RANDOM SOURCES
properties.summary: A method and system are provided for a symbol-oriented approach that addresses information recovery from manufacturing variations (MVs) readings in a high noise environment. The multi-bits-per-symbol approach, which is in accordance with the various aspects of the present invention, is in contrast with how manufacturing-variation-derived bits are normally treated in the context of PUF Key Generation's error correction process. The multi-bit-per-symbol approach also offers a natural distance metric (distance to the most-likely symbol, distance to the next-most-likely symbol, etc.) which can aid soft-decision decoding or list-decoding, and can be used to improve the provisioning of a more reliably encoded secret and its associated helper data value.

properties.title: Weighing characteristic face recognition method for multichannel pulse coupling neural network
properties.summary: The invention discloses a weighing characteristic face recognition method for a multichannel pulse coupling neural network. The weighing characteristic face recognition method comprises the step 1, acquiring an original face color image, the step 2, converting the original face color image from an RGB color space to an HIS color space to obtain a converted face image, the step 3, respectively extracting three channels of data of the hue H, the saturability S and the illumination I of the converted face image, the step 4, using a PCNN technique to carry out iteration ignition treatment on the three channels of data of the H, the S and the I of the converted face image to generate three channels of pulse ignition ration sequences, the step 5, carrying out weighing treatment on the three channels of the pulse ignition ratio sequences and then connecting the weighed number sequences to form an overall pulse ignition ratio characteristic sequence spectrum of the converted face image, and the step 6, using the overall pulse ignition ratio characteristic sequence spectrum of the converted face image and a face sample sequence spectrum in a template base to carry out relevance match to recognize a right face image. The weighing characteristic face recognition method greatly improves the recognition rate of face images.

properties.title: Calibration method of grab detection, medium, and device
properties.summary: The invention discloses a calibration method of grab detection, a medium, and a device. The method includes: a computing device receives sensor data from a plurality of sensors of the computing device, and the sensor data corresponds to a specific state associated with the computing device; the computing device determines a vector corresponding to the received sensor data; the computing device compares the vector with a predetermined hyperplane, wherein the hyperplane corresponds to a plurality of usages to occur, of the computing device; and the computing device determines whether the specific state associated with the comnputing device corresponds to one specific of the usages to occur, of the computing device based on the comparison of the vector and the predetermined hyperplane.

author.name: Michael John Mackenzie Lentor Wei La

properties.title: Grasp the calibration of detection
properties.summary: In one embodiment, method includes receiving real time sensor data from N number of sensor on computing device.Real time sensor data corresponds to the conversion of the physical state of the computing device as caused by the user of computing device.Method also includes linear function being applied to the real time sensor data of each from N number of sensor；Vector is determined based on the N tuples including derivative；By vector with being compared with the predetermined hyperplane that N 1 is tieed up；And whether determine to change based on comparing is to one or more predetermined imminent events any of used of computing device or not correspond to the predetermined imminent non-event that uses any of of the user to computing device corresponding to user.

properties.title: Method And System For Scoring Credibility Of Information Sources
properties.summary: A method for classifying information sources and content based on credibility, reliability, or trust. A content item describing an event is retrieved from an information provider and parsed for links. Each link is evaluated and attributed a sentiment score. The same event is identified in a set of know sources and an event score is calculated based on the credibility of each of the known sources. Finally, the content item is ranked based on the event and sentiment scores.

properties.title: Data Integration mechanism for Internet of Things integrated platform
properties.summary: One kind is disclosed by the method that IoT equipment of Internet of Things (IoT) network to connection is integrated.This method includes extracting the first data record from the data source for being connected to IoT integrated platform；The first data record is analyzed to generate the record of the derivation about user's context；The data group that context grouping is recorded assembling the first data record and deriving from；And the record derived from is presented on integrated interface together with other data records in the data group.

properties.title: Interoperability mechanisms for Internet of Things integrated platform
properties.summary: The method that one kind safeguards the interoperability between the IoT equipment via the connection of Internet of Things (IoT) integrated platform.This method includes：Receive the selection with the device-dependent semantic labels of IoT；The regular recommendation of interoperable is determined based on semantic label, there is the rule of interoperable condition to trigger and in the operation strategy for meeting to perform during condition triggering；Present and recommend on regulation management interface；The confirmation from user is received with by regulation management interface, to start the rule of interoperable.

properties.title: SYSTEMS AND METHODS RELATING TO SUBJECT MONITORING, ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT
properties.summary: A mobile system includes processing structure configured to electronically transmit collected data about ambient factor and/or usage of the mobile system to a remote processing structure; receive, from the remote processing structure, electronic date/time data including a plurality of dates/times determined by the remote processing structure based on the transmitted collected data; at each of the provided dates/times, automatically trigger execution of one or more user-interactive programs on the mobile system thereby to receive user data inputted by a user of the mobile system; and electronically transmit the received user data to the remote processing structure, A system includes a plurality of mobile systems and a remote processing structure in electronic communication with each of the mobile systems, the remote processing structure comprising at least one database for storage and aggregation of respective collected data and user data received from each of the plurality of mobile devices.

properties.title: COMPUTATION USING A NETWORK OF OPTICAL PARAMETRIC OSCILLATORS
properties.summary: In one aspect, a computational machine includes an optical device configured to receive energy from an optical energy source and generate a number N1 of optical signals, and a number N2 of coupling devices, each of which controllably couples a plurality of the number N1 optical signals. The coupling devices are individually controlled to simulate a computational problem. In another aspect, a computational machine includes a number N1 of parametric oscillators and a number N2 of coupling devices, each of which controllably couples a plurality of the number N1 of parametric oscillators together. The coupling devices are individually controlled to simulate a computational problem.

properties.title: Data processing method and system for intelligent supply chain
properties.summary: The invention discloses a data processing method and system for an intelligent supply chain. The data processing method includes steps of operating a first intelligent agent for making the first intelligent agent to receive first data information related to merchandise or a service supply chain; processing the first data information automatically and obtaining second data information related to the merchandise or the service supply chain; sending the second data information to a second intelligent agent after the second intelligent agent required for mutual interaction is determined intelligently; and operating the second intelligent agent to make the second intelligent agent at least process the second data information automatically for obtaining third data information related to the merchandise or the service supply chain. Through adoption of the above method, functions of the intelligent agents of different types can be integrated according to the invention, so that process automation is realized.

properties.title: APPLIANCE CLEARINGHOUSE WITH ORCHESTRATED LOGIC FUSION AND DATA FABRIC - ARCHITECTURE, SYSTEM AND METHOD
properties.summary: A computerized method for controlling or connecting a plurality of computer appliances in a networked control system comprised of control center, computer appliance and peripherals for the purposes of establishing an automated framework and technical devices for intelligent integration of two or more applications, logic rules, data repositories and/or services together to automate, manage, synchronize or monitor knowledge or business solutions in real-time. The control center, computer appliances or peripherals can store and process structured or unstructured data; the control center is communicating with each appliance or periphery across a communication network; the control center can determine when an appliances or peripheral requires maintenance or update; the control center controls the current inventory of computer appliances and peripherals; the control center can add or reinitialize a new computer appliance or peripheral; the computer appliance can also add peripherals. A user can interact with the control center, computer appliance or a peripheral to perform monitoring, management or analysis functions.

properties.title: MINIMALLY INVASIVE SPLAYING MICROFIBER ELECTRODE ARRAY AND METHODS OF FABRICATING AND IMPLANTING THE SAME
properties.summary: An electrode array having a splayable bundle of fibers having heat-sharpened tips. A method of manufacturing an electrode array including heat-sharpening a tip of each of a plurality of fibers; and bundling the plurality of fibers. A method of implanting an electrode array into a subject, the electrode array having a bundle of fibers, the method including exposing a target in the subject for the electrode array; and inserting the bundle of fibers into the target, where forces holding the bundle of fibers together are released during the insertion thus resulting in splaying of the fibers. An electrical connection with the fibers can be formed by a conductive material, or in high-channel count designs formed by surface mounting two-dimensional amplifier arrays to a base of a fiber array.

properties.title: INFORMATION PROCESSING METHOD, INFORMATION PROCESSING APPARATUS, ORGANIZATION NAME STANDARDIZING METHOD, AND ORGANIZATION NAME STANDARDIZING APPARATUS
properties.summary: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an information processing method, an information processing apparatus, an organization name standardizing method, and an organization name standardizing apparatus.SOLUTION: The information processing method includes: an organization name breakdown step of breaking down each of organization names to a plurality of ranks of sub-organization names on the basis of word meaning features of the organization name; a subordination relation analysis step of analyzing a subordination relation among the plurality of ranks of sub-organization names, and obtaining an internal organization structural relation of organizations relating to the organization names; an equivalence relation analysis step of analyzing an equivalence relation among the organization names using open information materials; and an organization name storing step of storing the organization names, the internal organization structural relation, and the equivalence relation while associating each of the organization names with the internal organization structural relation and the equivalence relation, and constructing a database.

properties.title: Information processing method and device and method and device for standardizing organization names
properties.summary: The invention discloses an information processing method and device and a method and device for standardizing organization names. The information processing method comprises the steps of dividing organization names, wherein the organization names are divided into multiple levels of sub organization names according to the semantic characteristics of the organization names; analyzing subordinate relation, wherein the subordinate relation between the multiple levels of sub organization names is analyzed so as to obtain the internal organization relation of the organizations relates to the organization names; analyzing equal relation, wherein the equal relation between the organization names is analyzed by utilizing public information sources; storing organization name, wherein the relation between the organization names and the internal organization structure and the equal relation are stored in a relevant mode so as to establish a knowledge library in the organization name storage step. According to the information processing method and device and the method and device for standardizing organization names, the organization names can be standardized more efficiently and accurately, and therefore unified management and rapid retrieval of documents are facilitated.

properties.title: Method and apparatus for conducting synthesized, semi-scripted, improvisational conversations
properties.summary: Simulating an improvisational conversation between two or more people (or between a person and himself at a later time) by recording an original conversation involving some of the people and annotating the recording to produce an interview source database, then receiving a statement from another of the people, matching the statement against the interview source database to obtain a suitable audio response in the voice of a participant in the original conversation, and playing the audio response for the speaker or sender of the statement.

properties.title: METHODS FOR IDENTIFYING SUPPLEMENTS THAT INCREASE GUT COLONIZATION BY AN ISOLATED BACTERIAL SPECIES, AND COMPOSITIONS DERIVED THEREFROM
properties.summary: The invention encompasses methods for identifying supplements that support growth of a bacterial strain in the gut of a subject, and compositions derived therefrom.

properties.title: Test Size Reduction via Sparse Factor Analysis
properties.summary: A database of questions is designed to test understanding of a set of concepts. A subset of the questions is selected for administering to one or more learners in a test. One desires for the subset to be small, to minimize testing workload for the learners and grading workload for instructors. However, to preserve the ability to accurately estimate learners' knowledge of the concepts, the questions of the subset should be appropriately chosen and not too small in number. We propose among other things a non-adaptive algorithm and an adaptive algorithm for test size reduction (TeSR) using an extended version of the Sparse Factor Analysis (SPARFA) framework. The SPARFA framework is a framework for modeling learner responses to questions. Our new TeSR algorithms find fast approximate solutions to a combinatorial optimization problem that involves minimizing the uncertainly in assessing a learner's knowledge of the concepts.

properties.title: Commodity image class prediction method towards net purchase platform
properties.summary: The invention belongs to technical field of multimedia information retrieval, be specially commodity image class prediction method based on net purchase platform.The present invention mainly comprises six modules and the acquisition of related algorithm, i.e. training image, image characteristics extraction, uncorrelated image filtering, characteristics of image training, multi-level image classification, and associated picture selects.The present invention is based on the truthful data obtained on net purchase platform, by the training of large-scale data, the classification information of commodity in image can be automatically analyzed, provide a user with shopping to guide, thus simplify user's online shopping flow process, strengthen Consumer's Experience, be with a wide range of applications in field of image search.

properties.title: Commodity image category forecasting method based on online shopping platform
properties.summary: The invention belongs to the technical field of multimedia information searching, and particularly relates to a commodity image category forecasting method based on an online shopping platform. The commodity image category forecasting method mainly involves six modules and comprises corresponding algorithms, namely training image obtaining, image characteristic extracting, irrelevant image filtering, image characteristic training, multilevel image classifying and relevant image selecting. According to the commodity image category forecasting method, based on real data obtained from the online shopping platform, commodity category information in images can be automatically analyzed through large-scale data training, shopping guide can be provided for a user, and therefore online shopping procedures can be simplified for the user, user experience is enhanced, and the commodity image category forecasting method has broad application value in the field of image searching.

properties.title: FNN learning algorithm
properties.summary: The invention discloses an FNN (Fuzzy Neural Network) learning algorithm which specifically comprises the steps of establishment of an FNN, training of FNN parameters, prediction identification on the trained FNN, and judgment of target category through the actual output result. The FNN learning algorithm provided by the invention has the benefits that through training to the established FNN, a network classifier comprising a weight is obtained, and during training, the learning rate is changed along with the change of gradient in the training process, so that accurate identification on mistakenly identified data is realized, and a method that a counting backward technique is adopted to enable the partial derivative solving to a denominator variable to be changed into the partial derivative solving to a common variable is provided, the amount of operation of the system is reduced, and the efficiency of the system is further improved; finally, the trained FNN is utilized to perform identification prediction on the test data, and compared with the traditional FNN, the identification rate is remarkably improved.

properties.title: Automating natural-language interactions between an expert system and a user
properties.summary: A method and associated systems for automating natural-language interactions between an expert system and a user. Characteristics of and relationships among elements of a set of business processes are captured, organized into a data structure, and stored as a set of business process models. The format, contents, and organization of these models are chosen to facilitate translating characteristics of the business processes into a format that may be stored in a knowledgebase of an expert system. The structured business-process models are then translated into a component of a knowledgebase from which an expert system may infer rules that guide its natural-language user interactions that relate to the business processes. In some embodiments, a similar method may be used to automatically translate business-process metadata, such as concept classes and process classes, into a similar knowledgebase-compatible format.

properties.title: A kind of method and apparatus filtering information using representation vector
properties.summary: The present invention relates to information analysis techniques fields, specifically, the present invention relates to a kind of method and apparatus filtering information using representation vector.Wherein information filtering method includes converting information into information vector；Similar information vector in described information vector is placed in same information vector group；Find out the representation vector in information vector group；It is analysed to information and is converted to information vector, compared with the representation vector, the information to be analyzed is filtered out if being matched with the representation vector.Pass through the method and device of the embodiments of the present invention, it is possible to reduce matched number in information filtering reduces the scale of matching database, and it is very high to filter information accuracy rate.

properties.title: For handling the method that the measurement data of vehicle begins look for parking stall for determination
properties.summary: It is used to handle the measurement data of vehicle the present invention relates to a kind of for determining the method for beginning look for parking stall, methods described comprises the following steps：A) multiple (N) running data vector (x are detectedi), wherein, each running data vectorial (x) is included on speed (v；), position data (pj) and the speed (vi) and position data (pi) detection at the time of (ti) information；B) determine in detection running data vector (xi) each moment (ti) characteristic vector (m；), wherein, processing it is current and the information of past running data vectorial (x) in time, wherein, characteristic vector (mi) as characteristic component include at least one velocity information and travel information；C) to each characteristic vector (mi) classification, wherein, the characteristic vector (mi) each characteristic vector be allocated to represent vehicle traveling the first traffic classification (cZ) or be allocated to represent parking find traffic the second traffic classification (cp), and wherein it is determined that as lower probability (p (and P | mi)), the probability is provided：Characteristic vector gives the first or second traffic classification (c with which kind of probabilistic settingsZ, cP)；D) the cutting characteristic vector (m in time coursei) traffic classification (cZ, cP), wherein, according to characteristic vector (mi) identified traffic classification (cZ, cP) by from start until running data vector last detection traveling be divided into two sections and since a section in another section transition representative searching parking stall.

properties.title: Human-like global positioning system (GPS) directions
properties.summary: Human-like global positioning system (GPS) directions. The method includes the steps that a processor of a computing apparatus receives a request for a route from a first geolocation to a second geolocation; the processor calculates the route from the first geolocation to the second geolocation; the processor accesses a social contact map which includes multiple nodes and multiple sides connectingthe nodes, each node being corresponding to a target associated with a social network and geolocations associated with the user being corresponding to specific nodes of the social contact map; the processor identifies one or more recorded routes of the user matching at least one part of the route, wherein the one or more recorded routes include the geolocations associated with the user; the processor updates one or more navigation instructions for the route based on the identified recorded routes of the user; the processor provides the updated navigation instructions to a display of a clientof the user.

properties.title: Air navigation aid and navigation equipment
properties.summary: In one embodiment, a kind of method includes：The request to the route from the first geographical location to the second geographical location is received from user；And calculate the route from the first geographical location to the second geographical location.Route includes one group of navigation instruction in one or more sections and section.This method further includes：For at least part data storage is accessed by one or more predefined paths that position data before user determines.This method further includes：Identify the one or more predefined paths being consistent with one or more of section；The navigation instruction in the section being consistent is replaced by using the breviary navigation instruction of each identified predefined paths to change this group of navigation instruction；And provide a user modified this group of navigation instruction.

properties.title: Certificating vehicle public key with vehicle attributes
properties.summary: A method for providing secure connection between vehicles. A unique pair of digitally signed public key and private key is provided to each vehicle, along with additional vehicle-related data. A certificate number is generated for each vehicle and the public key, the certificate number and the attributes of the vehicle is signed by a trusted certificate generating authority. Before communicating with a second vehicle, the first vehicle sends its unique certificate to a second vehicle; the second vehicle verifies the authenticity of received unique certificate number and visible attributes by a camera. If the attributes are verified successfully, the second vehicle sends its unique certificate number to the first vehicle, along with a secret key, which is valid for the current session only. Then the first vehicle verifies the authenticity of received certificate of the second vehicle and attributes by a camera that captures visible attributes of the second vehicle.

properties.title: Eliminate shade and the double-truncated-concodebooker codebooker foreground detection method capable of highlight noise
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of double-truncated-concodebooker codebooker foreground detection method capable eliminating shade and highlight noise, be applied to the foreground detection in intelligent vision monitoring field.Method uses YUV color model based on double-truncated-cone-cylinder codebook model, color space, is designated as DTCC_YUV, and model lower part is configured to upright cleat stanchion body, forms shadow Detection region；Model superstructure becomes the cleat stanchion body stood upside down, and forms highlight noise detection area；It is configured to cylinder in the middle part of model, forms main body background detection region；Described method includes model construction and two stages of background subtraction.The inventive method has good foreground detection quality, it is achieved that higher real-time, effectively eliminates the impact of shade and highlight noise simultaneously.

properties.title: Double-truncated-cone-cylinder codebook foreground detection method capable of eliminating shadow and highlight noise
properties.summary: The invention discloses a double-truncated-cone-cylinder codebook foreground detection method capable of eliminating shadow and highlight noise, and the method is applied to foreground detection in the intelligent vision monitoring field. The method is based on a double-truncated-cone-cylinder codebook model, a color space adopts a YUV color model, so a DTCC_YUV model is formed, the lower part of the model forms an upward truncated cone, and a shadow detection area is formed; the upper part of the model forms an inverted truncated cone, and a highlight noise detection area is formed; the middle part of the model forms a cylinder, and a main part background detection area is formed; and the method comprises two stages of model construction and background removal. The method disclosed by the invention has good foreground detection quality, higher timeliness is realized, and meanwhile the influence of shadow and highlight noise is effectively eliminated.

properties.title: Flight path development for remote sensing vehicles in a moving reference frame
properties.summary: Embodiments of the invention relate to a method and apparatus to produce a flightplan for a sUAS. Embodiments can produce such a flightplan for a variety of environmental and/or geographical parameters. A specific embodiment produces an optimal flightplan based on one or more metrics and/or one or more assumptions or boundary conditions. Embodiments take in vehicle parameters and/or the properties of the sensor systems used for imaging, and compute a partial, or complete, flightplan. Such a flightplan can include altitude, airspeeds, flight paths encompassing the target area, and/or the direction and/or path to turn in-between flightlines. Embodiments can improve the flight planning procedure compared to a manual process, which can be completely dependent on the operator, to implement a partially, or totally, automated process. Specific embodiments can produce a flightplan that results in the optimal data collection path.

properties.title: A kind of positional information extracting method towards natural language
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of positional information extracting method towards natural language, comprise the following steps: step 1: the feature analyzing natural language location expression, build semantic locations concept hierarchy model; Step 2: based on described semantic locations concept hierarchy model definition position extracting rule, described position extracting rule comprises place name extracting rule and spatial relationship extracting rule; Step 3: through place name identification and spatial relationship identification, extract location information.The present invention, relative to prior art, has the advantage that dirigibility is strong, can be applicable to all kinds of location expression syntactic pattern.

properties.title: Position information extraction method facing natural language
properties.summary: The invention discloses a position information extraction method facing a natural language, which comprises the following steps that 1, characteristics of natural language position description are analyzed; a semantic position concept hierarchy model is constructed; 2, a position extraction rule is defined based on the semantic position concept hierarchy model, wherein the position extraction rule comprises a toponym extraction rule and a spatial relationship extraction rule; and 3, position information is extracted by toponym identification and spatial relationship identification. Compared with the prior art, the position information extraction method has the advantage of high flexibility, and can be suitable for various position description syntactic patterns.

properties.title: DOCUMENT TOPIC IDENTIFICATION
properties.summary: ﻿Topics for a document are identified using names of categories in a knowledge base. Terms are extracted from document text. The extracted terms are mapped to articles in the knowledge base. The number of terms that are mapped to each article are counted. The number of articles to which the terms are mapped are also counted for each category. The categories that include the articles having the mapped terms are sorted such that the most relevant categories for the document correspond to the categories that include the highest number of articles to which the terms are mapped. The most relevant categories are then identified as the topics for the document.

properties.title: AUTO MODE SELECTION IN FIBER OPTIC END-FACE IMAGES
properties.summary: A method of automatically determining a type of fiber in a fiber optic end-face image includes obtaining the fiber optic end-face image, searching the fiber optic end-face image to find a fiber core, selecting a region in the fiber optic end-face image comprising the fiber core, retrieving pixel intensity values of selected region, placing the retrieved pixel intensity values in an array, passing the array to a classifier, and determining a type of fiber based on a classification made by the classifier.

properties.title: Method, system and the storage medium of customized multimedia content object
properties.summary: This application involves method, computer-readable non-transitory storage medium and systems.In one embodiment, a kind of method includes: the request received from the mobile client end system of user to multimedia object；Access SIM card information associated with the mobile client end system of the user；It is at least based on the SIM card information, determines bearer；And webpage in response to the request, is sent to the mobile client end system, wherein the multimedia object is customized based on the bearer of the determination of the mobile client end system.

properties.title: Method, computer-readable non-transitory storage medium and system
properties.summary: The application relates to a method, a computer-readable non-transitory storage medium and a system. In one embodiment, a method includes receiving a request for a multimedia object from a mobile-client system of a user, accessing SIM-card information associated with the mobile-client system of the user, determining a carrier based at least on the SIM-card information, and sending the webpage to the mobile-client system in response to the request, wherein the multimedia object has been customized based on the determined carrier of the mobile-client system.

properties.title: Detect method, medium and the system of the bearer of mobile device
properties.summary: In one embodiment, a kind of method includes：The request to content object is received from the mobile client end system of user；Access the SIM card information associated with the mobile client end system of the user；The SIM card information is at least based on, bearer is determined；And in response to the request, webpage is sent to the mobile client end system, wherein, the bearer of determination of the content object based on the mobile client end system is self-defined.

properties.title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR IMPLEMENTING RESERVOIR COMPUTING IN MAGNETIC RESONANCE IMAGING DEVICE USING ELASTOGRAPHY TECHNIQUES
properties.summary: A physical implementation of a recurrent neural network is disclosed, which comprises of a reservoir computing medium, magnetic resonance imaging device and a computing/storage device. An inhomogeneous gel substance located in a magnetic resonance imaging device, acoustic wave generators connected to the gel and the magnetic gradients in the magnetic resonance imaging device act as the physical reservoir of computation. The input is encoded in the generated acoustic and magnetic waves, and wave interactions provide the nonlinear operations for computation. The nonlinear output of the reservoir is read out by the MR imaging device. The inhomogeneous gel is prepared via an unsupervised annealing procedure that optimizes the representation of the reservoir medium for a specific dataset.

properties.title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR IMPLEMENTING RESERVOIR COMPUTING USING CELLULAR AUTOMATA
properties.summary: An implementation of a reservoir computing based recurrent neural network is disclosed. Cellular automaton is used as the reservoir of dynamical systems. Input is projected onto the initial conditions of automaton cells and nonlinear computation is performed on the input via application of a rule in the automaton for a period of time. The evolution of the automaton creates a space-time volume of the automaton state space, and it is used as the output of the reservoir. The output is further processed according to reservoir computing principles to achieve the assigned task. The reservoir is trained for the specific task and dataset via optimizing the rule of the automaton.

properties.title: CAN digital bus control method and system based on complex evolution global coordination algorithm
properties.summary: The invention discloses a CAN digital bus control method and system based on a complex evolution global coordination algorithm. The CAN digital bus control method and system are used for global optimization on a temperature and pressure PID control system of extrusion molding equipment so that the best control effect can be acquired. The CAN digital bus control system mainly comprises a hardware circuit part and a global optimization algorithm part based on complex evolution. The extrusion molding equipment works continuously, the control system of the extrusion molding equipment is in a multi-segment decentralized control mode, all control circuits are coupled mutually, the best control parameter combination is hard to obtain with a traditional algorithm, but the evolution algorithm has global parallel optimization capacity and the characteristic of directly facing an object function so that the multiple groups of parameters of the control system can be optimized, and the purpose of the best control can be achieved.

properties.title: RATIONAL METHOD FOR SOLUBILISING PROTEINS
properties.summary: A method and data processing system for identifying mutations or insertions that alter a property such as the solubility or aggregation propensity of an input polypeptide chain. The method comprises inputting a sequence of amino acids and a structure for said sequence for said target polypeptide chain; calculating a structurally corrected solubility or aggregation propensity profile for said target polypeptide chain; selecting, using said calculated profile, regions within said target polypeptide chain; identifying at least one position within each selected region suitable for mutations or insertions; generating a plurality of mutated sequences by mutations or insertions at least one identified position; and predicting a value of the solubility or aggregation propensity for each of the plurality of mutated sequences whereby any alteration to the solubility or aggregation propensity of the input polypeptide chain is identified. Predicting a value for solubility or aggregation propensity comprises: inputting each of the plurality of mutated sequences as an input polypeptide chain into a data processing system comprising a first trained neural network having a first function mapping an input to a first output value and a second trained neural network having a second function mapping an input to a second output value; generating a first output value of said solubility or aggregation propensity for each said input polypeptide chain using said first trained neural network; generating a second output value of said solubility or aggregation propensity for each said input polypeptide chain using said second trained neural network; and combining the first and second output values to determine a combined output value for the solubility or aggregation propensity.

properties.title: METHOD FOR AUTOMATIC THEMATIC CLASSIFICATION OF A DIGITAL TEXT FILE
properties.summary: The invention primarily relates to a method for the thematic classification of a digital text file (1) from an encyclopaedic database (5) comprising a category graph (G), said method comprising, during a learning phase (PA) making it possible to develop a thematic classification model (3), the step of grouping together, for each category node, all of the items directly attached to that category node so as to obtain a   word bag   for each category node; determining a so-called term-frequency vector characteristic of the category node; combining, on each category node, the term-frequency vector directly connected to it with term-frequency vectors of more specific nodes; and in that it comprises, during a production phase (PP), a step for calculating the term-frequency vector (V) of said digital text file (1) and selecting, in said thematic classification model (3), N category nodes having the term-frequency vectors (V') closest to the term-frequency vector (V) of the digital text file.

properties.title: PRESENTING RESULTS OF VISUAL ATTENTION MODELING
properties.summary: At least some embodiments of the present disclosure feature systems and methods for assessing the impact of visual features within a region of a scene. With the input of a visual representation of a scene and at least one selected region within the scene, the system applies a visual attention model to the visual representation to determine visual conspicuity of the at least one selected region. The system computes feature-related data associated with a plurality of features of the at least one selected region. Based on the visual conspicuity and the feature-related data, the system assesses an impact that at least one of the features within the at least one selected region have on the visual conspicuity.

properties.title: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR COMPUTING AND PRESENTING RESULTS OF VISUAL ATTENTION MODELING
properties.summary: At least some embodiments of the present disclosure feature systems and methods for assessing the impact of visual features within a region of a scene. With the input of a visual representation of a scene and at least one selected region within the scene, the system applies a visual attention model to the visual representation to determine visual conspicuity of the at least one selected region. The system computes feature-related data associated with a plurality of features of the at least one selected region. Based on the visual conspicuity and the feature-related data, the system assesses an impact that at least one of the features within the at least one selected region have on the visual conspicuity.

properties.title: Presenting the results of visual attention modeling
properties.summary: At least some embodiments of the present disclosure feature systems and methods for assessing the impact of visual features within a region of a scene. With the input of a visual representation of a scene and at least one selected region within the scene, the system applies a visual attention model to the visual representation to determine visual conspicuity of the at least one selected region. The system computes feature-related data associated with a plurality of features of the at least one selected region. Based on the visual conspicuity and the feature-related data, the system assesses an impact that at least one of the features within the at least one selected region have on the visual conspicuity. [WO2014200742A1]

Based on the visual conspicuity and the feature-related data, the system assesses an impact that at least one of the features within the at least one selected region have on the visual conspicuity.[WO2014200742A1]

properties.title: A kind of personalized article recommends method and system thereof
properties.summary: The invention discloses a kind of personalized article recommends method and system thereof, wherein the method comprises: step 1, researchist in scientific research field is utilized to write the behavioral trait of scientific paper, excavate heterogeneous academic network data, build training dataset according to described heterogeneous academic network data, and carry out training according to described training dataset and obtain the learning model that sorts; Step 2, online structure user configuration, generates the interested candidate's collection of thesis of user, according to described candidate's collection of thesis and based on described sequence learning model generation paper recommendation results, based on described article recommends result, generate article recommends according to certain way and return to user; Step 3, receives user feedback online, and correspondingly upgrades described article recommends result according to different user feedback behaviors.Present invention effectively avoids    cold start-up    problem at commending system initial stage, ensure that accuracy rate and the recall rate of recommendation results.

properties.title: Personalized paper recommendation method and system thereof
properties.summary: The invention discloses a personalized paper recommendation method and a system thereof. The method includes the following steps: step 1, finding out heterogeneous academic network data based on the behavioral characteristics of researchers writing academic papers in the filed of scientific research, and building a training dataset according to the heterogeneous academic network data, and training as per the training dataset to obtain a ranked study model; step 2, on-line building user configuration, generating candidate collected papers interested by users, generating the result of paper recommendation based on the ranked study model according to the candidate collected papers, generating paper recommendation as per a certain manner and returning the paper recommendation to a user based on the result of paper recommendation; step 3, on-line receiving user feedback, and updating the result of paper recommendation correspondingly as per different user feedback. The method and the system effectively solve the problem of cold start at the initial stage of the recommendation system, and guarantee the accuracy and recall rate of the recommendation result.

properties.title: Based on the method for optimally controlling of supervised intensified learning
properties.summary: The present invention proposes a kind of method for optimally controlling based on supervised intensified learning, comprises step: step 1, the parameters such as the weights of the artificial neural network of initialization controller and evaluator, and one group of training dataset; Step 2, selects a group system state to start iteration; Step 3, supervised controller produces the control strategy of incipient stability, and controller approaches this control strategy by self weights of adjustment; Step 4, controller generates corresponding control action, and additional certain random noise is as exploration; Step 5, is applied in controlled system by noisy for band control action, the state of observation subsequent time system and return; Step 6, the weight of the artificial neural network of adjustment controller and evaluator; Step 7, judges whether current state meets end condition, is, enters step 8, otherwise gets back to step 3; Step 8, judging that whether initial system state data is all for training, is export final controller, otherwise get back to step 2.

properties.title: Optimal control method based on supervised reinforcement learning
properties.summary: The invention provides an optimal control method based on supervised reinforcement learning. The method comprises the steps: 1, initializing parameters such as a weight value of an artificial neural network of a controller and an evaluator, and a training data set, 2, selecting a set of system states to be iterated, 3, generating an initial stable control strategy through the supervised controller and approaching the control strategy through regulating a weight value of the controller, 4, generating a corresponding control action through the controller and adding a certain amount of random noise as exploration, 5, exerting the control action with the noise on a controlled system and observing the state and return of the system in the next moment, 6, regulating the weight of the artificial neural network of the controller and the evaluator, 7, judging whether the current state meets an end condition or not, if yes, entering the step 8, and if not, returning to the step 3, and 8, judging whether initial system state data are all used for training or not, if yes, outputting the data from the final controller, and if not, returning to the step 2.

properties.title: System and method for malware detection learning
properties.summary: Malware detection techniques that detect malware by identifying the C&C communication between the malware and the remote host, and distinguish between communication transactions that carry C&C communication and transactions of innocent traffic. The system distinguishes between malware transactions and innocent transactions using malware identification models, which it adapts using machine learning algorithms. However, the number and variety of malicious transactions that can be obtained from the protected network are often too limited for effectively training the machine learning algorithms. Therefore, the system obtains additional malicious transactions from another computer network that is known to be relatively rich in malicious activity. The system is thus able to adapt the malware identification models based on a large number of positive examples—The malicious transactions obtained from both the protected network and the infected network. As a result, the malware identification models are adapted with high speed and accuracy.

properties.title: Question answering method, system and computer-readable medium
properties.summary: Described herein is a kind of technology convenient for automatic question answering.In one implementation, it is firstly received input problem.Different search strategies can be used to come from a plurality of types of data of a plurality of types of knowledge database search, to generate one or more candidate answers to input problem.One or more candidate answers are evaluated to generate the final result to input problem.

properties.title: Production method of air-dry silver carps by using heat pump cold blast based on electronic nose examination
properties.summary: A production method of air-dry silver carps by using heat pump cold blast based on electronic nose examination, relates to a production method of air-dry silver carps based on electronic nose intelligent examination, and comprises the following steps: (1) killing, cleaning, dividing and pickling the silver carps, obtaining 165 dried silver carp samples by using a 1HP-5 heat pump cold blast drying device, wherein the 165 dried silver carp samples are used for establishing a data base by using a chemical method to detect total volatile basic nitrogen TVB-N; (2) establishing an electronic nose system mainly comprising a JSUEN-2 type computer system, smell sensors, an electronic nose circuit part, a test loop and a reduction loop, fusing newly developed principal component analysis recognition, a K-nearest neighbor recognition method and partial least squares (PLS) to establish a quantitative regression model to realize content examination of the TVB-N by using the electronic nose; (3) realizing the excellent production method of air-dry silver carps examined by using the electronic nose system with the temperature of 13-17 DEG C and the wind speed of 1.4-1.8 m/s. Through the method, the quality of the air-dry silver carps is good.

properties.title: Automatic wavelength or angle pruning for optical metrology
properties.summary: Automatic wavelength or angle pruning for optical metrology is described. An embodiment of a method for automatic wavelength or angle pruning for optical metrology includes determining a model of a structure including a plurality of parameters; designing and computing a dataset of wavelength-dependent or angle-dependent data for the model; storing the dataset in a computer memory; performing with a processor an analysis of the dataset for the model including applying an outlier detection technology on the dataset, and identifying any data outliers, each data outlier being a wavelength or angle; and, if any data outliers are identified in the analysis of the dataset of the model, removing the wavelengths or angles corresponding to the data outliers from the dataset to generate a modified dataset, and storing the modified dataset in the computer memory.

properties.title: Online social persona management
properties.summary: Embodiments use a framework for modeling a user's social role in an online self-expression tool, such as a blog or social network, through semantic modeling techniques. Different ways in which users cooperate with content are modeled when explicit interests are claimed in their profiles and through social expressions in the community. Certain topics guide the patterns users follow for expressing their interests in this community. Embodiments enable users to track how their posts and comments reflect their online behavior. Embodiments infer the needs of the online community and make suggestions or send alerts to the user. Other embodiments are described and claimed.

properties.title: Remote distributed antenna system
properties.summary: A distributed antenna system is provided that frequency shifts the output of one or more microcells to a 60 GHz or higher frequency range for transmission to a set of distributed antennas. The cellular band outputs of these microcell base station devices are used to modulate a 60 GHz (or higher) carrier wave, yielding a group of subcarriers on the 60 GHz carrier wave. This group will then be transmitted in the air via analog microwave RF unit, after which it can be repeated or radiated to the surrounding area. The repeaters amplify the signal and resend it on the air again toward the next repeater. In places where a microcell is required, the 60 GHz signal is shifted in frequency back to its original frequency (e.g., the 1.9GHz cellular band) and radiated locally to nearby mobile devices.

properties.title: A REAL-TIME SYSTEM FOR OBJECT DETECTION AND RECOGNITION WITH MACHINE BEARING'
properties.summary: The invention relates to a system for real-time object detection and recognition with real-time machine learning. The system can be applicable in automotive industries , quality monitoring, security and surveillance purposes. The inventive system is configured to train and prepare itself using fast and accurate singular value decomposition (SVD) in real-time to detect and recognize objects, The system hardware comprise i) a digital camera, ii) an audio output system, and iii) an embedded computing platform. There are two channels/paths, one for training and the other path is deployed for object detection and recognition. The advantage of the system is the means for fast and accurate real-time implementation of the Tridiagonalization and Divide and Conquer based Singular Value Decomposition (TDCSVD).

properties.title: Sound based gesture recognition method
properties.summary: The invention discloses a sound based gesture recognition method. A normal microphone and a loudspeaker are used as hardware supports for receiving and transmitting signals, the loudspeaker generates high-frequency sounds difficult for human ears to perceive, the microphone receives sound signals rebounded in limb movements, spectral analysis is conducted by the aid of physical phenomenon Doppler effect of the rebounded sound signals, acquired information of the limb movements is defined as corresponding logic signals, and operations of a computer are controlled by the aid of the logic signals. A brand-new man-computer interaction method is provided in the aspect of computer control, and interesting user experience and interaction feelings can be brought to computer users.

properties.title: DATA COMPRESSION SYSTEM
properties.summary: The system includes a correlation extraction means for extracting at least one candidate for a correlation from a collected given data set, based on a relationship between units of data in the given data set; a correlation verification means for verifying whether or not the units of data in the given data set satisfy the correlation extracted by the correlation extraction means; and a data compression means for compressing the given data set with use of the correlation, based on the result of verification by the correlation verification means.

properties.title: DATA COMPRESSION SYSTEM [WO2014192299A1]
properties.summary: The system includes a correlation extraction means for extracting at least one candidate for a correlation from a collected given data set, based on a relationship between units of data in the given data set; a correlation verification means for verifying whether or not the units of data in the given data set satisfy the correlation extracted by the correlation extraction means; and a data compression means for compressing the given data set with use of the correlation, based on the result of verification by the correlation verification means. [WO2014192299A1]

properties.title: DATA COMPRESSION SYSTEM[WO2014192299A1]
properties.summary: The system includes a correlation extraction means for extracting at least one candidate for a correlation from a collected given data set, based on a relationship between units of data in the given data set; a correlation verification means for verifying whether or not the units of data in the given data set satisfy the correlation extracted by the correlation extraction means; and a data compression means for compressing the given data set with use of the correlation, based on the result of verification by the correlation verification means.[WO2014192299A1]

properties.title: Automotive number plate recognition methods based on sliding window search
properties.summary: The present invention provides a kind of automotive number plate recognition methods based on sliding window search, including step: 1) each vehicle occurred in present frame in scene is carried out target following location；2) license plate image single to be identified extracted is carried out size normalized and binary conversion treatment, determines each Character segmentation center 3 in license plate image further according to prior information) obtain sliding window recognition result each m time with the window of standard character size at the segmentation center of each character and the sliding window search of segmentation left and right, center；4) the sliding window recognition result of each character putting in this character correspondence ballot pond, position in car plate, the recognition result ratio in each character ballot pond that calculates is the highest and the final recognition result as single character more than decision-making value.The present invention obtains the repeated detection result of same car plate by following the tracks of target vehicle.Final Recognition of License Plate Characters result is the ballot under repeatedly identifying of the same target, greatly improves the robustness of system and the stability of result.

properties.title: Motor vehicle plate identification method based on sliding window searching
properties.summary: The invention provides a motor vehicle plate identification method based on sliding window searching. The motor vehicle plate identification method based on the sliding window searching comprises the steps of (1) conducting target tracking and locating on all vehicles appearing in a scene in a current frame, (2) conducting size normalization processing and binarization processing on a single extracted plate image to be identified and determining segmentation centers of all characters in the plate image according to prior information, (3) respectively searching m times in the segmentation centers of all the characters and left sliding windows and right sliding windows of the segmentation centers by the utilization of a window of standard character dimension to obtain sliding window identification results, and (4) obtaining the sliding window identification result of each character in a plate and putting the sliding window identification result of each character in a voting pool corresponding to the position of each character, calculating identification result proportion of each character in the voting pool, and taking the highest number which is also larger than a decision threshold value as a final identification result of a single character. The motor vehicle plate identification method based on the sliding window searching acquires multi-time detection results of a same plate through tracking a target vehicle. The final plate character identification result is voting of a same target under identification of multiple times, and thus robustness of a system and stability of the result are largely improved.

properties.title: Parallel constraint solution method based on compatible optimization
properties.summary: The present invention relates to a kind of parallel constraint solution method based on compatible optimization, containing the following step: 1: initialization task queue；2: if task queue does not have locating vector, then terminate；If there being locating vector, then select one as work at present task；3: from all unassignable constraint arguments, select to want the constraint argument of assignment；4: institute's likely value of the constraint argument assignment is carried out assignment, forms new locating vector and put in task queue；5: new locating vector is carried out parallel compatible inspection；6: if compatible inspection finds conflict, then carry out backtracking and analyze, rebuild locating vector, update task queue, perform 2；If compatible inspection does not find conflict and institute's Constrained argument assignment, then illustrate to have found satiable solving, terminate；If not institute's Constrained argument assignment, then newly constructed locating vector is added task queue, perform 2；Present invention achieves the parallel of constraint solving efficiently to perform。

properties.title: Parallel constraint solution method based on compatibility optimization
properties.summary: The invention relates to a parallel constraint solution method based on compatibility optimization. The parallel constraint solution method includes the following steps: 1, initializing a task queue; 2, if searching vectors do not exist in the task queue, finishing initialization, and if the searching vectors exist, selecting one to be a current work task; 3, selecting to-be-assigned constraint variables from all non-assigned constraint variables; 4, assigning all possible values of the to-be-assigned constraint variables to form new searching vectors to be put into the task queue; 5, performing parallel compatibility examinations on the new searching vectors; 6, if the compatibility examinations conflict, performing backtracking analysis, rebuilding the searching vectors, updating the task queue, and executing the step 2; if the compatibility examinations do not conflict and all the constraint variables are assigned, finishing solution since a satiable solution is found; if not all the constraint variables are assigned, adding the newly-built searching vectors into the task queue, and executing the step 2. By the parallel constraint solution method, efficient parallel execution of constraint solution is realized.

properties.title: System and method for continuous analytics run against a combination of static and real-time data
properties.summary: A system for continuous analytics comprises an in-memory storage and a processor. The processor receives a query that indicates an analytic function to be performed on a combination of static data and real-time data. The processor loads the in-memory storage from a first source external to the processor with data that was stored as the static data. At the same time that the in-memory storage is already loaded with the static data, the processor continuously receives ephemeral real-time data as it is being generated by a second source external to the processor. The processor runs the analytic function from the query against the in-memory storage loaded with the first data and the real-time data that is being continuously received, in combination, to produce a result of the analytic function. The result is stored and time-stamped in the in-memory storage as an analytic cube.

properties.title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR INFORMATION SHARING BASED ON SOCIAL NETWORK SERVICE THROUGH WATCHING VIDEO
properties.summary: A method and a system for sharing information based on a conceptual tag cloud are provided. The method and the system for sharing information can create words which appear together in one sentence or an adjacent sentence using words extracted from a script document of a video, can build an interface based on an ODP structure which represents domain in a hierarchical structure and a document which consists of the words appearing together, and can share information between lecturers or learners using this interface.

properties.title: A kind of parallel evolution super-network DNA micro array gene data categorizing system based on GPU and method
properties.summary: The present invention proposes a kind of parallel evolution super-network DNA micro array gene data categorizing system based on GPU and method thereof, relates to intelligent information processing technology field.After DNA microarray data are carried out pretreatment, using string of binary characters after treatment as the input information of super-network, super-network is initialized by the CPU of main frame, super-network after initialization hands to GPU equipment, storehouse, super limit is divided into multiple groups, respectively executed in parallel evolutional learning based on genetic algorithm on GPU, obtains priori, search has the optimal super limit of decision-making capability, and the super-network after having developed utilizes a large amount of super limit jointly to classify input sample.The present invention achieves super-network parallel evolutionary based on genetic algorithm study on GPU, has shorter study and recognition time, and system execution efficiency is higher.Super-network can utilize the individuality in a large number with decision-making capability jointly to classify sample, has higher system recognition rate and generalization ability.

properties.title: Parallel evolution super-network DNA micro array gene data sorting system and method based on GPU
properties.summary: The invention provides a parallel evolution super-network DNA micro array gene data sorting system and method based on a GPU and relates to the technical field of intelligent information processing. After preprocessing on DNA micro array data is carried out, a processed binary string is used as input information of a super-network, the super-network is initialized on a CUP of a host computer, the initialized super-network is transferred to the GPU, a hyperedge bank is divided into a plurality of sets of hyperedges, evolution studies based on a genetic algorithm are executed in parallel on the GPU respectively to acquire priori knowledge, the best hyperedge with decision-making ability is searched, and the super-network after evolution carries out classification on input samples by utilizing the hyperedges together. According to the parallel evolution super-network DNA micro array gene data sorting system and method based on the GPU, super-network parallel evolution studies based on the genetic algorithm are achieved on the GPU, study time and recognition time are short, and system execution efficiency is high. The super-network can classify the samples by utilizing a plurality of singles with the decision-making ability together, and therefore system recognition rates and generalization ability are high.

properties.title: Method for labeling and searching for diversified pictures based on integration of multiple RBFNN classifiers
properties.summary: The invention discloses a method for labeling and searching for diversified pictures based on the integration of multiple classifiers. The method mainly comprises the following four steps: (1) constructing and studying a plurality of different RBFNN integrated classifier molds; (2) utilizing optimized a plurality of different RBFNN integrated classifier molds to conduct diversified labeling for the pictures in a searching picture library; (3) conducting diversified searching for the searching picture library according to searching key words and labeling results obtained in step (2): firstly, searching all pictures labeled with searching key words and ordering according to the similarity of concepts, and then ordering the pictures which belong to different sub-concepts from high to low according to the similarity of the concepts to obtain searching results; and (4) outputting the searching results. The method improves the accuracy of image searching, meanwhile, greatly improves the diversity for the image searching results, saves the searching time, and has higher robustness and practicability.

properties.title: ESTIMATING THE TOTAL SALES OVER STREAMING BIDS
properties.summary: A mechanism is provided for computing an estimation of maximum total sales over streaming items. Each item having an associated value is designated as an item value pair. Value ranges are established to place the item value pairs. The value ranges are distinct. Each of the item value pairs is added into the value ranges according to each of the associated values for the item value pairs. Repeated item value pairs are removed that are in the same value ranges. A number of the item value pairs is reduced in each of the value ranges respectively based on an error factor, by randomly selecting the item value pairs to remove from each of the value ranges. An estimate of a total maximum value of the bids for the item value pairs in all of the value ranges is computed based on a scale factor.

properties.title: EFFICIENT DATA COMPRESSION AND ANALYSIS AS A SERVICE
properties.summary: The invention provides efficient data compression and analysis as a service. Data may be efficiently analyzed and compressed as part of a data compression service. A data compression request may be received from a client indicating data to be compressed. An analysis of the data or metadata associated with the data may be performed. In at least some embodiments, this analysis may be a rules-based analysis. Some embodiments may employ one or more machine learning techniques to historical compression data to update the rules-based analysis. One or more compression techniques may be selected out of a plurality of compression techniques to be applied to the data. Data compression candidates may then be generated according to the selected compression techniques. In some embodiments, a compression service restriction may be enforced. One of the data compression candidates may be selected and sent in a response.

properties.title: The system and method for realizing compression service
properties.summary: The part as data compression service can effectively be analyzed and be compressed to data.The data compression request for indicating data to be compressed can be received from client.The analysis of the data or metadata associated with the data can be performed.In at least some embodiments, this analysis can be rule-based analysis.Some embodiments can be to history compressed data using one or more machine learning techniques, to update the rule-based analysis.One or more compress techniques can be selected from multiple compress techniques to be applied to the data.Data compression candidate then can generate according to the compress technique of selection.In some embodiments, compression service limitation can be forced to implement.One in the data compression candidate can be selected and be sent in response.

properties.title: TARGETED SUMMARIZATION OF MEDICAL DATA BASED ON IMPLICIT QUERIES
properties.summary: A system and method for targeted summarization of a patient's electronic medical records are provided. The system includes an aggregation component which provides an aggregation of health records of a patient. A transformation component transforms the health records of the patient into representations in a multidimensional search space. A search component generates an implicit query in the multidimensional search space and retrieves responsive heath records based on the implicit query. A summarization component generates a summary based on the retrieved responsive health records for display to a healthcare provider on an associated user interface. A processor implements the aggregation component, transformation component, search component, and summarization component.

properties.title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR MACHINE LEARNING AND CLASSIFYING DATA
properties.summary: The present invention relates in general to the field of parallel data processing, and more particularly to machine learning and classification of extremely large volumes of unstructured gene sequence data using Collaborative Analytics Gene Sequence Classification Learning Systems and Methods.

properties.title: Mobile terminal swarm intelligent perception structure based on layered information extraction server
properties.summary: A mobile terminal swarm intelligent perception structure based on a layered information extraction server comprises a data collecting module, the layered information extraction server, a cloud data processing/analyzing module and a user enquiring module. Perception task distribution and perception data collection can be achieved by the structure, so that large-scale data perception tasks are completed. The layered information extraction server is put forward in an innovative mode, perception information is divided into individual information and swarm information, the individual information is processed locally, a result is uploaded to a cloud terminal, and the swarm information is processed in the cloud terminal. Therefore, data can be processed effectively in real time and the privacy of a user is protected.

properties.title: User-influenced placement of virtual machine instances
properties.summary: A service provider network includes functionality for allowing a customer to influence the placement of virtual machine instances on server computers by specifying a placement strategy. Placement strategies may be shared among customers of the service provider network, and the placement strategies and the publishers of the placement strategies might be rated. Vendor-agnostic placement strategies might also be utilized to identify a service provider network for executing a virtual machine instance. A placement strategy that includes dynamically evaluated parameters might also be utilized to modify virtual machine instances in a customer fleet on an ongoing basis.

properties.title: MATCHING DATA FROM VARIANT DATABASES
properties.summary: A system for collaborative, data-driven translation of nomenclatures for data integration is described. Translation of observational data leverages both language and mathematics. Innovative scoring algorithms and interactive user interfaces aid in the discovery of matches. A process of sharing and approval enables collaboration despite multi-institutional barriers. While this system was developed with the intention of integrating clinical electronic health record data across multiple hospitals, it can be applied to a wide variety of data from any domain, due to its guiding principles and flexible design.

properties.title: ACQUISITION AND ASSESSMENT OF CLASSICALLY NON-INFERABLE INFORMATION
properties.summary: Mind-enabled question answering (MEQA) systems (300, 340) and methods (400, 500) produce answers (313) that are not inferable from information available from private databases, online searching or other traditional sources. MEQA systems utilize information provided by using devices (200) and methods that are responsive to an influence of mind. Preferred embodiments of MEQA technology use a Bayesian Network to calculate the probability of an answer's correctness. MEQA systems and methods utilize high speed non-deterministic random number generators (NDRNGs). Preferred NDRNGs (202) achieve high statistical quality without randomness correction, which allows improved response of a mind-enabled device (200, 302).

properties.title: METHOD FOR LEARNING TASK SKILL USING TEMPORAL AND SPATIAL ENTROPHIES
properties.summary: The present invention relates to a method for learning task skills using temporal and spatial entropy. The method for learning task skills includes receiving, by a learning engine, an input of learning data on a given task and modeling the entire behavior path into a plurality of Gaussian using a Gaussian mixture model (GMM) according to the number of first parameters, calculating, by the learning engine, temporal and spatial entropy from the modeled Gaussian, extracting an intersection area by detecting a portion greater than or equal to a temporal threshold among temporal entropy and detecting a portion less than or equal to a spatial threshold among spatial entropy, by the learning engine, and dividing a behavior path for the extracted intersection area from the entire behavior path and modeling the divided behavior path using a GMM according to the number of second parameters.

properties.title: A kind of efficiency control method formalized in code building and device
